##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-3 State machine and message flow **Description of UL SRS BM initial configuration** (ID: 11153963)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `13443992`)

State machine and message flow 1. 5G-L2-PS sends *UlData_PrachReceiveReq *message with PRACH time and frequency positions.**

1. The 5G-L1-UL sends the list of detected random access preambles to 5G-L2-PS in *UlData_PrachReceiveInd message.*

2. 5G-L2-PS retrieves SS Block Index from PRACH time occasion and PRACH frequency occasion, see 5G_UP_ALG_1955_replaced([11111881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpRIM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and deduce beam ID from SS block index, see 5G_UP_ALG_11982_replaced([11111700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpP6FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3. 5G-L2-PS sets state to **SRS_UL_BM_AGED for this UE after random access procedure and periodic SRS resource is configured, see [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_UqEvWPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).[CB015122-A] If the parameter actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall indicate the UL BM state reset (see [11180897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1V_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) in the next UlData_SrsReceiveReq message that is sent to 5G-L1-DU.[End CB015122-A]**

4. 5G-L2-PS shall maintain beam by beam tracking and beam refinement in **SRS_UL_BM_AGED state, see 5G_UP_ALG_1987_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2017_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

5. 5G-L2-PS sends *UlData_SrsReceiveReq(5G_L1_IF_241_replaced([11514379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PZPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) *and receives**UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G_L1_IF_257_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from 5G-L1-UL.****

[Before CB015122-A]

1. After 5G-L2-PS continuously receives *rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports from L1 via message *UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs *(5G_L1_257_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), state is switched to SRS_UL_BM_VALID, see 5G_L2_5341_replaced([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***

2. After **rrmUlBeamSelectTimer(5G_L2_3886_replaced([11153987](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true with additional beam calculation is triggered(5G_L2_21708_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) 5G-L2-PS select UL beams according to beam selection algorithm defined in 5G_L2_3589_replaced([11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and switch state to **SRS_UL_BM_CHGED, see 5G_L2_5337_replaced([11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****

3. When 5G-L2-PS receives a valid SU-MIMO report from 5G-L1-UL, switch state to **SRS_UL_BM_VALID, see 5G_L2_5341_replaced([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

4. When *rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G_L2_3886_replaced([11153987](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwK_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires in **SRS_UL_BM_VALID or **SRS_UL_BM_CHGED state, switch to **SRS_UL_BM_AGED, see 5G_L2_5339_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).*******

5. 5G-L2-PS sends pattern ID to L1 in *UlData_PuschReceiveReq/UlData_SrsReceiveReq **messages.***

[CB015122-A]The entity level description for the UL SRS BM state machine (see [11154035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is defined in [13443998](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_M_RBECapEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) if actSrsBmCalcInL1 is True, and in [13444000](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_SQS10CapEfGxldjOZQLezQ) otherwise.

[End CB015122-A]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-4 State machine and message flow State machine description for beam selection algorithm done in 5G-L2-PS (ID: 13444000)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13444001`)

State machine and message flow For system level state machine description, see [11154035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). For the UE attach and the initialization of SRS UL BM state machine see [11153963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

The beam selection algorithm is proceeded in 5G-L2-PS only when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to False (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

1. When 5G-L2-PS, in the SRS_UL_BM_AGED state (see [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), continuously receives rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports from L1 via UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs message (see [11154054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), state is switched to SRS_UL_BM_VALID (see [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

2. After rrmUlBeamSelectTimer (see [11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires,**or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True with additional beam calculation triggered (see [11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), 5G-L2-PS shall select UL beams according to [11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and switch state to SRS_UL_BM_CHGED (see [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first SRS_UL_BM_VALID (see [11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).**

3. When 5G-L2-PS receives a valid SU-MIMO report from 5G-L1-UL, it shall switch state to SRS_UL_BM_VALID (see [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

4. When rrmCoMaAgedTimer (see [11154145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires in SRS_UL_BM_VALID or SRS_UL_BM_CHGED state, switch to SRS_UL_BM_AGED.

5. 5G-L2-PS sends pattern ID to L1 in UlData_PuschReceiveReq/UlData_SrsReceiveReq **messages.**

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-5 State machine and message flow State machine description for beam selection algorithm done in 5G-L1-DU (ID: 13443998)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13444081`)

State machine and message flow For system level state machine description, see [11154035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). For the UE attach and the initialization of SRS UL BM state machine see [11153963](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwJ_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

The beam selection algorithm is executed in 5G-L1-DU only when actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

The 5G-L2-PS shall manage the SRS UL BM state machine for each UE as follows:

1. When in the SRS_UL_BM_AGED state the algorithm described in [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) shall be applied.
2. When the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer ([11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires, the 5G-L2-PS shall send the UlData_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveReq message ([13456641](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BcHH0C0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to 5G-L1-DU. The message shall be filled according to [13456643](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LTFM8i0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). The 5G-L2-PS shall then restart the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer according to [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
3. While in the SRS_UL_BM_VALID ([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or SRS_UL_BM_CHGED ([11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) state, upon receiving pattern IDs and beam-related parameters in the UlData_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveResp message ([13456660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2u4hYC0NEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) from 5G-L1-DU, the 5G-L2-PS shall use this data according to [13457584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hhi3DEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
4. When the rrmCoMaAgedTimer ([11154145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) expires while a UE is in the SRS_UL_BM_VALID or SRS_UL_BM_CHGED state, the 5G-L2-PS shall switch the UE's state to SRS_UL_BM_AGED ([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). See [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [11154015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXMPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) for more details.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.1.0-6 State machine and message flow SRS_UL_BM_AGED state (ID: 11153981)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13450843`)

SRS Covariance matrix [CB015122-A] When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True in PsCnfg_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall receive only the instantaneous CoMa validity indication in the isInstCoMaValidUl bit within the coMaStatus structure from UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (see [11180933](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27P1XfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). The detailed algorithm is handled by 5G-L1-DU as specified in [13327064](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_s48bENQ5EfCnq6aYkXj8Pw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

Further part of the requirement applies only to the actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False.[End CB015122-A]

After 5G-L2-PS receives covariance matrices from L1 via message UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G_L1_257_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall process matrices according to below steps. See 5G_L2_3587_replaced([11153925](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) about the state machine for BM.

Note: the calculation and maintenance of the covariance matrices shall be implemented in a separate thread or process to decouple it from the normal scheduler process

1. Read covariance matrices per subcell per subband per comb per cyclic shift and find context of related UE(s) according to subband information.

a. The size of covariance matrix is defined in 5G_L2_3950_replaced([11154069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

b. The number of covariance matrices per UE is defined in 5G_L2_3949_replaced([11154082](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXO_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2. Calculate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G_L2_3948_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

3. Validate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G_L2_3947_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

4. If Cov(H) and Cov(V) are valid:

a. Average them via the IIR filter defined in 5G_L2_3946_replaced([11154199](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b. Store averaged Cov(H) and Cov(V) in UE’s context.

c. Restart the timer rrmCoMaAgedTimer**(see 5G_L2_5339_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

5. If Cov(H) or Cov(V) is invalid:

a. Discard Cov(H) and Cov(V) of UE which are reported by L1.

b. If the timer rrmCoMaAgedTimer**is not running, start this timer (see 5G_L2_5339_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

Note 1: If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, the above step 2 and 3 shall be switched, 5G-L2-PS shall validate firslty, then calculate the Cov.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-2 SRS Covariance matrix Size of covariance matrix (ID: 11154069)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13450974`)

SRS Covariance matrix [Before CNI-157588-H]The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrix is decided according to layout of radio unit according to the below layout table:

             **** ****

| | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Number of TRXs | Number of columns (rrmTrxColumn) | Number of rows (rrmTrxRow) | First Feature |
| 16 | 4 | 2 | 5GC001086-C |
| 16 | 8 | 1 | 5GC001086-C |
| 32 | 8 | 2 | 5GC001086-C |
| 32 | 4 | 4 | 5GC001086-C |
| 64 | 8 | 4 | 5GC001086-A |

The horizontal covariance matrix is a square matrix in size of **rrmTrxColumn.**

The vertical covariance matrix is a square matrix in size of **rrmTrxRow.**

NOTE: Only the lower triangle of the covariance matrix is filled by L1. L2 shall restore values of full covariance matrix according to the rule of Cov(i, j) = Cov(j, i) for any j > i.

[CNI-157588-H]The size of covariance matrix is defined in [11154448](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CNI-157588-H]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-3 SRS Covariance matrix Covariance matrix per UE (ID: 11154082)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `13450980`)

SRS Covariance matrix [Before CNI 157588-H]If periodic sub-band SRS for multiple UEs are scheduled in SRS slot, 5G-L1-UL will report multiple covariance matrices per polarization per sub-band per comb per cyclic shift per direction to 5G-L2-PS. The size of horizontal and vertical covariance matrices is defined in 5G_L2_3950_replaced([11154069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Based on UE’s capability, if UE is configured with single port SRS, 5G-L1-UL will report 4 covariance matrices to upper layer. If UE is configured with two-port SRS, 5G-L1-UL will report 8 covariance matrices. Reported covariance matrices per UE are listed in the below table. The table assumes transmissionComb = n2 and cyclicShift-n2 = 0 on SRS.

              **** **** **** **** **** ****

| | | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| SRS configuration | SRS port | Cyclic shifts | Directions | Polarizations | Covariance matrix |
| Single port | 1000 (p0) | CS0 | H | +45 | Cov(H, p0, +45) |
| CS0 | H | -45 | Cov(H, p0, -45) | | |
| CS0 | V | +45 | Cov(V, p0, +45) | | |
| CS0 | V | -45 | Cov(V, p0, -45) | | |
| Two ports | 1000 (p0) | CS0 | H | +45 | Cov(H, p0, +45) |
| CS0 | H | -45 | Cov(H, p0, -45) | | |
| CS0 | V | +45 | Cov(V, p0, +45) | | |
| CS0 | V | -45 | Cov(V, p0, -45) | | |
| 1001 (p1) | CS4 | H | +45 | Cov(H, p1, +45) | |
| CS4 | H | -45 | Cov(H, p1, -45) | | |
| CS4 | V | +45 | Cov(V, p1, +45) | | |

If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, [End CNI 157588-H]
 Refer to [11154462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-4 SRS Covariance matrix Combine covariance matrices per UE (ID: 11154107)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-4.0-4**  (ID: `13450981`)

SRS Covariance matrix [Before CNI 157588-H]For each direction (H and V), covariance matrices from different polarizations and ports shall be combined into one covariance matrix by calculating average values of each element among them.

For eCPRI 7-2a (NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to False)

If the number of SRS port is one:

Cov(H) = (Cov(H, p0, +45) + Cov(H, p0, -45)) / 2

Cov(V) = (Cov(V, p0, +45) + Cov(V, p0, -45)) / 2

If the number of SRS ports is two:

Cov(H) = (Cov(H, p0, +45) + Cov(H, p0, -45) + Cov(H, p1, +45) + Cov(H, p1, -45)) / 4

Cov(V) = (Cov(V, p0, +45) + Cov(V, p0, -45) + Cov(V, p1, +45) + Cov(V, p1, -45)) / 4

If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, calculate the average value according to 5G_UP_ALG_2160_replaced([11154462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
 [CNI 157588-H]

Refer to [11154462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
 [End CNI 157588-H]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-5 SRS Covariance matrix Covariance matrix DTX detection (ID: 11154130)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-5.0-5**  (ID: `13450989`)

SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix 13450989: SRS Covariance matrix [CB015122-A]

The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
 For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True, see [11154046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [11155895](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksyWSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

[End CB015122-A]

{ For eCPRI 7-2a (NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to False)

5G-L2-PS shall validate covariance matrix Cov(H) and Cov(V) before averaging them in time domain. It includes below steps:

1. To calculate SRS power according to below equations:

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).
Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).

where

- Tr(R) returns sum of diagonal elements in matrix R;

- Rh is the covariance matrix Cov(H), see 5G_L2_3948_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- Rv is the covariance matrix Cov(V), see 5G_L2_3948_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- Nh is the number of columns in the matrix Rh;

- Nv is the number of columns in the matrix Rv;

- rxScalingFactorEcpriDbm is the default RX power scaling over eCPRI interface, its value is -152;

- gainCorrection is the scaler indicated from L3 interface during the cell setup;

1. If the value of rrmSrsPowerdBm is higher than rrmSrsPowerThreshold for UL/srsPowerThresholdForDlBm **for DL , the covariance matrix is valid, otherwise it is not valid.**

 Refer 5G_UP_ALG_2165_replaced([11154516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPr_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),the rrmSrsPowerThreshold is implemented by message Pcell_CellSetupReq -> srsPowerThresholdForUlBm,

the srsPowerThresholdForDlBm is implemented by message Pcell_CellSetupReq -> srsPowerThresholdForDlBm.

}

{ For eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ,

Due to the correct PowerScalingFactorSrs can't be got by L2PS because variable of GianofBeamModule is introduced.

Also the L1 can calculate and evaluate the SRS CoMa status by itself. Then L2PS will validate the SRS CoMa status by the DTX indication through message SrsReceiveRespBmPs per SRS resource directly.

Related validation threshold will be send to L1 through msg SrsReceiveReq. srsPowerThreshold for UL_BM_CoMa, srsPowerThresholdForDl for DL_BM_CoMa**.**

If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, 5G-L2-PS shall validate the covariance matrices as below.

**first L2PS needs to distinguish this SRS is used for DL_BM or UL_BM, then retrive corresponding DTX (dtx or dtxDL) to validate inst_CoMa, dtx for UL_BM_ CoMa, and dtxDL for DL_ BM_CoMa.**

for UL_BM_CoMa

If UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.dtx == DTX then

DTX.

Else

it is valid CoMa for UL_BM

End if

for DL_BM_CoMa

If UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.dtxDL == DTX then

DTX.

Else

it is valid CoMa for DL_BM

End if

Next step , fill the valid CoMa for long term filter.

}

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-6 SRS Covariance matrix Filter CoMa per UE in time domain (ID: 11154199)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `13450997`)

SRS Covariance matrix [Before CNI-157588-H]The Cov(H) and Cov(V) shall be filtered in time domain if they are valid (see 5G_L2_3947_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The IIR filter is define as below:

**rrmAvgCov = (1 - rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient) * rrmAvgCov + rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient * rrmInstCov**

where

- rrmAvgCov is the averaged covariance matrix with IIR filter;

- rrmInstCov is the instantaneous combined covariance matrix (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which are combined in 5G_L2_3948_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient is the filter coefficient. It shall be calculated as the value of **(SRS periodicity/rrmUlBeamSelectTimer). The **rrmUlBeamSelectTimer is the timer duration (5G_L2_4693_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), in unit of slot, for UL beam selection. The SRS periodicity is from the periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (5G_UP_ALG_2147_replaced([11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****

NOTE: When rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient is less than 1.0, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is less than or equal to **rrmNumOfCoMa (see 5G_UP_ALG_3886_replaced([11167293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktpR4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated as arithmetic average, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is higher than **rrmNumOfCoMa, the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated according to above IIR filter equation.****

[CNI-157588-H]
 Refer to [11156001](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
 [End CNI-157588-H]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX (ID: 11154211)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-1 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX First best UL beam selection (ID: 11154217)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13451127`)

Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX [CB015122-A]The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
 For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True see [13457584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hhi3DEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and for system level description see [11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

[End CB015122-A]

When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True with additional beam calculation is triggered ([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**below steps should be executed to obtain the first best UL beam for the UE:**

For 8RX using combined HV CoMa algorithm: When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, below steps should be executed to obtain the first best UL beam for the UE.

1: restart the timer of rrmUlBeamSelectTimer.

2: find the first best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hBest and vBest) according to 5G_L2_4043_replaced([11154276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlVfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3: if the configured UL beam set is 2D-DFT beams, the first best UL beam is the Kronecker product of hBest and vBest, otherwise, the first best UL beam is the mapped UL beam of the found 2D-DFT beam.

4: Reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforUL to initial value if it is necessary ,see 5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 1: rrmUlBeamSelectTimer:**it's a R&D parameter, rdUlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G_L2_4693_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Note 2: The mapping table is provided in PsCell_CellSetupReq message, see 5G_L2_3586_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 3: In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first (5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-2 Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX Second best UL beam selection (ID: 11154242)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.3.0-2.0-5**  (ID: `13451138`)

Beam selection for 2RX or 4RX [CB015122-A]The requirement applies only to actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False in PsCnfg_AddressDistributionReq (see [10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)). For actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to True, see [13457584](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku-Hhi3DEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) and [11154691](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).[End CB015122-A]

If the UL receiver type is 4RX **(5G_L2_16925_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), two best UL beams are needed for a UE.**

For 8RX using combined HV CoMa algorithm: below steps should be executed to obtain the second best UL beam for the UE.

When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired,**or additional beam calculation is triggered (refer 5G_L2_21708_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), below steps should be executed to get the second best UL beam for the UE after the first best UL beam for the UE has been got.**

1: find the second best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hSecondBest and vSecondBest) according to 5G_L2_4044_replaced([11154312](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2: if the configured UL beam set is 2D-DFT beams, the second best UL beam is the Kronecker product of hSecondBest and vSecondBest, otherwise, the second best UL beam is the mapped UL beam of the found 2D-DFT beam.

Note 1: rrmUlBeamSelectTimer:**it's a R&D parameter, rdUlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G_L2_4693_replaced([11187586](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

Note 2: The mapping table is provided in PsCell_CellSetupReq message, see 5G_L2_3586_replaced([11153915](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note 3: In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing is True, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first (5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4 Beam selection for 8RX (ID: 11154431)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa (ID: 11154437)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-1 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa First best and second best UL beam selection (ID: 11154443)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11154450`)

Find best beams with combined HV CoMa It is the same as 5GC001086. Refer to 5G_L2_4046_replaced([11154217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-S_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_20248_replaced([11154970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE3PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-2 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa Third best UL beam selection (ID: 11154456)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12585830`)

Find best beams with combined HV CoMa For third best UL beam selection refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20360_replaced([11154980](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB015692-A]

When 3rd/4th beam probing is enabled (see [12581649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)) 5G-L2-PS shall additionally evaluate the probing preconditions (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)). Depending on the outcome, 5G-L2-PS shall:

- select the third best beam or,
- execute the beam probing procedure (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)).

 [End CB015692-A]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-3 Find best beams with combined HV CoMa Fourth best UL beam selection (ID: 11154467)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12585863`)

Find best beams with combined HV CoMa For fourth best UL beam selection refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20359.

[CB015692-A]

When 3rd/4th beam probing is enabled (see [12581649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)) 5G-L2-PS shall additionally evaluate the probing preconditions (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)). Depending on the outcome, 5G-L2-PS shall:

- select the fourth best beam or,
- execute the beam probing procedure (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)).

 [End CB015692-A]

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa (ID: 11154477)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-1 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Find first best horizontal and first best vertical beam (ID: 11154483)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11154486`)

Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Calculate bestH and bestV. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20258_replaced([11155149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-2 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Find second best horizontal and second best vertical beam (ID: 11154492)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154498`)

Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Calculate secondHIndex and secondVIndex. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20263_replaced([11155183](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur7PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_20266_replaced([11155237](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-3 Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Four UL beam selection (ID: 11154503)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.4.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12586959`)

Find best beams with separated HV CoMa Get four beams based on bestH/bestV and secondHIndex/secondVIndex. Calculate beam power of four beams then select four best beams according to power. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20269_replaced([11155285](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB015692-A]

When 3rd/4th beam probing is enabled (see [12581649](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)) 5G-L2-PS shall evaluate the probing preconditions (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)). Depending on the outcome, 5G-L2-PS shall:

- select the 3rd and 4th best beams or,
- execute the beam probing procedure (see [12581542](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xh9NoDJTEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)).

 [End CB015692-A]

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5 Beam selection for 16RX (ID: 11154514)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-1 Beam selection for 16RX Overview (ID: 11154519)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11154531`)

Beam selection for 16RX 16Rx osDFT beam selection algorithm(combined or separated HV coma based beam selection) is decided by parameter rdosDFTBeamSelectionFor16RX (5G_UP_ALG_27370_replaced([11114136](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB010708-G]

Split panel beam selection algorithm(none or hybird split mode or UD split mode) is decided by parameter rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G_UP_ALG_29390_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[End CB010708-G]

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-2 Beam selection for 16RX Calculate eight UL beams (ID: 11154537)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154543`)

Beam selection for 16RX Combined HV coma based beam selection refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20247_replaced([11154965](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE2_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Separated HV coma based beam selection refer to 5G_UP_ALG_20257_replaced([11155127](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksur5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-3 Beam selection for 16RX Split panel beam selection (ID: 11154551)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.5.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11154557`)

Beam selection for 16RX If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G_UP_ALG_29390_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 0(none), eight beams shall be selected as 5G_L2_17768_replaced([11154537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240MbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G_UP_ALG_29390_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 1(hybrid split mode), fiive beams shall be selected as 5G_L2_17768_replaced([11154537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240MbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and real used beams are decided as 5G_UP_ALG_29246_replaced([11155345](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If rdUlSplitPanelModeFor16RX (5G_UP_ALG_29390_replaced([11114144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpiN8vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to 2(UD split mode), four beams shall be selected as 5G_L2_17768_replaced([11154537](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240MbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and real used beams are decided as 5G_UP_ALG_29280_replaced([11155374](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX (ID: 12580839)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-1 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Overview (ID: 12581542)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12581541`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX When:

- The SRS BM UL beam probing for 3rd/4th beam is configured in the cell context, see [12581649: Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ),
- Four beams are proposed according to SRS based BM algorithm, see [11154431: Beam selection for 8RX](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlWfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
- Probing preconditions [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11155522: Flowchart: NumberSlotsProbingDecision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6BfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) are met,

 5G-L2-PS shall execute the beam probing procedure for the given UE context, as specified in requirements:

- [11155488: Probing Procedure Step 1: Measurement of the changed 3 rd and/or 4 th UL beams](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6AfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
- [11155507: Probing Procedure Step 2: Probing decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6A_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
- [11155531: Flowchart: One Slot Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6B_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)
- [11155543: Flowchart: Two Slots Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksv6CfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

 The above specification is supplemented by additional requirements in the current section:

- [12581649: Configuration](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ)
- [12584038: Beam probing state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZKaxIDS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg)
- [12584035: States definition](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SotXoTS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
- [12584154: State transition table](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9v-G2jS9EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
- [12584163: Events impacting the state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-2 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Configuration (ID: 12581649)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `13471990`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX When cell context is created or reconfigured then 5G-L2-PS shall determine the activation status of the SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing based on:

- actProbingUlSrsBeams parameter (see [10969099: Fr1AggregatedSet structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaoPPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), or [10971535: ulSrsBmReConfig structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Uoqq_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and
- [11187586: rdUlBeamSelectTimer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28CfgfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) value

 [CB015692-B] Furthermore, when cell context is online reconfigured to disabled SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall gracefully finish any ongoing probing procedures.[End CB015692-B]

See [11155438: Overview: Third and Fourth Beam probing of 8RX IRC receiver](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) for details.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-3 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Load Control (ID: 13479161)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13479737`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX When 5G-L2-PS instance goes into overload state, and the severity metric load reaches or exceeds the threshold defined in rd8RxSrsUlBmBeamProbingDeactOlcUlPerCent (see [12627247](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_YuNJAzrLEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ)), then:

- the instance shall gracefully finish any ongoing probing procedures,
- any new probings shall be deactivated.

 When 5G-L2-PS instance leaves the overload state, and the severity metric load goes below the threshold defined in rd8RxSrsUlBmBeamProbingDeactOlcUlPerCent (see [12627247](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_YuNJAzrLEfCYiuaHdt7wgQ)), then the instance shall activate the SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Beam probing state machine (ID: 12584038)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-1 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX States definition (ID: 12584035)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12584146`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX 5G-L2-PS shall maintain UE UL SRS 3rd/4th beam probing logical states:

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Beam Probing state | Description |
| ProbingNotStarted | The beam probing procedure has not started or has ended (procedure is not running) |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling | One slot beam probing procedure started. Waiting for UE UL scheduling with probed beam (3rd or 4th) |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback | One slot probing, waiting for PUSCH feedback (UlData_PuschReceiveResp) for probed beam (3rd or 4th) |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll | Two slot probing procedure started. Procedure waits for UE UL two consecutive scheduling decisions with probed beams (3rd, 4th) |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | Procedure waits for all PUSCH feedbacks (UlData_PuschReceiveResp) for both probed beams (3rd and 4th) |

Note: The state names and enumeration shown above define the logical/procedural states and their expected behavior. The implementation may use different internal state names, a different number of internal states, or alternative structuring (e.g., substates/flags), provided the externally observable behavior and handling implied by these logical states is preserved.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-2 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX State transition table (ID: 12584154)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12584155`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX 5G-L2-PS shall follow the state transitions for UE SRS BM UL 3rd/4th beam probing state machine:

| | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Initial State | Event | Condition | End State |
| ProbingNotStarted | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions not achieved | ProbingNotStarted |
| ProbingNotStarted | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, one slot probing selected | OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling |
| ProbingNotStarted | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, two slot probing selected | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling | PuschScheduling | UE PUSCH scheduled with probed beam Note: The probed beam can be used when UE is not in UL beam fallback state or UE is not MU MIMO paired | OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback | PuschFeedbackReceived | PUSCH feedback (UlData_PuschReceiveResp) received for probed beam | ProbingNotStarted |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll | PuschScheduling | All (two) UE PUSCH scheduled with probed beams (first PUSCH with 3rd beam, second PUSCH with 4th beam) Note: The probed beam can be used when UE is not in UL beam fallback state or UE is not MU MIMO paired | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll | PuschFeedbackReceived | | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll |
| TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | PuschFeedbackReceived | All (two) PUSCH feedbacks (UlData_PuschReceiveResp) received for probed beams | ProbingNotStarted |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions not achieved | ProbingNotStarted |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, one slot probing selected | OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | Probing preconditions achieved, two slot probing selected | TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll |
| OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedback, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschSchedulingAll, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschFeedbackAll | SRSBmStateAged | | ProbingNotStarted |

See [12584163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg) for events description. See [12584035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_SotXoTS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) for states description.

Note: There is no explicit timeout mechanism - the timeout is implicitly guaranteed by either NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection or SRSBmStateAged events, which are triggered based on SRS BM timers, see [11153925: State machine and message flow](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-3 Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Events impacting the state machine (ID: 12584163)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.6.0-4.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12584164`)

Beam probing for SRS BM 8RX Definition of events impacting the state machine

               [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqac_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqadvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Event | Description |
| NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection | A new set of SRS based beams was selected from SRS UL BM. See 11154035: State Machine for Ul BM. |
| PuschScheduling | UE UL transmission was successfully scheduled (DlData_PdcchSendReq and UlData_PuschReceiveReq will be send) |
| PuschFeedbackReceived | Response (UlData_PuschReceiveResp) received for UlData_PuschReceiveReq containing the probed beam patternId |
| SRSBmStateAged | SRS BM state machine entered aged state and rrmExtendOdftTimer is not running (see 11154054: State of SRS_UL_BM_AGED) |

Note: The event identifiers listed below are logical triggers that impact the state machine. The source code may use different internal event names, merge/split events, or realize these triggers via different mechanisms (e.g., function calls, signals, timers, or flags), provided the behavior described is preserved.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.7 Beam selection for beam management in L1 DU (ID: 13457584)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.2.7.0-1 Beam selection for beam management in L1 DU Overview (ID: 13482897)

**2.4.3.3.3.2.7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13457586`)

Beam selection for beam management in L1 DU When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True (see [11154217](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-S_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), and if 5G-L2-PS is in the SRS_UL_BM_VALID ([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or SRS_UL_BM_CHGED ([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) state, then:

- When the rrmUlBeamSelectTimer expires (see [11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) or [11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall send UlData_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveReq ([13456641](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BcHH0C0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) to 5G-L1-DU and for all impacted UEs set related IEs according to [13456643](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_LTFM8i0IEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).
- When 5G-L2-PS receives UlData_SrsBeamCalcUlReceiveResp ([13456597](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_QYo1sy0BEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) from 5G-L1-DU, then it shall store and use beam data for UE scheduling in subsequent UlData_PuschReceiveReq ([11179052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27DoHPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) and UlData_SrsReceiveReq ([11180683](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27OALvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) messages and for MU-MIMO management ([11164814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25vZe_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).
- Validation of instantenous CoMa is done according to [11154046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3 Periodic antenna switching SRS based beam management for DL (ID: 11154564)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.0-1 Periodic antenna switching SRS based beam management for DL Configuration (ID: 11154569)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11154576`)

Periodic antenna switching SRS based beam management for DL [CNI-80481]At reception of Cell setup message, 5G-L2-PS shall check if downplink SRS based beam management is enabled or not.

If actDlSrsBm in bfSetup structure (see 5G_L2_IF_115_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of PsCell_CellSetupReq (see 5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is true:

5G-L2-PS shall apply periodic codebook SRS based downlink beam management for UEs which are configured with periodic SRS resources with usage as "AntennaSwitching" or "codebook" if rdfallbackCodebook is true.

5G-L2-PS shall store corresponding dftBeamSet identified by dftBeamSetId in dlSrsBmConfig, which includes the horizontal DFT beams according to dftBeamWeightH, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH, and vertical DFT beams according to dftBeamWeightV, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmV. The 2D-DFT beams are Kronecker product of horizontal and vertical DFT beams. NOTE: The DFT beams are used by DL beam selection algorithm (see 5G_L2_6564_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

5G-L2-PS shall calculate correlations between each horizontal DFT beams and store to a lookup table. 5G-L2-PS shall also calculate correlations between each vertical DFT beams and store to a lookup table. NOTE: The lookup tables are used to speed up the second-best DFT beam selection process by directly getting the correlation of two DFT beams from these tables (See 5G_L2_6663_replaced([11154908](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

5G-L2-PS shall store the start pattern id of 2D-DFT beams (dftBeamStartPatternId). The pattern id of an 2D-DFT beam (dftBeamPatternId) identified by corresponding dftBeamIndexH, dftBeamIndexV can be calculated as:

dftBeamPatternId = dftBeamStartPatternId + numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH * dftBeamIndexV + dftBeamIndexH.

NOTE:

1. The parameters dftBeamSetId, isDftBeamsetConf are the IEs of ulSrsBmConfig in bfSetup structure.

2. The dftBeamSet is one element of dftBeamSetList in bfSetup structure, which has unique dftBeamSetId and includes dftBeamWeightH, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmH, dftBeamWeightV, numOfDftBeamForUlSrsBmV, dftBeamStartPatternId IEs.

[CNI-86083]3. The parameter srsTypeAllocForDlBm is the IEs of DlSrsBmConfig in bfSetup structure.[End CNI-86083][END CNI-80481]

---

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).1. 5G-L2-PS sends UlData_PrachReceiveReq message with PRACH time and frequency positions. 2. The 5G-L1-UL sends the list of detected random access preambles to 5G-L2-PS in UlData_PrachReceiveInd message. 3. 5G-L2-PS retrieves SS Block Index from PRACH time occasion and PRACH frequency occasion, see 5G_UP_ALG_1955_replaced([11111881](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpRIM_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and deduce beam ID from SS block index, see 5G_UP_ALG_11982_replaced([11111700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpP6FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 4. 5G-L2-PS sets state to SRS_DL_BM_AGED for this UE after random access procedure and periodic SRS resource is configured, see 5G_L2_5784_replaced([11243343](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3BwF_PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 5. 5G-L2-PS shall maintain beam by beam tracking and beam refinement in SRS_DL_BM_AGED state, see 5G_UP_ALG_1987_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2017_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 6. 5G-L2-PS sends UlData_SrsReceiveReq(5G_L1_IF_241_replaced([11514379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR3PZPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and receives UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G_L1_IF_257_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from 5G-L1-UL. 7. After 5G-L2-PS continuously receives rrmNumOfCoMa valid CoMa reports from L1 via message UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G_L1_257_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), state is switched to SRS_DL_BM_VALID, see 5G_L2_xxxx. 8. After rrmDlBeamSelectTimer(5G_L2_xxxx) expires, [CB013710-A] or in case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true with addtional beam calculation is triggered (5G_L2_21708_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) ,[End CB013710-A] 5G-L2-PS select DL beams according to beam selection algorithm defined in 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [CB013710-A] In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB013710-A] 9. When rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G_L2_5339_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires in SRS_DL_BM_VALID state, switch to SRS_DL_BM_AGED, see 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 10. 5G-L2-PS sends pattern ID to L1 in DlData_PdschSendReq /DlData_PdcchSendReq/DlData_CsiRsSendReq messages.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-2 State machine and message flow SRS_DL_BM_AGED state (ID: 11154615)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11154621`)

State machine and message flow [CNI-80481]The DL state machine starts in this state. After random access procedure or rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G_L2_5339_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) expires, UE enters this state.

The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS_DL_BM_AGED state:

DL beams shall be selected based on beam reports from UE(see 5G_UP_ALG_1987_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2017_replaced([11112151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

SRS_DL_BM_AGED Entry Procedure:

Stop the rrmCoMaAgedTimer(see 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Stop the rrmDlBeamSelectTimer (see 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Clear the rrmDlAvgCov (set to 0) (see 5G_L2_6572_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Reset validCoMaCount to 0;

If (a valid CoMa is recevied, see 5G_L2_6571_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Update rrmDlAvgCov , see 5G_L2_6572_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

validCoMaCount++;

If(validCoMaCount == rrmNumOfCoMa)

Switch to SRS_DL_BM_VALID state;

Execute SRS_DL_BM_VALID Entry Procedure(see 5G_L2_5341_replaced([11153992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwLPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

Note:

rrmNumOfCoMa: Default value is 3

rrmDlBeamSelectTimer: It's R&D parameter, rdDlBeamSelectTimer, see 5G_L2_5821_replaced([11183859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nBt_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

rrmCoMaAgedTimer: It's calculated from rrmCoMaAgedTimer and SRS periodicity, where rrmCoMaAgedTimer is R&D parameter, rdDlCoMaAgedCycle

defined in 5G_L2_5831_replaced([11183845](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27matPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) AND SRS periodicity is from periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (5G_UP_ALG_2147_replaced([11154174](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksrBi_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).[END CNI-80481]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-3 State machine and message flow SRS_DL_BM_VALID state (ID: 11154626)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.1.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12629650`)

State machine and message flow The following pseudo-code represents the basic rules of processing in the SRS_DL_BM_VALID state:

**SRS_DL_BM_VALID Entry Procedure:**

start/restart *rrmDlBeamSelectTimer**;***

**start/restart *rrmCoMaAgedTimer**;*****

**Update set/reset **hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL status if it is necessary(5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));****

**Execute **the DL beams selection algorithms defined in 5G_L2_6564_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).****

If (a valid CoMa is recevied, see 5G_L2_6571_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

update *rrmDlAvgCov (5G_L2_6572_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));*

restart the *rrmCoMaAgedTimer(5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));*

update hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL to true if it is necessary (5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

If (*rrmDlBeamSelectTimer expires) or addtional beam calculation is triggered(5G_L2_21708_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))*

Execute the DL beams selection algorithms defined in 5G_L2_6564_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Restart the *rrmDlBeamSelectTimer**;***

**Reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL to false if it is necessary (5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).**

If (*rrmCoMaAgedTimer *expires)**

Switch to **SRS_DL_BM_AGED state;**

Execute **SRS_DL_BM_AGED Entry Procedure, see 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));**

Note: In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [CB014005-A] (If it is the first DL beams selection opportunity after cell's beam update recorded in [12582669: Handling of cell down tilt change](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0nFmoTSEEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), skip this check and execute the DL beams selection algorithms directly once DFT beam correlation calculation in [12584322: Handling of DFT beam weight when cell down tilt change](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BW15tjUoEfCKaNlcHOQWmg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) is done, according to [11155701: State of SRS_DL_BM_VALID](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksxIJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)).[End CB014005-A]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2 SRS Covariance matrix (ID: 11154646)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-1 SRS Covariance matrix Process covariance matrices (ID: 11154651)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11154664`)

SRS Covariance matrix When 5G-L2-PS receives covariance matrices from L1 via message UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (5G_L1_257_replaced([11483775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fDtHvPvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall process and store matrices according to the below steps. See 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 6302 about the state machine for Dl BM.

The calculation and maintenance of the covariance matrices shall be implemented in a separate thread or process to decouple it from the normal scheduler process

1. Read covariance matrices of related UE(s) from L1 via message UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

 a. The number of covariance matrices per UE is defined in 5G_L2_6567_replaced([11154669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241agvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b. The size of covariance matrix is defined in 5G_L2_6568_replaced([11154679](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ahvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. Calculate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G_L2_6570_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2. Validate Cov(H) and Cov(V) per UE (see 5G_L2_6568_replaced([11154679](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ahvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_6571_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

3. If all required SRS resources in set been received in one SRS period

If Cov(H) and Cov(V) are valid:

a. Average them via the IIR filter defined in 5G_L2_6572_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b. Store averaged Cov(H) and Cov(V) in UE’s context.

Else:

a. Discard Cov(H) and Cov(V) of UE which are reported by L1 via message UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

Note: If actEcpri72e is set to [Before CB009514-L] other value than ‘disabled’ [CB009514-L] TRUE [End CB009514-L], the above step 2 and 3 shall be switched, 5G-L2-PS shall validate per port firstly, then average the Cov over ports. actEcpri72e is NIDD parameter received in L2PS_CellSetupReq.

---

The validation method is the same as 5G_UP_ALG_2164_replaced([11154500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note per port average or all port average does not need to change the DTX threshold.

If all the ports of the SRS resource set are DTX, then consider coveriance matrices for this UE is DTX this time.

Note2, when enableSbSrsVolatilityCheck or rdIncludeSrsVolatilityStatusMetric is set to true, subband SRS (Note subband SRS means WB BF SRS, because supporting SB SRS for SB BF , for habitual understanding the rewording of name is not done ) CoMa

correlation shall be calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_22742_replaced([11157172](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks6SFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then per port validation shall be executed in addition to per resource validation. The enableSbSrsVolatilityCheck is NIDD parameter received in L2PS_CellSetupReq.

actEcpri72e is NIDD parameter received in L2PS_CellSetupReq.

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-6 SRS Covariance matrix Filter CoMa per UE in time domain (ID: 11154853)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11154859`)

SRS Covariance matrix [CNI-80481]The Cov(H) and Cov(V) shall be filtered in time domain if they are valid (see 5G_L2_6571_replaced([11154690](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241aiPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). The IIR filter is define as below:

rrmDlAvgCov = (1 - rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient) * rrmDlAvgCov + rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient * rrmDlInstCov

where

- rrmDlAvgCov is the averaged covariance matrix with IIR filter;

- rrmDlInstCov is the instantaneous combined covariance matrix (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which are combined in 5G_L2_6570_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

- rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient is the filter coefficient. It shall be calculated as the value of (SRS periodicity/rrmDlBeamSelectTimer). The rrmDlBeamSelectTimer is the timer duration,a R&D parameter (5G_L2_xxxx), in unit of slot, for beam selection. The SRS periodicity is from the periodicityAndOffset in SRS configuration (5G_L2_6298_replaced([11154569](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note: the following condition shall be considered during the the above step:

If rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient < 1.0 or the number of to-be-averaged CoMa =< to rrmNumOfCoMa (see 5G_L2_6301_replaced([11154615](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zePvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

the rrmDlAvgCov shall be calculated as arithmetic average,

if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa > rrmNumOfCoMa,

the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated according to above IIR filter equation.

High important note: one CoMa here refers to combined covariance matrix (Cov(H) and Cov(V)) which are combined in 5G_L2_6570_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).[END CNI-80481]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-7 SRS Covariance matrix osDFT BF SRS Power calculation (ID: 11154865)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `12428560`)

SRS Covariance matrix In eCPRI7-2a(5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

The osDFT BF SRS power is estimated based on Filter CoMa. The Power estimation can refer 5G_L2_3947_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) step1.

In eCPRI7-2e(5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

L1 will validate osDFT BF SRS's CoMa based on related threshold by itself (refer 5G_L2_3947_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L1_15792_replaced([11469665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fB2tlfvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), also L1 will report related SRS power to L2 (refer 5G_L1_IF_257_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

L2-PS shall calculate the osDFT beam SRS's power based on below steps.(This is to align with eCPRI7-2a CoMa updating steps.)

Step1: Instant per port SRS power validation and calculation across two polarizations.

Validate the CoMa DTX result ( refer 5G_L1_IF_257_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), dtxdl for DL BM)

IF DTX = nonDTX, then CoMa is valid, it will be the input for IIR filter (5G_L2_2947_replaced([11160685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25WX6vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

Then SRS power's across Polarization averaging and validation shall be done to align with L1's algorithem , refer 5G_L1_15792_replaced([11469665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_fB2tlfvvEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

IF srsPowerdBm, +45 >= *srsPowerThresholdForDl *AND srsPowerdBm, -45 >= *srsPowerThresholdForDl :***

- rrmInstsrsPower = (srsPower +45 + srsPower -45)/2

ELSE

- rrmInstsrsPower = MAX (srsPower +45 , srsPower -45)

[CB010630-D]

in DL direction and

IF srsPowerdBm, +45 >= srsPowerThresholdForUl AND srsPowerdBm, -45 >= srsPowerThresholdForUl :

- rrmInstsrsPower= (srsPower +45 + srsPower -45)/2

ELSE

- rrmInstsrsPower= MAX (srsPower +45 , srsPower -45)

in UL direction shall be evaluated.

[End CB010630-D]

ELSE DTX = DTX, then CoMa is invalid, then L2 will discard this time's SRS power updating and it will not be used for IIR filter.

Step2: Instant SRS Power cross Ports per SrsReceiveRespBmPs

In case of one port per response

rrmInstsrsPower_Port= rrmInstsrsPower(in step1)

In case of two ports per response

IF Two Ports's SRS power are both valid

- rrmInstsrsPower_Port(i)=(rrmInstsrsPower port-1 + rrmInstsrsPower port-2)/2

numPorts+2

Else IF only one port is valid

- rmInstsrsPower_port()=rmInstsrsPower with valid Port.

numPorts+1

Else no valid Port power, discarding this time's SRS power updating.

Step3, Instant SRS Power Per UE (across all Ports).

To align with Combine covariance matrices per UE (5G_L2_6570_replaced([11154821](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241ajvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , instant SRS power shall be averaged cross all Ports.

rrmInstsrsPower_UE= SUM[rmInstsrsPower_port(i)]/(numPorts)

where numPorts is the number ports for received covariance matrixes.

[CB010630-D]

Based on the rrmInstsrsPower_UE , POWER_TAS_SRS_WB_BF_LEVEL and POWER_CDBK_SRS_WB_BF_LEVEL counter shall be updated.

The average power in UL is used for counter updation and not used for IIR filter.

[End CB010630-D]

Step4, IIR filter of srsPower_UE in time domain.

rrmAvgsrsPower = (1 - rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient) * rrmAvgsrsPower + rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient * rrmInstsrsPower_UE

Where

- rrmAvgsrsPower is the averaged SRS power with IIR filter.

-rrmInstsrsPower is the instantaneous SRS power of valid SRS power per UE per SrsReceiveRespBmPs.

Notes:

1, osDFT beam is also called WB BF.

2, L2-Ps shall convert dbm to linear first before averaging.

3, The srsPowerThresholdForDl for DL osDFT BF. and get from Pcell_CellSetupReq -> srsPowerThresholdForDlBm.

4, To align with SRS CoMa time domain average, When rrmCoMaFilterCoefficient is less than 1.0, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is less than or equal to rrmNumOfCoMa (see 5G_UP_ALG_3886_replaced([11167293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktpR4fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the rrmAvgsrsPower shall be calculated as arithmetic average, if the number of to-be-averaged CoMa is higher than rrmNumOfCoMa, the rrmAvgCov shall be calculated according to above IIR filter equation.

Note: SW implementation is not following this EFS exactly, cross port averaging in step2 is skipped. But averging cross SRS resources doesn' impact the correction of estimated SRS power.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-8 SRS Covariance matrix Power estimation of SRS for SB BF (ID: 11154877)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11154882`)

SRS Covariance matrix If actDlSrsSubbandBm = TRUE, 5G_L2_PS shall monitor radio link quality (5G_UP_ALG_21355_replaced([11157389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , the SRS power is one factor. For UEs under WB_BF_CONF (5G_UP_ALG_21334_replaced([11156985](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5D9vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or SB_BF_CONF (5G_UP_ALG_21336_replaced([11157009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5D-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G_L2_PS shall calculate the SRS power , detail Alg refer 5G_UP_ALG_21401_replaced([11157103](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5rCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In eCPRI7-2a (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), 5G_L2_PS shall calculate the SRS power based on averaged CoMa.

[CB009527-A] In eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the SRS power based on CoMa is measured by L1, and report to 5G_L2_PS by ULData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs in unit of dbm, 5G_L2_PS shall convert to linnear before IIR filtering, refer 5G_UP_ALG_27600_replaced([11154591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2tvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L2_21433_replaced([11154865](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BkPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB009527-A]

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3 Beam Selection for Dl (ID: 11154888)

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-1 Beam Selection for Dl First best DL beam selection (ID: 11154893)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11154902`)

Beam Selection for Dl When the rrmDlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, [CB013710-A] or additional beam calculation is triggered(refer 5G_L2_21708_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB013710-A], the below steps shall be executed:

a. Restart the timer of rrmDlBeamSelectTimer.

b. Calculate the best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hBest and vBest) according to 5G_L2_6664_replaced([11154923](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242Bm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

c. The best DL beam is the Kronecker product of DFT beams vBest and hBest.

[CB013710-A]

d. Reset hasValidCoMaUpdatedforDL to false if it is necessary, see 5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB013710-A]

Note:

1.rrmDlBeamSelectTimer:It's a R&d parameter and it shall be maintained per UE per SRS resource set. Its slot duration shall be defined as R&D parameter(default value is 200 slot. It shall be not be smaller than SRS periodicity in slot so rrmDlCoMaFilterCoefficient in 5G_L2_6572_replaced([11154853](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_241akPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) will not be larger than 1).

[CB013710-A]2. In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB013710-A].

Note: the calculation of best Dl beams shall be implemented in a parallel thread or process such as to decouple it form the normal scheduler process.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-2 Beam Selection for Dl Second best DL beam selection (ID: 11154908)

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11154918`)

Beam Selection for Dl When rrmDlBeamSelectTimer of a UE is expired, [CB013710-A] Or addtional beam calculation is triggered(refer 5G_L2_21708_replaced([11155592](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r__vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB013710-A]below steps shall be executed to obtain the second best DL beam for the UE after the first best DL beam for the UE has been got.

a. calculate the second best horizontal and vertical DFT beams (hSecondBest and vSecondBest) according to 5G_L2_6665_replaced([11154934](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BnfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b. if the second best 2D-DFT beam is found in the configured DL beam set, the second best DL beam will be the Kronecker product of vSecondBest and hSecondBest.

Note:

rrmDlBeamSelectTimer: It's a R&D paramer, see 5G_L2_5821_replaced([11183859](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27nBt_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB013710-A]In case of actRedPeriodicSrsProcessing=true, execution of beam calculation condition shall be checked first(5G_L2_21704_replaced([11155582](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB013710-A]

---

**2.4.3.3.3.3.3.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11154929`)

Beam Selection for Dl [CNI-80481]See the algorithm in 5G_L2_4043_replaced([11154276](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24zlVfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for calculating the best 2D-DFT Dl beam the same as Calculate the best 2D-DFT Ul beam [END CNI-80481]

If the second best beam is not to be used due to power unbalancedness between best beam, then  For PDSCH o If only one best beam is needed, then the best SRS beam shall be adopted. o else if two beams are needed, if dlMimoMode is "CL 4x4 or 4x2 MIMO" or "OL 4x4 or 4x2 MIMO" the two beams shall be SSB/refined beams defined in 5G_L2_3581_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)); If dlMimoMode is "CL 8x4 MIMO" the two beams shall be PMI /SSB/Refined beams defined in 5G_L2_3581_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for UEs with 8 ports cell specific CSI-RS and SSB/refined beams defined in 5G_L2_3581_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for UEs with 4 ports UE specific CSI-RS. Note that this may lead to PDSCH and PDCCH using different beams.  For UE specific CSI-RS o The two beams for 4 port CSI-RS shall be SSB/refined beams defined in 5G_L2_3581_replaced([11153572](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT4_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));[END CNI-80481]
