#### 2.4.3.3.4 Beam selection for physical channels (ID: 11155617)
##### 2.4.3.3.4.0-1 Beam selection for physical channels Overview (ID: 11155622)

**2.4.3.3.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11155626`)

Beam selection for physical channels In each slot, 5G-L2-PS shall select corresponding beams represented by patternId for physical channels on this slot. PatternId is a 16 bit index for a specific beamforming weight vector. The selected patternIds shall be indicated to 5G-L1-DL by 5G_L2_482_replaced([11155914](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248INfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For Analog Beamforming, the beams shall be decided for each symbol on all carriers of this cell group.

For Digital Beamforming (FR1 only), the beams shall be decided for each scheduled UE or configured resource of corresponding DL/UL channels. Please note, in case of TD Beamforming, there is only one beam per symbol per stream per subcell (see 5G_UP_ALG_10617_replaced([11179139](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku4A9_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_10697_replaced([11199387](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwM2rvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.1 Analog Beamforming (ID: 11155632)

##### 2.4.3.3.4.1.0-1 Analog Beamforming DL channels (ID: 11155638)

**2.4.3.3.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11155642`)

Analog Beamforming  5G-L2-PS shall select the configured SSB beam of corresponding SSB index for SSB symbols (see 5G_UP_ALG_2329_replaced([11114748](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpnthvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 5G-L2-PS shall select the configured beam for TRS symbols with corresponding TRS resource (see 5G_UP_ALG_3583_replaced([11159730](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktLX3fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 5G-L2-PS shall select the configured beam for CSI-RS symbols with corresponding cell-specific CSI-RS for beam management resources (see 5G_UP_ALG_21843_replaced([11159700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktLX1_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 5G-L2-PS shall select the determined SSB beam of corresponding UE (see 5G_UP_ALG_2031_replaced([11112294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpUyl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G_L2_9544_replaced([11155775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_247hIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for CSI-RS symbols with those UE specific CSI-RS for channel measurement resources.

 5G-L2-PS shall select the determined X-pol beams of the DL scheduling slot (see 5G_UP_ALG_4250_replaced([11175627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuke9_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for those PDCCH symbols with DL grants, and also for those PDSCH symbols on same DL slot.

 5G-L2-PS shall select the determined X-pol beam of the corresponding UL scheduling slot (see 5G_UP_ALG_4865_replaced([11196363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCelPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for PDCCH symbols with UL grants.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.1.0-2 Analog Beamforming UL Channels (ID: 11155647)

**2.4.3.3.4.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11155653`)

Analog Beamforming  5G-L2-PS shall select the SSB beam of mapped SSB index for PRACH symbols with related PRACH transmission occasion (see 5G_UP_ALG_2339_replaced([11114812](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpoUmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 5G-L2-PS shall select the determined SSB beam of corresponding UE for PUCCH symbols with SR, ACK/NACK, or CSI report resources (see 5G_UP_ALG_2031_replaced([11112294](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpUyl_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G_L2_9544_replaced([11155775](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_247hIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 5G-L2-PS shall select the determined X-pol beam of the UL scheduling slot (5G_UP_ALG_4865_replaced([11196363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCelPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for PUSCH symbols on same UL scheduling slot.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2 Digital Beamforming (ID: 11155658)

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.0-1 Digital Beamforming DL/UL Beam Usage (ID: 13312720)

**2.4.3.3.4.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12825307`)

Digital Beamforming If FDD with actBeamforming = TRUE, beam usage is as per is as per [12823081: Beam usage for UL](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GGTJ4KpBEfCrANRYxAlR5A?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9);

otherwise in this REQ [11155658: Digital Beamforming](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_246TDfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.1 DL Channels (ID: 11155663)

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.1.0-1 DL Channels PDCCH (ID: 11155668)

**2.4.3.3.4.2.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `12537034`)

DL Channels For each UE, the PDCCH beam shall be selected separately:

 The PDCCH beam is firstly determined by selected initial beam from PRACH (see 5G_L2_8569_replaced([11153505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24us1vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 If rdDisableBestSrsBeamForPdcch (see 5G_UP_ALG_14772_replaced([11114093](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kphm4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is false, and actDlSrsBm is true and state machine for codebook SRS based DL beam management isn't SRS_DL_BM_AGED (see 5G_L2_6711_replaced([11154583](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the selected best beam using SRS covariance matrix (see 5G_L2_6564_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) should be use for PDCCH transmission.

 [Before CNI-137616-C]Else if rdDisableBestPmiBeamForPdcch (see 5G_UP_ALG_8458_replaced([11113959](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpfxvvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is false, and UE is in ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4 MIMO mode, and CSI feedback is not outdated (See 5G_L2_4072_replaced([11155155](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243Pu_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the 1st beam of selected PMI beams (see 5G_L2_4068_replaced([11155170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PvfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) should be use for PDCCH transmission.[End CNI-137616-C]

 Else the PDCCH beam shall be selected based on beam reports from UE (see 5G_UP_ALG_1987_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.1.0-2 DL Channels PDSCH (ID: 11155681)

**2.4.3.3.4.2.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11155685`)

DL Channels For each UE, the PDSCH beam shall be selected separately:

 The PDSCH beam is firstly determined by selected initial beam from PRACH (see 5G_L2_8569_replaced([11153505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24us1vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 If actDlSrsBm is true and state machine for codebook SRS based DL beam management isn't SRS_DL_BM_AGED (see 5G_L2_6711_replaced([11154583](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_240zdPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the selected beams using SRS covariance matrix (see 5G_L2_6564_replaced([11154888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242BlPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) should be use for PDSCH transmission.

 Else if UE is in ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4 MIMO mode, and CSI feedback is not outdated (See 5G_L2_4072_replaced([11155155](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243Pu_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the selected PMI beams (see 5G_L2_4068_replaced([11155170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_243PvfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) should be use for PDSCH transmission.

 Else the PDSCH beam shall be selected based on beam reports from UE (see 5G_UP_ALG_1987_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.2 UL Channels (ID: 11155690)

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.2.0-1 UL Channels PUSCH (ID: 11155694)

**2.4.3.3.4.2.2.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `12618991`)

UL Channels PUSCH beam is firstly determined by initial beam selection from PRACH, see 5G_L2_8569_replaced([11153505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24us1vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If actUlSrsBm is true and state machine for codebook SRS based UL beam management isn't SRS_UL_BM_AGED, see 5G_L2_5339_replaced([11153981](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xwKvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), beams which are decided using SRS covariance matrix by 5G_L2_3589_replaced([11154211](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-SvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be: [Before CB015692-A] should be applied for PUSCH transmission. [CB015692-A]

- If SRS BM 3rd/4th beam probing is [enabled](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_INefIDJbEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ) and PUSCH = 8RX, the 1st and 2nd beams shall be applied for PUSCH transmissions. 3rd and 4th beam shall be applied according to 3rd/4th beam probing, see [12580839: Beam probing for 8RX](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_M08itDIdEfCfjdcwDn2YOQ),
- Otherwise all beams shall be applied for PUSCH transmissions.

 [End CB015692-A]

TCI MAC CE shall not be triggered for beam update.

If actUlSrsBm is false or state machine for codebook based UL beam management is SRS_UL_BM_AGED, UL beams selected based on beam reports from UE, see 5G_UP_ALG_1987_replaced([11112050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpSWY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), shall be applied for PUSCH transmission.

Four UL beams shall be used for PUSCH/SRS for PUSCH 8RX. os-DFT beam or SSB beam combined with high correlation beam/sector beam will be used. See the following table for PUSCH usage (5G_UP_ALG_2032_replaced([11112298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpUymPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

              **** **** **** **** [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpcHU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) **[](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksuE0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)** [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpcHU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

| | | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Scenario | SRS Coma | | beam valid | PUSCH Beam Usage | |
| PUSCH = 8RX PUCCH = 8RX | Valid | | / | 4 os-DFT beams | |
| Invalid | | 2 SSB beams | a1 + a2 + b1 + b2 | | |
| 2 refine beams | a + ax + b + bx | | | | |
| 1 SSB beam | A + A1 + 2 half sector beam or a-1 + a-2 + a-3 + a-4 according to 5G_UP_ALG_26331_replaced(11113585) (1 beam valid) | | | | |
| 1 refine beam | a-1 + a-2 + a-3 + a-4 | | | | |
| PUSCH = 8RX PUCCH = 4RX | Same as above | | | | |
| PUSCH = 16RX | Valid | / | | | 8 os-DFT beamsor os-DFT beams with subpanel beams(5G_UP_ALG_20242_replaced(11154912)) |
| Invalid | 2 SSB beams | | | a-1 + a-2 + a-3 + a-4 + b-1 + b-2 + b-3 + b-4 | |
| 1 SSB beam or 2 same SSB beams | | | A + A1 + 2 half sector beam or a-1 + a-2 + a-3 + a-4 or a1 + a2 + b1 + b2 according to 5G_UP_ALG_26331_replaced(11113585) (1 beam valid) | | |
| | | | | | |

Note:

the concept of “PUSCH=8RX”or “PUSCH=16RX” is described in 5G_L2_12903_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

A/B is UE reported SSB coarse beam.

High correlation beam A1 and B1 is the highest correlation beam of A/B informed by CPlane during cellsetup.

a1/a2 are high correlation refine beam of A and b1/b2 are high correlation refine beam of B informed by CPlane in ulRefinementCorrelatedBeamSet during cellsetup.

a/b are UE reported refine beams.

a1/b1 are first high correlation refine beam of a/b informed by CPlane in ulRefinementCorrelatedBeamSet during cellsetup. a2/b2 are second high correlation refine beam of a/b informed by CPlane in ulRefinementCorrelatedBeamSet during cellsetup.

If a1 != b, ax = a1; else, ax = a2.

If b1 != a and b1 != ax, bx = b1; else if b2 != a and b2 != ax, bx = b2; else “a-1 + a-2 + a-3 + a-4” shall be used.

a-1/a-2/a-3/a-4 are four refine beams of the related SSB beam of the refine beam a. For example, ony 1 refine beam(beamId = 8) valid. The related SSB of this beam(8) is 0. And four refine beams of this SSB beam(0) are 8/16/24/32. So a-1/a-2/a-3/a-4 in this case are 8/16/24/32.

When target SSB beam changes, a TCI State Indication for UE-specific PDCCH MAC CE shall be sent. After TCI MAC CE is HARQ ACKed or finally HARQ NACKED, the timing refer to 5G_UP_ALG_29442_replaced([11112392](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and if appliedUlBeamFallback == TRUE, PUSCH beam probing should be triggered. The new beam ID shall be applied for PUSCH only if conditions in 5G_L2_8176_replaced([11153642](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24vT7_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) are met. Otherwise, old beam ID shall be applied for PUSCH. UL beam shall be re-probing until UL beam doesn't fall back to old beam ID, see 5G_L2_8179_replaced([11153750](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24wiAvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If appliedUlBeamSweeping == TRUE, UL beam sweeping should be triggered according to 5G_L2_7995_replaced([11153786](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24wiCfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). DL-L2-PS should notify UL-L2-PS to trigger beam sweeping. In each period of beam sweeping the candidate SSB beam shall not be applied to PDCCH channel which is used for UL grant. If 5G_L2_8034_replaced([11153898](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24xJHPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is met, 5G-L2-PS shall use the beam with highest measured SINR as the serving UL beam for PUSCH in UL slots which are NOT sweeping slots. If CSI report for BM is received and if this UCI meets condition in 5G_UP_ALG_1992_replaced([11112073](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpS9Y_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) that it can trigger a beam change , 5G-L2-PS shall stop beam sweeping and notify DL-L2-PS with new target beam ID.

In case that PUSCH = 8RX, if UE is configured with 2 SSB beams(beamset with only 2 SSB beams configured) and beam refinement is disabled for the UE and no valid SRS beams **for the UE, "2 SSB beams" in the table should be chosen and 2 beams in beamset should be used for extention no matter one or two beams are valid. For “PUSCH=16RX”, beam extent to 4 or 8 beams as 5G_UP_ALG_26331_replaced([11113585](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpcHU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.2.0-2 UL Channels PUCCH (ID: 11155736)

**2.4.3.3.4.2.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11155749`)

UL Channels Four UL beams shall be used for PUCCH 8RX, Two UL beams shall be used for PUCCH 4RX. Sector beam or SSB beam combined with high correlation beam will be used. See the following table for PUCCH usage (5G_UP_ALG_2218_replaced([11113106](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpa5MvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

              ****

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Scenario | pucchF3BeamformingEnabled is true |
| PUSCH=8RX[CB010708-D] or 16Rx [End CB010708-D]**** PUCCH=8RX | F1: four quarter sector beam F3: A + A1 + B + B1 (2 beams valid) If A1 is the same as B1, then: A + A1 + B + B2 (B2 is the second high correlation beam of B) A + A1 + two half sector beam (RU region limited case or 1 beam valid) Note: A, B is SSB coarse beam after ordering as legacy when fill pucchReiveReq |
| PUSCH=8RX PUCCH=4RX | F1: two half sector beam F3: A + B (2 beams valid) A + randomNeighbourBeam (1 beam valid) A + full sector beam (RU region limited case) Note: the same as ulSubCellType is C4. A, B is SSB coarse beam after ordering as legacy when fill pucchReiveReq |

Note: the concept of “PUCCH=8RX” or “PUCCH=4RX” is described in 5G_L2_12903_replaced([11155753](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2466HvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). A/B is UE reported SSB coarse beam. High correlation beam {A1, A2} and {B1, B2} is the highest correlation beam of A/B informed by CPlane during cellsetup.

1 beam valid for PUCCH = 8RX:

1 valid PUCCH beam in UE context OR

(UE reports only 1 beam instead of 2 (nrOfReportedRS = n1 in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2684_replaced([11303281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqj_0PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) AND appliedUlBeamFallback = FALSE) OR

2 SSB for PUCCH are the same

1 beam valid for PUCCH = 4RX(same as legacy):

1 valid PUCCH beam in UE context OR

UE reports only 1 beam instead of 2 (nrOfReportedRS = n1 in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2684_replaced([11303281](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqj_0PvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR

2 SSB for PUCCH are the same

In case that PUCCH = 8RX , if UE is configured with 2 SSB beams(beamset with only 2 SSB beams configured), " A + A1 + B + B1"/"A + A1 + B + B2" in the table should be chosen and 2 beams in beamset should be used for extention no matter one or two beams are valid for PUCCH F3. Sector beams shall always be used for PUCCH F1.

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.2.2.0-3 UL Channels Concept of PUSCH 16RX, PUSCH 8RX, PUCCH 8RX and PUCCH 4RX (ID: 11155753)

**2.4.3.3.4.2.2.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11155772`)

UL Channels The num of beams for PUSCH/PUCCH is equal to half of number of spatial stream for corresponding channel.

The detail information of PUCCH 4Rx/8Rx and PUSCH=4Rx/8Rx[CB010708-C] /16Rx [End CB010708-C] see 5G_L2_16925_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.3.3.4.3 Apply Updated Beam ID to Physical Channels (ID: 11155775)

### 2.4.3.4 Mapping between Beam ID and Pattern ID (ID: 11155866)

**2.4.3.4.0-4**  (ID: `11155907`)

Mapping between Beam ID and Pattern ID The actual physical grid of beams layout design is described in a separate document, shared with the RU.

The document is stored in:

Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL 11155945: Indication of the RF Pattern ID and DL/UL Beam Direction to 5G-L1-DL Compilation of DlData_PatternConfigReq for Refined Beams If beam refinement is switched on, see NIDD parameter SBTS/NGNODEB/NGCELL/nrBtsBeamRefinementP2, CSI-RS for L1 RSRP measurement are transmitted on the same symbols as SS/PBCH blocks, see 5G_UP_ALG_4130_replaced([11173889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuXDnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Whereas for the SS/PBCH block the same beam ID is used for 4 consecutive symbols, the CSI-RS transmissions use 4 different refined beam directions on these 4 symbols, i.e., one direction per symbol. The beam ID valid for these CSI-RS transmissions is derived from the beam ID if the SS/PBCH block transmitted on the same symbols such that the refined beams belong to the SSB beams of this SS/PBCH block as displayed in the following figure for a single slot with 2 SS/PBCH blocks:

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).For the relation between beam IDs of SS/PBCH block and related refined beams, see 5G_UP_ALG_11982_replaced([11111700](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpP6FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_1937_replaced([11111754](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpP6H_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The 4 beam IDs for the refined beams shall be ordered increasingly with increasing symbol number. The pattern ID per symbol is derived from the beam ID as described in 5G_UP_ALG_1939_replaced([11111782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpQhIPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). These pattern IDs have then to be added to message DlData_PatternConfigReq, see 5G_L1_5G21A_60, to the second vector, i.e., second X-Pol beam, of [Before 5GC001626-B] patternIdPol0List and patternIdPol1List [5GC001626-B] patternIdPolList. For symbols not used for CSI-RS transmission, the pattern IDs in the second vector remain unchanged. NOTE: The parameter rdSyncSignalsTxMode as described in 5G_L1_5G21A_827 defines on which polarization the CSI-RS are actually transmitted. If one polarization is skipped, the setting in the respective polarization list will be ignored by 5G-L1-DL and/or 5G-RU. For testing purpose, the power of single CSI-RS transmissions may be reduced artificially similar as it is done on slot level, see 5G_L2_569_replaced([11157594](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The respective values have to be added to the parameter pwrReductionPerSymb_dB of message DlData_CsiRsSendReq. NOTE: Earlier (before R15 of 3GPP), some symbols had been excluded from CSI-RS transmission by 3GPP. Therefore, it had been foreseen to send CSI-RS to two different directions in the symbols used for CSI-RS transmission for beam refinement. However, now all symbols are allowed for that purpose and hence only 4 AxC instead of 6 are needed, i.e., 2 for SS/PBCH block transmission and 2 for CSI-RS transmission, both polarizations each. Originally, the intention was to occupy the whole carrier for CSI-RS transmission but leaving the PRBs allocated by SS/PBCH block punctured. However, 3GPP did not consistently introduce this option and it won’t be fixed in R15; therefore, only either the PRBs below the SS/PBCH blocks or those above can be used. Which part to be used is controlled by NIDD parameter csirsBmMgmtSubband. StartPRB and numofPRBs have to be set accordingly. The idea to have that adjustable is to configure adjacent cell differently in order to avoid interference. In addition, also the RE allocation inside the PRBs can be adjusted differently. The source for this figure can be found at: File: CSI-RS for Beam Refinement.xlxs Folder:

---

#### 2.4.3.5.1 Setting content of DlData_PatternConfigReq (ID: 11155951)
##### 2.4.3.5.1.0-1 Setting content of DlData_PatternConfigReq The most relevant IEs of the DlData_PatternConfigReq message are set as described in followings sections: (ID: 11155958)

**2.4.3.5.1.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11155987`)

Setting content of DlData_PatternConfigReq Setting txRxBitmapPol IE:

- it shall contain the sequence bits 0..(numOfPatternIdPol-1)
- bit 0:

  set to 1 if signal must be transmitted in DL at OFDM symbol 0,

 set to 0 if signal must be received in UL at OFDM symbol 0 or in case of no tx/rx at this symbol;

- bit 1:

  set to 1 if signal must be transmitted in DL at OFDM symbol 1,

 set to 0 if signal must be received in UL at OFDM symbol 1 or in case of no tx/rx at this symbol;

- ..
- bit (numOfPatternIdPol-1):

  set to 1 if signal must be transmitted in DL at OFDM (numOfPatternIdPol-1),

 set to 0 if signal must be received in UL at OFDM or in case of no tx/rx at this symbol;

- where bit 0 is the least significant bit of txRxBitmapPol IE, and so on.
- For PRACH, the UL OFDM symbols refer to PRACH symbols.

---

##### 2.4.3.5.1.0-1.1 Setting Pattern IDs informations: (ID: 11155992)

**2.4.3.5.1.0-1.1.0-2**  (ID: `11156003`)

Setting Pattern IDs informations: Mapping of patternIdPolList to stream id/bfcmIndex/X-Pol-Beam id:

- In the following sections x-pol-beam index is replaced by bfcmIndex value, both parameters are relative in a subcell:

  One x-pol-beam represents two I/Q data stream with respective polarization +45° and -45°.

 bfcmIndex[i] represents I/Q data stream i. The different bfcmIndex elements map to the different I/Q streams handled by the subcell. The different bfcmIndex elements are in ascending order of I/Q stream id with respective polarization +45° and -45°. See 5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L2_IF_77_replaced([10968024](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvvfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Inside a subcell, x-pol-beam i can be easily translated as value of (bfcmIndex[2*i]; bfcmIndex[2*i+1]).

 The Pattern ID for symbol k in I/Q stream id i shall be carried in the following IEs:

- PatternIdPolList[k][ bfcmIndex[2*i] ] and patternIdPolList[k][ bfcmIndex[2*i+1]]

  For FR2, 5G-L2-PS on each NrCellGrp shall use only the Pattern ID for bfcmIndex[0] and bfcmIndex[1]. Please note that value of bfcmIndex[0] is expected to be 0 and value of bfcmIndex[1] expected to be 1 because Gen3 RUs use only the first 2 control vectors on each control block for beam steering in each BFCM message.

---

##### 2.4.3.5.1.0-1.1.0-3 Setting Pattern IDs informations: Mapping of patternIdPolList per channel type inside a subcell (ID: 11156008)

**2.4.3.5.1.0-1.1.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11156020`)

Setting Pattern IDs informations: In below section, first XPolBeams corresponds to (bfcmIndex[0], bfcmIndex[1]), second XPolBeams corresponds to (bfcmIndex[2], bfcmIndex[3]).

o For dlMimoMode = 'CL 2x2 MIMO' or 'OL 2x2 MIMO' and for ulMimoMode = 'CL 2x2 MIMO':

 Polarizations +45° and -45° are associated with respectively L1 subcell PI antenna ports 0 and 1.

 For the case that dlSubcellType is ‘C4’, two XPolBeams are associated to the DL subcell.

- For symbols associated to PDCCH, if L2-PS needs to send DCIs to two beam directions with one C4 subcell, the pattern IDs for fist XPolBeam of the subcell is the beam at one direction, the pattern IDs for the second XPolBeam of the subcell is the beam at another direction, and pdcchPrecodingOption4x4 shall be set to repetitionTwoXPol (see 5G_L1_5G21A_77).

- For symbols associated to PDSCH,

 L2-PS can send PDSCH to first and/or second XPolBeam.

 If PDSCH is transmitted with streamIndex {0, 1}, the pattern ID of the first XPolBeam of the subcell shall be associated with the best beam.

 If PDSCH is transmitted with streamIndex {2, 3}, the pattern ID of the second XPolBeam of the subcell shall be associated with the best beam.

o For dlMimoMode = 'OL 4x4 or 4x2 MIMO' or 'CL 4x4 or 4x2 MIMO':

 For dlSubcellType ‘C4’, two XPolBeams are associated to the DL subcell.

- For symbols associated to PDCCH,

  if numOfSubSectors = 2, first and second XPolBeams (see column beamIndex) shall be set as 5G_UP_ALG_1924_replaced([11111609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOsAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) else,

 first XPolBeam (lowest index) of the subcell is the best beam selected (see mapping in 5G_L1_5G21A_57 and 5G_UP_2501_replaced([11389876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufQQtvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). When rdPdcchPrecodingOption4X4 value is '2' (single beam), the pattern IDs for the second XPolBeam of the subcell are set to 0xFFFF (unused). Otherwise the second XPolBeam of the subcell is associated to the second best beam.

- If L2-PS needs to send DCIs to two beam directions with one C4 subcell, the pattern IDs for fist XPolBeam of the subcell is the beam at one direction, the pattern IDs for the second XPolBeam of the subcell is the beam at another direction, and pdcchPrecodingOption4x4 shall be set to repetitionTwoXPol (see 5G_L1_5G21A_77).

- For symbols associated to PDSCH,

 if numOfSubSectors = 2, first and second XPolBeams (see column beamIndex) shall be set as 5G_UP_ALG_1924_replaced([11111609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOsAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) else

 The first XPolBeam of the subcell is the best beam selected (see mapping in 5G_L1_5G21A_57).

 If the rank of the scheduled PDSCH transmission is 3 or 4, the second XPolBeam of the subcell is associated to the second best beam.

 Otherwise, the second XPolBeam of the subcell is associated to the second best beam.

 rdPortSelectionPattenIdOff is replaced by rdPdschPrecodingOption4x4 to decide about portSelection.

 L2-PS can send PDSCH to first and/or second XPolBeam.

 If PDSCH is transmitted with streamIndex {0, 1}, the pattern ID of the first XPolBeam of the subcell shall be associated with the best beam.

 If PDSCH is transmitted with streamIndex {2, 3}, the pattern ID of the second XPolBeam of the subcell shall be associated with the best beam.

 If PDSCH is transmitted with streamIndex {0, 1, 2, 3}, the pattern ID of the first XPolBeam of the subcell shall be associated with the best beam, the second XPolBeam of the subcell is associated to the second best beam. The second XPolBeam of the subcell is associated to the second best beam. About definition of streamIndex, please see 5G_L1_5G21A_111.

- For symbol(s) associated to CSI-RS for channel measurement,

 if numOfSubSectors = 2, first and second XPolBeams (see column beamIndex) shall be set as 5G_UP_ALG_1924_replaced([11111609](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpOsAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) else

 For symbol(s) associated to CSI-RS for channel measurement, first XPolBeam is the best beam selected (see mapping in 5G_L1_5G21A_57). The second XPolBeam is associated to the second best beam.

o When dlMimoMode "CL 8x4 MIMO" , one or two PMI beams are used for the channels PDSCH, PDCCH. CSI-RS beams do not have the same patternIds as PDSCH and PDCCH.

For dlSubcellType ‘C4’, two XPolBeams are associated to the DL subcell. Refer to 5G_L2_497_replaced([11156027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248vT_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

o For SSBlocks, the first XPolBeam of the subcell shall be used. See 5G_UP_ALG_1894 for symbol mapping.

[Before 5GC002538-D] For the PDSCH transmitted in the SSB slot and the dlSubcellType is C4, the PDSCH shall be transmitted with streamIndex {2,3}, the pattern ID of the second XPolBeam of the subcell shall be associated with the best beam.

[End 5GC002538-D]

o if dlSubcellType is set to 'C4':

 If messages DlData_CsiRsSendReq with field trsInfo set to ENABLED, then XPolBeam associated to the CSI-RS carried on this subcell are used for tracking. Mapping of symbol and beamId, associated to ssbBeamIndex, are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2343_replaced([11114897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). AxC and CPRI mapping are described in 5G_UP_ALG_1896_replaced([11114916](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpo7rPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and in table below.

o If message DlData_CsirsSendReq used for beam refinement is sent to a subcell during a slot, then XPolBeam associated to the CSI-RS carried on this subcell is defined in 5G_L2_484_replaced([11155945](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248IOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (symbol and BeamId mapping). CPRI mapping is defined in table below.

o Pattern IDs of unused streams in the DlData_PatternConfigReq message shall have the value 65535 = 0xFFFF. This value indicates a special beamforming pattern which lets the RF blank these streams by applying a beamforming coefficient with zero amplitude in DL and UL.

o In order to have a minimum duration for a beam, the Pattern ID associated with a GP shall be equal to the Pattern ID of the following UL symbol, whatever the type of slot (GP before PUSCH, GP before PUCCH, GP before PRACH if any).

o For conformance test, the Pattern ID associated with a GP shall be set to 0xFFFF.

o Note: if two kinds of CSI-RS share the same subcell (for example CSI-RS for BM and CSI-RS for tracking) then all resources will be listed in the same message type DlData_CsiRsSendReq and CSI-RS for different subcells are sent in different messages.

o For PRACH, the UL OFDM symbols refer to PRACH symbols (see 5G_L1_5G21A_1302 for the PRACH formats) and the Pattern ID for symbols s = 0 to 13 shall be set according to SSB beam associated with the PRACH occasion and to the PRACH config index. For all unused entries, Pattern ID shall be set to 0xFFFF.

o For symbol(s) associated to PUCCH CSI reporting,

If (there’s only one UE allocated with CSI F2 resources in this UL subcell )

The XPolBeams of the UL subcell should select UE’s best beam.

Else if (all UEs allocated with CSI F2 resources in this UL subcell have the same best beam )

The XPolBeams of the UL subcell should select UE’s best beam.

Else

The XPolBeams of the UL subcell should select sector beam.

---

##### 2.4.3.5.1.0-1.1.0-4 Setting Pattern IDs informations: Mapping of patternIdPolList per channel type inside a subcell for Closed Loop 8x4 MIMO (ID: 11156027)

**2.4.3.5.1.0-1.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11156033`)

Setting Pattern IDs informations: When dlMimoMode "CL 8x4 MIMO", one or two PMI beams are used for the UE's PDSCH, PDCCH. CSI-RS beams do not have the same patternIds as PDSCH and PDCCH.

Scheduling of PDSCH, PDCCH for Paging/SI has the same setting as rank 1, except the beam is sweeping all the SSB beams that are configured to the cell.

Scheduling of PDSCH, PDCCH for msg2/4 shall be the same setting as rank 1, default precoding and beam, refer 5G_UP_ALG_3189_replaced([11139327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDffvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For dlSubcellType ‘C4’, two XPolBeams are associated to the DL subcell. Pattern IDs for unused XPolBeams shall be set to 0xFFFF (unused).

o For symbols associated with PDCCH for DL scheduling, best beam is selected for each UE based UE's CSI feedback, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2201_replaced([11113014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZrGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), or default beam refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3188_replaced([11139322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Each PDCCH need 2 fronthaul streams.

[Before 5GC000524-L]

Pattern IDs for the first XPolBeam shall be filled and PdcchPrecodingOption4X4 (see 5G_L1_5G21A_77) shall be set to repetitionOneXPol.

[5GC000524-L]

To transmit PDCCH signal, L2-RT shall follow below rules to fill pattern IDs and precoding options:

1) If DCI is transmitted with the first XPolBeam of the subcell, pattern IDs for the first XPolBeam shall be filled and pdcchPrecodingOption4x4 shall be set to repetitionOneXPol.

2) If DCI is transmitted with the second XPolBeam of the subcell, pattern IDs for the second XPolBeam shall be filled and pdcchPrecodingOption4x4 shall be set to repetition2ndXPol.

[End 5GC000524-L]

o For symbols associated with PDCCH for UL scheduling, related beam is SSB/refined beam for UL which is selected by 5G_UP_ALG_2018_replaced([11112156](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpTkdvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Each PDCCH need 2 fronthaul streams.

Pattern IDs for the first XPolBeam shall be filled and PdcchPrecodingOption4X4 (see 5G_L1_5G21A_77) shall be set to repetitionOneXPol.

o For symbols associated with PDSCH, first/second/best beam is selected for each UE based UE's CSI feedback, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2201_replaced([11113014](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZrGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), or default beam refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3188_replaced([11139322](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krmDfPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 If the rank of the scheduled PDSCH transmission is 2 (without port selection) or 3 or 4, the first and second XPolBeam of the subcell is associated to the two PMI beams with the order reported by UE. The streamIndex (see 5G_L1_5G21A_111) shall be set to {0, 1, 2, 3}.

[Before 5GC000524-L]

 If the rank of the scheduled PDSCH transmission is 1, pattern IDs for the first XPolBeam shall be filled and streamIndex shall be set to {0, 1}.

[5GC000524-L]

 If the rank of the scheduled PDSCH transmission is 1 or 2 (with port selection):

1) If PDSCH is transmitted with the first XPolBeam of the subcell, pattern IDs for the first XPolBeam shall be filled and streamIndex shall be set to {0, 1}.

2) If PDSCH is transmitted with the second XPolBeam of the subcell, pattern IDs for the second XPolBeam shall be filled and streamIndex shall be set to {2, 3}.

[End 5GC000524-L]

o For symbol(s) associated to CSI-RS for channel measurement, 4 patternIDs for each CSI-RS refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2194_replaced([11112829](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZrEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 If this is the first symbol of row8 CSI-RS, the two XPolBeams shall be set as the two CSI-RS beams of port3000,3001,3004,3005 of the first symbol according to port-AxC mapping order defined in 5G_L1_5G21A_832. The first XPolBeam is beam for port 3000 and 3004, the second XPolBeam is beam for port 3001 and 3005.

 Else (i.e. the second symbol) the first and second XPolBeam shall be set as the two CSI-RS beams of port3000,3001,3004,3005 of the second symbol according to port-AxC mapping order defined in 5G_L1_5G21A_832.

---

Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL 11156069: Transport of DlData_PatternConfigReq message to 5G-L1-DL CPRI: Computation of numOfXpolBeams, bfcmOffset and patternIdPolList based on bfcmIndex

As indication and only for FR1, here is one formula proposed for numOfXpolBeams calculation in a given DlData_PatternConfigReq message sent to DL subcellid i:

 for each slot:

o numOfXpolBeams = ((MAX(bfcmIndex) - MIN(bfcmIndex)) + 1) /2

o bfcmOffset = MIN(bfcmIndex)

With:

o bfcmIndex is taken from PsCell_CellSetupReq-> dlSubcell (5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

As indication and only for FR1 here is one formula proposed for patternIdPolList IE calculation in a given DlData_PatternConfigReq message sent to DL subcell for a given symbol s:

 for each slot:

- patternIdPolList IE[s][0 .. 2* numOfXpolBeams – 1] = index belonging to range [ bfcmOffset; bfcmOffset + 2 * numOfXpolBeams - 1].

 Note: During UL symbol, patternIdPolList values are computed based on UL subcells information in (5G_L2_23011_replaced([11155919](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248INvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G_L2_486_replaced([11155958](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248IO_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), but it is transmitted on message DlData_PatternConfigReq going to 5G-L1-DL which is using only DL subcell related parameter. With these 2 proposed formulas, all patternIdPolList computed during UL symbol is sure to be totally transported over the different patternIdPolList IE addressed to the DL subcells because there are always same or more DL streams than UL one. Please see 5G_UP_2490_replaced([11389795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufPpsvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to see rules to be applied by OAM to bfcmIndex values received on each subcells to have these formulas valid.

For FR2, only index 0 and 1 of patternIdPol have patternId value different from 0xFFFF. It means there shall be at least one message DlData_PatternConfigReq sent per ABIL having numOfXpolBeams = 1 and bfcmOffset = 0. Other DlData_PatternConfigReq messages sent per ABIL can have numOfXpolBeams = 0.

Here are two examples in FR1 with different bfcmIndex IE received for UL subcells:

First example: 1 L1 instance with 1 C4 on each NrCellGrp (Mapping table in 5G_UP_2501_replaced([11389876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufQQtvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

PsCell_CellSetupReq-> dlSubcell:

- dlSubcellId 0, subcellType = C4, numBfcmIndex = 4, bfcmIndex = [0,1,2,3]
- dlSubcellId 1, subcellType = C4, numBfcmIndex = 4, bfcmIndex = [4,5,6,7]

 PsCell_CellSetupReq-> ulSubcell:

- ulSubcellId 0, subcellType = C2, numBfcmIndex = 2, bfcmIndex = [0,1]
- ulSubcellId 1, subcellType = C2, numBfcmIndex = 2, bfcmIndex = [4,5]

  on each slot:

o DlData_PatternConfigReq send to DL subcellId 0:

 numOfXpolBeams = (3 – 0 + 1)/2= 2

 bfcmOffset = 0

 patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = index belonging to range [0 .. 3]

 During DL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [0,1,2,3] of dlSubcellId = 0.

 During UL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [0,1] of ulSubcellId = 0 and patternIdPolList[s][2 .. 3] = 0xFFFF.

o DlData_PatternConfigReq send to DL subcellId 1:

 numOfXpolBeams = (3 – 0 + 1)/2= 2

 bfcmOffset = 4

 patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = index belonging to range [4; 7]

 During DL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [4,5,6,7] of dlSubcellId = 1.

 During UL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [4,5] of ulSubcellId = 1 and patternIdPolList[s][2 .. 3] = 0xFFFF.

Second example: 1 L1 instance with 1 C4 on each NrCellGrp (Mapping table in 5G_UP_2501_replaced([11389876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ufQQtvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) with different bfcmIndex IE received for ulSubcellId 1:

PsCell_CellSetupReq-> dlSubcell:

- dlSubcellId 0, subcellType = C4, numBfcmIndex = 4, bfcmIndex = [0,1,2,3]
- dlSubcellId 1, subcellType = C4, numBfcmIndex = 4, bfcmIndex = [4,5,6,7]

 PsCell_CellSetupReq-> ulSubcell (different bfcmIndex mapping):

- ulSubcellId 0, subcellType = C2, numBfcmIndex = 2, bfcmIndex = [0,1]
- ulSubcellId 1, subcellType = C2, numBfcmIndex = 2, bfcmIndex = [2,3]

  on each slot:

o DlData_PatternConfigReq send to DL subcellId 0:

 numOfXpolBeams = (3 – 0 + 1)/2= 2

 bfcmOffset = 0

 patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = index belonging to range [0 .. 3]

 During DL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [0,1,2,3] of dlSubcellId = 0.

 During UL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [0,1,2,3] of ulSubcellId =0 and 1.

o DlData_PatternConfigReq send to DL subcellId 1:

 numOfXpolBeams = (3 – 0 + 1)/2= 2

 bfcmOffset = 4

 patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = index belonging to range [4; 7]

 During DL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = bfcmIndex = [4,5,6,7] of dlSubcellId = 1.

 During UL symbol, patternIdPolList[s][0 .. 3] = 0xFFFF.

#### 2.4.3.5.3 eCPRI (ID: 11156075)

**2.4.3.5.3.0-2**  (ID: `11156086`)

eCPRI ECPRI: Computation of numOfXpolBeams, bfcmOffset and patternIdPolList in ECPRI from 5G20A

bfcmIndex values received from OAM are only valid in CPRI, so in ECPRI, numOfXpolBeams, patternIdPolList, bfcmOffset IEs values could not be based on bfcmIndex(5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G_L2_IF_77_replaced([10968024](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvvfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) but on some hardcoded value.

To de-risk 5G-L1 ECPRI integration testing phase only in TDD FR2 and in TDD FR1 with only one DL and UL subcell per 5G-L2-RT instance, valid patternId are transferred to 5G-L1. In case of TDD FR1 with multiple DL and UL subcell per 5G-L2-RT instance, actEcpriPhase2 flag shall be activated in 5G-L1 and these parameters are not read by 5G-L1.

- in TDD FR2 (There can be one or more D2 subcells in on L2-RT instance, not all have to be scheduled on a slot)

 or

 in TDD FR1 when there is only one subcell DL and UL per 5G-L2-RT instance ( It means one CellGroup with one cell and in this cell only one DL and UL subcell C2 or C4):

o in TDD FR2:

 in all message DlData_PatternConfigReq sent to 5G-L1:

o in TDD FR1:

 in the unique message DlData_PatternConfigReq sent to 5G-L1:

o bfcmOffset = 0.

o numOfXpolBeams = (“Number of spatial streams supported by the subcellType of the DL subcell”)/2.

With: “Number of spatial streams supported by the subcellType of the DL subcell“ is given by the capacity of the DL sybcellType. See chapter 5G_RAN_UP_18252.

o in TDD FR2:

 patternIdPolList IE[s][0 .. 2* numOfXpolBeams – 1] = patternId of the 2*numOfXpolBeams stream of one scheduled subcell in TDD FR2. (all subcell in TDD FR2 have same patternId scheduled in a given slot)

o in TDD FR1:

 patternIdPolList IE[s][0 .. 2* numOfXpolBeams – 1] = patternId of the 2*numOfXpolBeams stream of the only subcell setup in TDD FR1.

o It means:

o In case of DL subcellType C2 (FR1 TDD), patternIdPolList IE[s][0 ;1] = patternId of the 2 stream of the only setup DL subcell for DL symbol and UL subcell for UL symbol.

o In case of DL subcellType D2 (FR2 TDD), patternIdPolList IE[s][0 ;1] = patternId of the 2 stream of one scheduled DL subcell for DL symbol and UL subcell for UL symbol.

o In case of DL subcellType C4 (FR1 TDD), patternIdPolList IE[s][0 .. 3] = patternId of the 4 stream of the only setup DL subcell for DL symbol and UL subcell for UL symbol. If UL subcell is C2, only patternId of the two first streams are valid during UL symbol and patternId of two others are equal to 0XFFFF.

o NB: An otherway to represent exact same hardcoded values is that 5G-L2-RT shall follow 5G_L2_502_replaced([11156069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_248vVPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) considering it has received from CP-RT in 5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))/2:

 In case of C2, D2 subcellType, bfcmIndex = {0,1}.

 In case of C4 subcellType bfcmIndex = {0,1,2,3}.

 in TDD FR1 when there are more than one subcell DL and UL per 5G-L2-RT instance:

o in all message DlData_PatternConfigReq sent to 5G-L1:

o bfcmOffset = 0.

o numOfXpolBeams = 1.

o all elements in patternIdPolList IE are equal to 0XFFFF.

---

##### 2.4.3.5.3.0-3 eCPRI Ecpri FCP optimization on L2-L1 interface (ID: 11156092)

**2.4.3.5.3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11156110`)

eCPRI [Before CB008205-F]

For Ecpri FCP optimization, following action shall be taken by 5G-L2-PS DL scheduler.

 During each DL and special slot, considering slot IE provided in L1 message, for each active DL subcell (see 5G_UP_1760_replaced([11372591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ud93TfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), considering only messages in DL_Scheduler_To_DL_Subcell list, L2 shall count number of messages in DL_Scheduler_To_DL_Subcell list sent to this DL subcell:

o If count is 0, DlData_EmptySendReq (5G_L1_5G21A_103) shall be sent to this subcell with lastMsg IE = 1.

o Otherwise only on last message sent to this subcell, lastMsg IE shall be set to 1.

o If lastMsg IE is set to 1, numberOfMsg IE shall be filled with total number of messages sent to this DL subcell including DlData_EmptySendReq.

o lastMsgCount IE shall always be filled to 2 as UL scheduler may also send DlData_PdcchSendReq to this DL subcell.

 During each UL slot, considering slot IE provided in L1 message, for each UL subcell setting up, considering only message in DL_Scheduler_To_UL_Subcell list, L2 shall count number of message in UL_Scheduler_To_UL_Subcell list sent to this UL subcell:

o If count is 0, UlData_EmptySendReq (5G_L1_5G21A_261) shall be sent to this subcell with lastMsg IE = 1.

o Otherwise only on last message sent to this subcell, lastMsg IE shall be set to 1.

o If lastMsg IE is set to 1, numberOfMsg IE shall be filled with total number of message sent to this UL subcell including UlData_EmptySendReq.

o lastMsgCount IE shall always be filled to 2 as UL scheduler may also sent a message from UL_Scheduler_To_UL_Subcell list to this UL subcell

 DlData_EmptySendReq can also be sent as a compensation for a “last message” from DL_Scheduler_To_DL_Subcell list that was planned to be sent but finally result to not in the given slot for some reason. In any case, the use of DlData_EmptySendReq as an indication of « last message » and not « no message » as it is described previously shall not increase number of message sent to L1 as it shall always be sent instead of a forecast message. Here are some scenarios identified:

o no more data buffer for the only user scheduled in a slot

o No more HARQ process available.

o In FR2 on ABIO only, overload mecanism prevent sending a given message.

 This requirement is applicable also for CPRI case.

Message in DL_Scheduler_To_DL_Subcell list to be considered (DlData_XXXSendReq message type):

 DlData_PdcchSendReq

 DlData_PdschSendReq

 DlData_SsBlockSendReq

 DlData_CsiRsSendReq

Message in DL_Scheduler_To_UL_Subcell list to be considered (UlData_XXXReceiveReq message type):

 UlData_PucchReceiveReq

See 5G_L1_5G21A_112 for lastMsg, lastMsgCount and numberOfMsg definition.

Note: this functionality is coded for all hardwares to avoid as much as possible HW dependent code at L2 side but functionality will never be used in ABIL as 5G-L1 ABIL (Loner) has not planned to implement it.

[End CB008205-F]

### 2.4.3.6 UL neighbor beam random selection for FR1 (digital beamforming) (ID: 11156116)

**2.4.3.6.0-2**  (ID: `11156130`)

UL neighbor beam random selection for FR1 (digital beamforming) Out of determined neighbor beams shall be selected randomly 1 beam.

Information about randomly selected beam shall be stored in UE context.

Note: This algorithm is used e.g. in 5G_UP_ALG_2032_replaced([11112298](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpUymPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

### 2.4.3.7 UL Beam Control from Periodic SRS Measurement (ID: 11156136)
#### 2.4.3.7.1 P SRS CoMa Handling (ID: 11156142)
##### 2.4.3.7.1.0-1 P SRS CoMa Handling (ID: 13482991)

**2.4.3.7.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `13452539`)

P SRS CoMa Handling [CB015122-A]When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True in PsCnfg_AddressDistributionReq ([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall receive only the instantaneous CoMa validity indication (see [11154046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Further part of the requirement applies only to the actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False.[End CB015122-A]

After scheduling P SRS in 5G-L2-PS, L1 shall report UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs (see 5G_L1_IF_257_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) which carries Covariance Matrix (CoMa).

CoMa of each UE shall be extracted from UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs according to UE RNTI [CNI-157588-H](https://systeminsights.ext.net.nokia.com/see%20[11214253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-xqcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))[End CNI-157588-H]. Then CoMa shall be processed as defined in [11154028](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksqacvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).

Note:

1. if UE is configured with 2 SRS ports, there will be 2 RNTI with same value map to same UE different cyclic shifts.

2. CaMa values from L1L2 interface (5G_L1_IF_257_replaced([11514467](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32cvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) need to be processed before be used.

CoMa value in horizontal = CovarianceMatrixHorizontal * 2^scalingHorizontal

CoMa value in vertical = CovarianceMatrixVertical * 2^scalingVertical

Do not care about Q(1.0.15) in interface definition.

---

#### 2.4.3.7.2 P SRS CoMa Processing Timing (ID: 11156151)
##### 2.4.3.7.2.0-1 P SRS CoMa Processing Timing (ID: 11156158)

**2.4.3.7.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13452568`)

P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing 13452568: P SRS CoMa Processing Timing [CB015122-A]When actSrsBmCalcInL1 is set to True in PsCnfg_AddressDistributionReq ([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)), then 5G-L2-PS shall receive only the instantaneous CoMa validity indication (see [11154046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)).

Further part of the requirement applies only to the actSrsBmCalcInL1 set to False.[End CB015122-A]

Since there maybe hundreds of UEs with P SRS are scheduled in same OFDM symbol same slot, CoMa handling may time consuming. When to process CoMa need to be considered based on system processing capablity.

Step1: CoMa shall be separated for each UE after receiving L1 feedback UlData_SrsReceiveRespBmPs. For eCPRI 7-2a (NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to False), **Store CoMa of first polarization, then do average over polarization/cyclic shift after receiving CoMa of second polarization. **Then do validation of instance CoMa, **If NRBTS.actEcpri72e is set to True, validate the CoMa according to 5G_L2_3947_replaced([11154130](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24y-Q_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))**, then average it according to **5G_L2_3948_replaced([11154107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24yXP_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **do IIR filtering if it is valid. Store filtered CoMa for each UE.************

Step2: When rrmUlBeamSelectTimer expires, beam calculation of best and second best beam based on filtered CoMa shall be excuted in L2PS UL scheduler after both DL and UL scheduling, i.e. after post scheduling. How many UEs can be calculated per slot depends on how many CPU cycle left after reserving 30us (maybe changed after more testing) for other processing

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).</p>
