##### 2.4.5.4.5.2.0-3 Dynamic Switch State Machine Pattern500us state description (ID: 11157335)

**2.4.5.4.5.2.0-3.0-5**  (ID: `13461606`)

Dynamic Switch State Machine In **Pattern500us state:**

- timing pattern with 500us BI slot applies

-[CB013330-B] Timing pattern with 500us BI slot shall be forced when k2Rim is > 3 [End CB013330-B]

- If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced([11216763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to FALSE, then
 the new DL overload metric (Cf. 5G_UP_ALG_30274_replaced([11116355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp3lI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is computed each BI slot.

- If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced([11216763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to TRUE, then the real-time scheduling (RT) processing load severity metric (See 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11116341](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2-H_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))) value in UL is provided to DL througth PsInternal_UlToDlIntraSchedUpdate Event.

- If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced([11216763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to FALSE THEN 5G-L2-PS shall proceed as follows:
 if DL overload condition is reached , or [actUlIncPdcchCapacity == TRUE and isK2Load == TRUE [CB013330-B] and k2Rim is <= 3 [End CB013330-B]] dynamic switching to 750us timing pattern is triggered ,

- if rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced([11216763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to TRUE THEN 5G-L2-PS shall proceed as follows:
 if UL RT severity metric condition is reached, or [actUlIncPdcchCapacity == TRUE and isK2Load == TRUE [CB013330-B] and k2Rim is <= 3 [End CB013330-B]] dynamic switching to 750us timing pattern is triggered ,

- if dynamic switch req with pattern = 750us is received from other DLS [CB013330-B] and k2Rim is <= 3 [End CB013330-B], 750us timing pattern switch execution is performed

- [CB013330-B] if dynamic switch req with pattern = 750us is received from other DLS and local k2RIM is >3, then DynamicSwitchResp shall be send to other DLS with k2Cell = k2Rim and timing pattern shall remain 500us. [End CB013330-B]

             **** **** **** [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)****[](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)**** [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)****[](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)[](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxeB-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)[](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxeB-vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)**************** ************** ******** **** ******************** ********

| Actions on Entry | | Reset DL overload metric Set isOverload to FALSE | | |
| | Actions on Exit | | | |
| | Actions in State | | | |
| If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced(11216763)) is set to FALSE Internal Event: EndOfBiSlot Event EndOfBiSlot is triggered whenever the UL scheduler is executed. ELSE (If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced(11216763)) is set to TRUE) Event: Reception of PsInternal_UlToDlIntraSchedUpdate (l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric) | | Conditions: [CB013330-B] k2Rim is <= 3 [End CB013330-B] | | |
| Actions: * If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced(11216763)) is set to FALSE  If the current slot is a BISlot, calculate DL overload metric  If [first BI Slot if k2 = 2 or second BI slot if k2 = 3 or UL slot in even SFN]  Check DL overload metric vs threshold  If (DL overload metric < threshold ) or or [actIncUlPdcchCapacity == TRUE and isK2Load == TRUE]  If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced(11216763)) is set to TRUE  If [first BI Slot if k2 = 2 or second BI slot if k2 = 3 in even SFN] · Check UL RT severity metric (l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric) vs rdSlotDurationSwitchingOlcPerCent (See 5G_UP_ALG_33094_replaced(11217340)) · If UL RT severity metric (l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric) >= The value set for activation threshold of rdSlotDurationSwitchingOlcPerCent (See 5G_UP_ALG_33094_replaced(11217340)) or [actIncUlPdcchCapacity == TRUE and isK2Load == TRUE] proposedK2Cell = MAX(rrmK2MIn, K2Rim) if rdEnableFlexibleBiSlotOneCell==true and actIncUlPdcchCapacity == true and when one cell in the L2Subpool, * Set the flag isTimingPattern750Needed to TRUE * Send PsInternal_DlToIntraSchedUpdate with IE TimingPattern set to from_500_to_750 to ULS * Send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq with IE targetTimingPattern set to from_500_to_750 to SRS BM (if it's on the same core as ULS). * Set timingPatternConfig to TimingPatternConfig750 * Move to WaitForNewPatternActivation Else, * Send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq(pattern750us, proposedK2Cell) to other DLS * Move to WaitForSwitchingPatternResp750 * if actIncUlPdcchCapacity == true * set isForcedMultiK2Mode= TRUE  Else  Do nothing  Else  Do nothing | | | | |
| Target State: if rdEnableFlexibleBiSlotOneCell==true and a*ctIncUlPdcchCapacity == true and when one cell in the L2Subpool: *WaitForNewPatternActivation Else, WaitForSwitchingPatternResp750 | | | | |
| Event: Reception of PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq (pattern750ms, k2BuddyCell)**** | | Conditions: If isSlotSynchReceived (*) == TRUE | | |
| Actions: [CB013330-B] If k2Rim is <= 3:[End CB013330-B]  K2Cell = MAX(rrmK2Min, k2Rim, K2BuddyCell) if actIncUlPdcchCapacity == TRUE * Set TimingPatternConfig = TimingPatternConfig750MultiK2 else * Set TimingPatternConfig = TimingPatternConfig750(K2Cell)  Send PsInternal_DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate with IE TimingPattern set to pattern750 and K2Cell to ULS  Send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchResp with K2Cell to other DLS if SRSBM EO is on same core as ULS, send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq(pattern750ms, k2Cell) to SRSBM EO  Apply k2Cell on slot pattern if K2Cell is modified Update srsSlotOffset with new K2Cell if actIncUlPdcchCapacity == true * set isForcedMultiK2Mode= TRUE [CB013330-B] If k2Rim is > 3: K2Cell = k2Rim Send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchResp with K2Cell to other DLS if actIncUlPdcchCapacity == true * set isForcedMultiK2Mode= FALSE ​​​​​​​[End CB013330-B] | | | | |
| Target State: when (k2Rim <= 3): WaitForNewPatternActivation when (k2Rim > 3): Pattern500us | | | | |
| | | | | |

(*)The flag isSlotSynchReceived is set to TRUE when cell is synchronized and ready to handle incoming event

##### 2.4.5.4.5.2.0-4 Dynamic Switch State Machine WaitForSwitchingPatternResp750 state description (ID: 11157355)

**2.4.5.4.5.2.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `13461622`)

Dynamic Switch State Machine In **WaitForSwitchingPatternResp750 state:**

- timing pattern with 500us BI slot still applies

- if dynamic switch resp is received [CB013330-B] with k2cell <=3 [End CB013330-B], 750us timing pattern switch execution continues

[CB013330-B] -if dynamic switch resp is received with k2Cell >3, timing pattern with 500us BI slot shall be applied and k2Cell updated accordingly [End CB013330-B]

- if dynamic switch req with pattern = 750us is received from other DLS, dynamic switch resp is sent to other DLS to avoid any blocking situation but still waits for the dynamic switch resp

- if TimingSwitchRespTimer expires, 750us timing pattern execution is aborted

##### 2.4.5.4.5.2.0-5 Dynamic Switch State Machine WaitForNewPatternActivation state description (ID: 11157374)

**2.4.5.4.5.2.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `12473214`)

Dynamic Switch State Machine In **WaitForNewPatternActivation state:**

- timing pattern with 500us BI slot still applies up to the switching occasion

- at the switching occasion, a timer is started to guarantee a minimum duration of timing pattern with 750us in order to avoid ping-pong switching

             **** **** **** **** **** ******** **** ********

| | Actions on Exit | | | |
| | Actions in State | | | |
| Internal Event: EndOfPenultimateNRTSlotInOddSfn | | Conditions: | | |
| Actions:  Start switchTo750TimingPatternTimer  Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace | | | | |
| Target State: Pattern750us | | | | |
| [CB013305-BC] Event: RimUpdate [End CB013305-BC] | | Conditions: | | |
| [CB013305-BC] Actions : * Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace * [End CB013305-BC] | | | | |
| [CB013305-BC] Target State: DelayRimUpdate [End CB013305-BC] | | | | |
| | | | | |

**Note that duration of **switchTo750TimingPatternTimer is defined in R&D paramater **rd750UsBiSlotTimerDurationMs (5G_L2_21985_replaced([11182779](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27ee1PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))******

##### 2.4.5.4.5.2.0-6 Dynamic Switch State Machine Pattern750us state description (ID: 11157384)

**2.4.5.4.5.2.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `12444281`)

Dynamic Switch State Machine In **Pattern750us state:**

- timing pattern with 750us BI slot applies

- [CB013709-F] If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced([11216763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) = FALSE: [End CB013709-F]
 the condition to leave timing pattern with 750us BI slot (Cf. 5G_UP_ALG_29952_replaced([11116341](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2-H_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is checked in relevant NRT slot once per PDCCH slot pattern.
 [CB013709-F] If rdActExtendedUpOverloadHandling (5G_UP_ALG_31311_replaced([11216763](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxaXn_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) = TRUE:
 the condition to leave timing pattern with 750us BI slot (Cf. 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11116352](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp3lIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) is checked in relevant NRT slot once per PDCCH slot pattern. [End CB013709-F]

- if the condition to leave timing pattern with 750us BI slot is reached, dynamic switching to 500us timing pattern is triggered

- if dynamic switch req with pattern = 500us is received from other DLS, 500us timing pattern switch execution is performed

- if buddy cell is deleted, the switching to timing pattern with 500us BI slot is triggered whatever the overload condition

| Target State: Pattern500us | | | | |
| Event: Reception of PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq (pattern750ms, K2BuddyCell)**** | | Conditions: | | |
| proposedK2Cell = MAX(rrmK2Min, K2Rim, K2BuddyCell) if (proposedK2Cell != K2BuddyCell)  K2Cell = proposedK2Cell  Set TimingPatternConfig to TimingPattern750Config(K2Cell)  Trigger application of K2Cell value on slot  Send PsInternal_DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate with IE TimingPattern set to pattern750 and K2Cell to ULS  If SRS BM is on same core as ULS, send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq(pattern750, K2Cell) to SRSBM EO  Update srsSlotOffset with new K2Cell  Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace Else  Send DynamicSwitchResp to other DLS with status NOK | | | | |
| Target state : no state change | | | | |
| Event: BuddyCellDelete | | Conditions: | | |
| Actions:  K2Cell = MAX(rrmK2Min, K2Rim)  Set TimingPatternConfig to LegacyPatternConfig  If K2Cell value is different from previous one  Trigger application of K2Cell value on slot pattern  Send PsInternal_DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate with IE TimingPattern set to pattern500 and K2Cell to ULS  If SRSBM EO is on same core as ULS, send PsInternal_DynamicSwitchReq(pattern750, K2Cell ) to SRSBM EO Update srsSlotOffset with new K2Cell  Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace  Set isForcedMultiK2Mode to FALSE | | | | |
| Target State: Pattern500us | | | | |
| Event: RimUpdate | | Conditions: | | |
| Actions : proposedK2Cell = MAX (rrmK2Min, K2Rim) if proposedK2Cell != K2Cell  Send DynamicSwitchReq(pattern750, proposedK2Cell)  Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace | | | | |
| Target state : WaitForSwitchRespNewK2Cell | | | | |
| | | | | |

##### 2.4.5.4.5.2.0-8 Dynamic Switch State Machine DelayRimUpdate state description (ID: 12470477)

**2.4.5.4.5.2.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `12470479`)

Dynamic Switch State Machine In DelayRimUpdate state :

- timing pattern with 500us BI slot applies

- at the switching occasion, a timer is started to guarantee a minimum duration of timing pattern with 750us in order to avoid ping-pong switching

             **** **** **** **** ****

| | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Actions on Entry | | | | |
| | Actions on Exit | | | |
| | Actions in State | | | |
| Internal Event: EndOfPenultimateNRTSlotInOddSfn | | Conditions: | | |
| Actions: * Start switchTo750TimingPatternTimer | | | | |
| Target State: WaitForNextSfn | | | | |
| | | | | |

Dynamic Switch State Machine In WaitFornextSfn state

             **** **** **** **** **** ****

| | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Actions on Entry | | | | |
| | Actions on Exit | | | |
| | Actions in State | | | |
| Internal Event: EndOfBiSlot | | Conditions: proposedK2Cell = MAX (rrmK2Min, K2Rim) != K2Cell | | |
| Actions: * Send DynamicSwitchReq(pattern750, proposedK2Cell) * Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace | | | | |
| Target State: WaitForSwitchRespNewK2Cell | | | | |
| Internal Event: EndOfBiSlot | | Conditions: proposedK2Cell = MAX (rrmK2Min, K2Rim) == K2Cell | | |
| Actions: * Generate the slotTimingSwitching TTI trace | | | | |
| Target State:Pattern750 | | | | |

frame structure timing 12709065: FR1 TDD tdLte Config0 frame structure timing When FR1 TDD frame structure is tdLte with tdLteconfig0, L2PS scheduler execution shall follow the distribution as below, the impact of DL and UL scheduler running in the same or separate core and the DRX interworking has been taken into account. 1. If the special slot is configured with guardPeriodLength = 4, and NRCELL.actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is true, the special slot shall have DL scheduling. Then the DL and UL scheduler for each slot will run in series in separate slot, except slot 9/19 which have DL and UL scheduler running in the same slot. [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a table that describes the configuration of a Time Division Long-Term Evolution (TD-LTE) system. The table has rows for "On Air Slot", "Slot Type", "DL Scheduling Slots", "UL Scheduling Slots", "NRT Slots", "K1", "K2", "SlotOffsetDI (slots)", and "SlotOffsetUL (slots)". The columns represent "On Air Slot" numbers from 0 to 19. The "Slot Type" row indicates whether each slot is Downlink (DL), Uplink (UL), or Special (S). The "DL Scheduling Slots" and "UL Scheduling Slots" rows specify the scheduling of DL and UL transmissions, respectively, with some slots being designated as Non-Real-Time (NRT). The "K1" and "K2" rows likely represent parameters related to the scheduling or transmission. The "SlotOffsetDI (slots)" and "SlotOffsetUL (slots)" rows indicate the offset for DL and UL transmissions. The table shows a pattern of DL and UL slots, with special slots at positions 2 and 13. The scheduling of DL and UL slots varies across the 20 slots, with specific slot numbers assigned to DL and UL scheduling. The NRT slots are present at positions 6 and 10. The K1 and K2 values are mostly consistent, with some variations. The slot offsets also show a pattern, with DL offsets generally being higher than UL offsets. The title of the table is "tdLteConfig0 with guardPeriodLength = 4/(B16,4)". This suggests that the configuration is for a specific TDLTE configuration (Config0) with a guard period length of 4, and possibly related to a Bandwidth (BW) of 16 and a specific configuration parameter (4). Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access). Slot 2/12 will be the candidate to trigger DCI based BWP switch with special DL TDRA value as mentioned in [11115691: Special Time Domain Resource Assignment addition](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpw3dPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). Slot 3/13 can be the candidate as well to trigger DCI based BWP switch if NRCELL.actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is true.
Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access). [End CB009422-E] Note: [Before CB009422-E]1. When there's no DL scheduling in special slot due to guardPeriodLength = 6 or NRCELL.actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is false, k1max=k1min=6.[End CB009422-E] [Before CB009422-E]2[CB009422-E]1)[End CB009422-E]. Those figures above applicable for both 2 Core 2 Cell and 2 Core 1 Cell deployment, but the NRT slot in the figure just for 2 Core 2 Cell case, there will be more NRT slots for 2 Core 1 Cell deployment. [CB009422-E] 2). When NRCELL.actPowerSavingBWP = true, in order to handle DCI based BWP switch, the additional K1=4 shall be added to K1 set, the PUCCH token in UL slots for HARQ feedback shall be adjusted. Refer to [11116186: k1 value computation for long PUCCH](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp1v-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9). 3). The k2aCsi value is 6, which is only eligible in special slot. Refer to [11116648: A-CSI compatible K2 determination over the slot pattern.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp5aX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CB009422-E] For K1 value definition for tdLte Config0, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9819_replaced([11116112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp1I5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_14983_replaced([11116186](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp1v-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). For K2 value definition for tdLte Config0, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2484_replaced([11116264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2XB_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Link of the table:

12705725: FR1 TDD tdLte Config0 frame structure timing 12705725: FR1 TDD tdLte Config0 frame structure timing 12705725: FR1 TDD tdLte Config0 frame structure timing 12705725: FR1 TDD tdLte Config0 frame structure timing 12705725: FR1 TDD tdLte Config0 frame structure timing As the DL and UL scheduler for tdLte Config0 are running sequentially except one slot if NRCELL.actEnhancedPDSCHSchSplSlot is true, which shall mitigates the CPU load when DL and UL scheduler deployed on the same core. Then from the view of L2-PS time for tdLte Config0 scheduling, the time is extended in first 4 slots and then shrunk in last slot for each half radio frame. For calculations and measurements which are based on one slot duration or message sending is sensitive with the L2-PS time, the legacy L2-PS time still can be used, in this way the mess caused by different slot with same slot number shall be avoided. Each section contains rows labeled K1, K2, Additional slotOffsetDL, Additional slotOffsetUL, and Initial slotOffsetDL/UL. ### 2.4.5.5 Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling (ID: 11157437)
#### 2.4.5.5.0-1 Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling A-CSI compatible K2 determination over the slot pattern. (ID: 11157443)

**2.4.5.5.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13451423`)

Scheduling timings for aperiodic CSI scheduling For a UE has A-CSI scheduled in UL slot, in order to avoid some DL slots cannot be used to schedule downlink data due to no available 'k1aCsi' could be determined in 5G_UP_ALG_2502_replaced([11116669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp6BY_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or in order to decrease 'k1aCsi' value to reduce HARQ Re-TX latency and available total K1 numbers (but the fact that precalculated k1 (that is calculated during setup) is available does not mean that the slot is schedulable), in addition to K2 determination principle specified in 5G_UP_ALG_2500_replaced([11116648](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp5aX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), if there are consecutive UL slots exist in frame structure, only the first UL slot should be used for A-CSI scheduling. Then the 'k2aCsi' determination process for long PUCCH TDD [CB008577-O]or FDD beamforming cell[End CB008577-O] could be implemented roughly as below process.

Loop from the end of frame structure:

1. [CB008577-O]For TDD cell: [End CB008577-O]Find a U slot following S slot[CB008577-O]; for FDD beamforming cell: Find the last PRACH slot or the last UL slot(depends on SW)[End CB008577-O]

2. Find the nearest PDCCH slot before the U slot in range [k2minCsi, 12] which having k2 value and has not marked as eligible for A-CSI schedule.

a) If the PDCCH slot is found, mark the slot as eligible for A-CSI scheduling and update k2aCsi value if necessary.

3. Go to step 1 until all of U slot has been checked.

For tdLte Config0 frame structure, only the special slot in each half radio frame shall be marked as eligible for A-CSI scheduling with k2aCsi=6, and it's not required to determine the A-CSI dynamic k1 any more.

The tdLte Config0 available k1 and k2 values can be found in [11157417: tdLte Config0 frame structure timing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25FSLvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9).

Refer to algorithm in [11116648: A-CSI compatible K2 determination over the slot pattern.](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp5aX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

### 2.4.5.7 Slot Type selection (ID: 11157502)
#### 2.4.5.7.0-1 Slot Type selection SlotType is selected from slot configuration (ID: 11157507)

**2.4.5.7.0-3**  (ID: `11157586`)

Slot Type selection The 5G-L2-PS downlink scheduler shall grant msg3 on slot type equal to rrmMsg3SlotType.

For TDD, rrmMsg3SlotType is equal to C2.

[5GC000836-G] For FDD, rrmMsg3SlotType is equal to C0.

[5GC000885-A] If long PUCCH is configured then same applies to FDD [CB006064-A] and TDD [End CB006064-A] except that in FDD slot type C0 is replaced by slot type 31. [End 5GC000885-A]

[5GC001904-A] For an FDD carrier shared with LTE, rrmMsg3SlotType is equal to 32. It has 12 PUSCH symbols and 2 PUCCH symbols (see 5G_UP_ALG_2425_replaced([11115806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpyFlfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 13446).

---

#### 2.4.5.7.1 Indication of the Subframe Type to 5G-L1-DL (ID: 11157590)

**2.4.5.7.1.0-3**  (ID: `12721483`)

Indication of the Subframe Type to 5G-L1-DL As soon as 5G-L2-PS selects a valid NR-slot type (SS burst, P-RACH, DL data or UL data), it shall indicate it to 5G-L1-DL via message DlData_SlotTypeReq.

The slotType is no more used by the L1 on CPRI configuration since 19B.

Since 19B and on eCPRI configurations, the slotType is no more used by the L1 except for the PRACH slots and when the actEcpriPhase2 is set to false, for the SS/PBCH slots.

When the slot type is not used, the L1 relies on the regular messages sent by the L2 (DlData_SsBlockSendReq, DlData_CsiRsSendReq...).

For 5GC000501-A cell graceful shutdown, no matter CPRI or eCPRI , DlData_SlotTypeReq is still in use , as there is pwrReductionPerSymb_dB field in the message (see 5G_L1_IF_53_replaced([11512413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRpM9vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for power reduction.

pwrReductionPerSymb_dB IE in DlData_SlotTypeReq allows to reduce the transmission power on symbol basis for test purposes. Based on the received configuration, 5G-L2-PS shall behave as follows:

- If parameter pwrReductionSsSlot#n is included into the configuration with n being a valid SS NR-slot for the respective configuration, then 5G-L2-PS shall set pwrReductionPerSymb_dB to pwrReductionSsSlot#n for the SS NR-slot #n, otherwise no power reduction is applied to this NR-slot (all elements of the pwrReductionPerSymb_dB array are set to 0);
- For all other NR-slots no power reduction is applied;

 Notes : pwrReductionSsSlot# is not yet available in interface message, therefore pwrReductionPerSymb_dB shall be set to 0.

When *rdEnableBeamformingTestMode parameter (defined in 5G_L2_1018_replaced([11183749](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27lznfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is set to TRUE, 5G-L2-PS shall:*

- read power reduction values from a shared memory file, later called BeamformingTestMode.map in this requirement. BeamformingTestMode.map contains 64 hexadecimal values (only the first values are used for digital beamforming). Each value represents the power reduction value associated to a given beam ID, first value being associated to beam ID 0, second to beam ID 1, etc.

- set power reduction value associated to a beam ID as pwrReductionPerSymb_dB IE in message DlData_SlotTypeReq, for the symbols corresponding to this beam ID SS block (4 symbols).

It is clarified that this reduction is only valuable in FR2 and applying in the same way to all cells inside a same nrCellGrp. Thanks to that only in 5G19B and 5G20A and in FR2 only (CPRI and eCPRI) one message DlData_SlotTypeReq shall be sent to only one subcell in each L1 instances setting up (See l1PoolId for multiple L1 instance handling , 5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

- read periodically BeamformingTestMode.map file, in order to take into account new power reduction values dynamically, without the need to reboot 5G-L2-PS.

(5G-L2-PS reboot may be required for *rdEnableBeamformingTestMode parameter change to be taken into account).*

Parameter *pwrReductionPerSymb_dB in DlData_SlotTypeReq message does not affect CSI-RS transmissions; instead, their power is controlled by the parameter *pwrReductionPerCsiRsResource in message DlData_CsiRsSendReq, see 5G_L1_IF_103_replaced([11513061](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRuFePvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Rationale: CSI-RS for beam refinement are transmitted on the same symbols as SS/PBCH blocks but related to different beams. Controlling of power, however, shall be possible per beam. Therefore, both power parameters need to be adjustable separately which requires separate configuration values in BeamfromingTestMode.map for up to 8 SS/PBCH blocks and CSI-RS for beam management (4 refined beams per SS/PBCH block with independent power setting).**

Parameter *pwrReductionPerSymb_dB in DlData_SlotTypeReq message is also used for Graceful Cell Shutdown mechanism by increasing the value by 3 dB at each power reduction step. **[PR506959] Note: This PR removes CELL granularity of Graceful Cell Shutdown feature and so in theory it is deactivating 5GC000501-A. In reality there is no impact between PR506959 and 5GC000501-A as PR506959 is 5G19B & 5G20A only and 5GC000501-A available from 5G20B. ~~There shall be an activity from 5G20B to remove this dependency in order to reduce or remove usage of DlData_SlotTypeReq message (see CNI-54629)~~.***[End PR506959]******

[Before CNI-136895]L2 need send DlData_SlotTypeReq in slot contain SSB, **L1 check pwrReductionPerSymb_dB field to reduce power but not care of slotType filed in the message. this is common for both TDD and FDD****[CNI-136895]******

pwrReductionPerCsiRsResource_dB is set to 0xFF in a muted DSS cell, see 5G_UP_ALG_24747_replaced([11172109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuJoQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G-L2-PS only sends DlData_SlotTypeReq to L1 [CNI-136895] in SSB slots, PRACH slot and ULData slots [End CNI-136895] if the message has non-zero pwrReductionPerSymb_dB value. In order to reduce L1 CPU load and improve through put

See requirement 5G_L1_IF_53_replaced([11512413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRpM9vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for a description of the values that each power reduction can take.

**NOTE: Starting from 5G20B onwards, there is no need to define new slot types. The IE slotType shall be filled properly for PRACH or SSB slot (set to 0 for PRACH and 2 for SSB), otherwise this IE is useless **and can be set to any value (see 5G_L1_IF_53_replaced([11512413](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRpM9vvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).****

---

## 2.4.6 Power Control (ID: 11157607)

**2.4.6.0-1**  (ID: `11157611`)

Power Control Document Owner

Wang, Vincent 3. (NSB - CN/Hangzhou); Yuanying Xie (NSB)

---

### 2.4.6.1 DL Power Control (ID: 11157616)
#### 2.4.6.1.1 Maximum transmitted power per component carrier (ID: 11157621)
##### 2.4.6.1.1.0-1 Maximum transmitted power per component carrier (ID: 11157626)

**2.4.6.1.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11157632`)

Maximum transmitted power per component carrier When PsCell_CellSetupReq (see 5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) message is received, 5G-L2-PS shall calculate maximum transmitted power per component carrier and store it in cell configuration database:

maxTxPowerPerCC_mW = 10^(powerBudgetPerBeam / 100) * adjustmentCoefficient

with:

maxTxPowerPerCC_mW : Maximum transmitted power per component carrier

powerBudgetPerBeam : power budget per beam received from CP-RT in PsCell_CellSetupReq message (see 5G_L2_IF_73_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

To determine adjustmentCoefficient, 5G-L2-PS shall access following parameters from PsCell_CellSetupReq message: dlMimoMode, actBeamforming and numOfSubSectors (see 5G_L2_IF_73_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

If (dlMimoMode == ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_4x4 or dlMimoMode == OpenLoopSpatialMultiplexing_4x4 or dlMimoMode == ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4) and actBeamforming == FALSE and numOfSubSectors == 0:

adjustmentCoefficient = 4

Otherwise:

adjustmentCoefficient = 2

CP2 Reference: 5G_UP_ALG_2550_replaced([11118320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9PfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.6.1.1.0-2 Maximum transmitted power per component carrier (ID: 11157637)

**2.4.6.1.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11157642`)

Maximum transmitted power per component carrier When PsCell_PowerSavingConfigurationReq message is received, 5G-L2-PS shall access energySavingState from cell database and save it locally as previousEnergySavingState before it fills energySavingState with the new value.

If previousEnergySavingState == notEnergySaving and energySavingState == reducedEnergySaving,

5G-L2-PS shall divide maxTxPowerPerCC_mW value (see 5G_L2_7383_replaced([11157626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in linear domain by two.

Otherwise, if previousEnergySavingState == reducedEnergySaving and energySavingState == notEnergySaving,

5G-L2-PS shall multiply maxTxPowerPerCC_mW value (see 5G_L2_7383_replaced([11157626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) in linear domain by two.

CP2 Reference: 5G_UP_ALG_2550_replaced([11118320](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqB9PfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

#### 2.4.6.1.2 Power of PDSCH (ID: 11157648)
##### 2.4.6.1.2.0-1 Power of PDSCH Balance best beam and second best beam power (ID: 11157653)

**2.4.6.1.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11157659`)

Power of PDSCH To balance two 2D-DFT DL beams power received by UE, the transmitted power for beams shall be adjusted according to 5G_UP_ALG_13465_replaced([11118538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqDyZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

### 2.4.6.2 EIRP control (ID: 11157663)
#### 2.4.6.2.1 EIRP Measurement Procedure (ID: 11157669)
##### 2.4.6.2.1.0-1 EIRP Measurement Procedure Tables for EIRP Measurement (ID: 11157673)

**2.4.6.2.1.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12790377`)

EIRP Measurement Procedure 1)currSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeamsSet

BeamIds for beams used in current sampling period. For SSB/refine beam, beamId is the beamId received from PsCell_CellSetupReq. For other beams, beamId is the id allocated by 5G-L2-PS and only used for EIRP.

2)accumulatedPdschNormalizedPowerTable

accumulated power of PDSCH for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams + maxNumberOfPmiBeams + maxNumberOfSrsBeams + maxNumberOfTaperingBeams + maxNumberOfPowerSavingSrsBeams + maxNumberOfSubBandBeams.

3)accumulatedPdcchNormalizedPowerTable

accumulated power of PDCCH for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams + maxNumberOfPmiBeams + maxNumberOfSrsBeams + maxNumberOfTaperingBeams + maxNumberOfPowerSavingSrsBeams + maxNumberOfSubBandBeams.

4)accumulatedSsPbchNormalizedPowerTabl

accumulated power of SSPbch for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams.

5)accumulatedCsiRsTrackingNormalizedPowerTable

accumulated power of CSI-RS for tracking for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams.

6)accumulatedCsiRsBeamMgmtNormalizedPowerTable

accumulated power of CSI-RS for beam management for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams.

7)accumulatedCsiRsNormalizedTransmittedPowerTable

accumulated power of CSI-RS for CSI acquisition for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams.

8)accumulatedCsiRsNormalizedTransmittedPowerSrsBeamTable

accumulated power of CSI-RS for CSI acquisition for each beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamIdOffser of SRS beam. beamIdOffser = (beamId of current beam) – (minimum beamId of SRS beam).

Size of array = maxNumberOfSrsBeams.

9)prevSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeams

BeamIds for beams used in current sampling period. For SSB/refine beam, beamId is the beamId received from PsCell_CellSetupReq. For other beams, beamId is the id allocated by 5G-L2-PS and only used for EIRP.

10)prevSamplingPeriodPowerValueTable

accumulated power of all channels in previous sampling period for each beam.

Index of array is beamId.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSsbBeams + maxNumberOfPmiBeams + maxNumberOfSrsBeams + maxNumberOfTaperingBeams + maxNumberOfPowerSavingSrsBeams + maxNumberOfSubBandBeams

11)accumulatedCsiRsNormalizedTransmittedPowerSubBandBeamTable

accumulated power of CSI-RS for CSI acquisition for each UE using real time beam in current sampling period.

Index of array is beamIdOffset of real time beam. beamIdOffset = (beamId of current beam) – (minimum beamId of real time beam). Refer 5G_L2_14222_replaced([11158050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25I8kPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for beamId of real time beam.

Size of array = maxNumberOfSubBandBeams.

maxNumberOfSsbBeams: 64. Refer to the range of numberOfBeams in 5G_L2_IF_115_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

maxNumberOfPmiBeams: 448. Refer to the size of pmiBeamWeights[] in 5G_L2_IF_316_replaced([10972426](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UuxRPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

maxNumberOfSrsBeams: 512. Refer to the max size of dftGoBMapping in 5G_L2_IF_115_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

maxNumberOfTaperingBeams: same as maxNumberOfSrsBeams.

maxNumberOfPowerSavingSrsBeams: same as maxNumberOfSrsBeams.

maxNumberOfSubBandBeams: 176. Refer to 5G_L2_14240_replaced([11158069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25I8lPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: maxNumberOfSrsBeams is not changed but the real number of SRS beam may be changed when [Before CB014301-AA] cell's down tilt offset is [CB014301-AA] beamset NIDD parameters are [End CB014301-AA] online changed.

---

##### 2.4.6.2.1.0-2 EIRP Measurement Procedure EIRP Measurement Procedure Overview (ID: 11157689)

**2.4.6.2.1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12630360`)

EIRP Measurement Procedure a) In the sampling period n, when schedule SSBlock/CSI-RS/PDCCH/PDSCH, save the beamId for this scheduling to currSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeamsSet, and accumulate actual normalized transmitted power(5G_UP_ALG_2588_replaced([11118737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFAjfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for this scheduling and sum it to the correlated table(accumulatedPdschNormalizedPowerTable/accumulatedPdcchNormalizedPowerTable/ accumulatedSsPbchNormalizedPowerTable/accumulatedCsiRsTrackingNormalizedPowerTable/accumulatedCsiRsBeamMgmtNormalizedPowerTable/accumulatedCsiRsNormalizedTransmittedPowerTable/accumulatedCsiRsNormalizedTransmittedPowerSrsBeamTable/accumulatedCsiRsNormalizedTransmittedPowerSubBandBeamTable)

b) At the beginning of sampling period n+1, accumulate transmitted power for different channels for each beam, and save it to prevSamplingPeriodPowerValueTable. Copy beamIds in currSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeamsSet to prevSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeams.

c) In the sampling period n+1, calculate average normalized transmitted power(5G_UP_ALG_2594_replaced([11118781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFnm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for CEILING(prevSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeams.size/(slotsPerEirpSamplingPeriod - x)) beam in prevSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeams per slot and update the power to PM counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_CELL(5G_L2_573_replaced([11157756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25HHYfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). x is the steps of procedure need to be done after processing all the beams, for example, update PM counter EIRP_SEGMENT < Segment i> and so on.

d) After all beams in prevSamplingPeriodMonitoredBeams been processed, calculate actual EIRP(5G_UP_ALG_2600_replaced([11118801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and update related PM counters(EIRP_SEGMENT < Segment i>/ MAX_EIRP_SEGMENT(5G_L2_573_replaced([11157756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25HHYfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))))

[CB014005-B]

Note: when cell's beam update with PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq including PMI beam weight as in [12535861: Beam Configuration update](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_vdRK4B9AEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), normalizedBeamGain for PMI beam needs to be recalculated according to [11118723: online modification of EIRP parameters](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFAifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). The new calculated normalizedBeamGain is applied from the first sampling period after all calculation is done.

[End CB014005-B]

---

##### 2.4.6.2.2.0-1 EIRP Control Precedure EIRP Control Precedure Overview (ID: 11157708)

**2.4.6.2.2.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11157750`)

EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure 11157750: EIRP Control Precedure The main procedure is described here for the EIRP control, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2585_replaced([11118708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFAhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_4349_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_4639_replaced([11192414](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvkkhvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for detail.

[xlsx_desc]--- EIRP --- NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN NaN sampling period(n): -3.0 -2.0 -1.0 0.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 1.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 2.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 3.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 4.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 5.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 6.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 7.0 NaN NaN NaN NaN 8.0[/xlsx_desc][xlsx_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/attachments/m24dng_5G_L2_Entity_Level_file2573_0.xlsx[/xlsx_path]

a) At the end of each sampling period(n), update token bucket and initialize available token per slot for next sampling period(n+1):

rrmConsumedTokens(s,n) = ( SUM(b){accumulatedTxPower(b,s) * normalizedBeamGain(b,s)} / (powerReductionFactor_lin(s) * maxTxPowerPerCC_mW ) ) * rrmNumberOfAvailableTokensPerPeriod ;

rrmEirpControlTokenInTheBucket(s,n+1) = rrmEirpControlTokenInTheBucket(s,n) + rrmConsumedTokens(s,n-w) - rrmConsumedTokens(s,n)

rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,0) = rrmEirpControlTokenInTheBucket(s,n+1)

where,

- accumulatedTxPower(b,s): is the accumulated txPower for all transmission using beam(b) for segment(s) in an simapling period.

- normalizedBeamGain(b,s): is in PsCell_CellSetupReq.eirpControlConfig for SSB/Refine beam, or in PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq.eirpControl4SrsDftBeam for SRS DFT beam and/or tapering SRS DFT beam.

- powerReductionFactor_lin(s) : is the linear value of powerReductionFactor for segment(s) in PsCell_CellSetupReq message.

- maxTxPowerPerCC_mW: Maximum transmitted power per component carrier (see 5G_L2_7383_replaced([11157626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2616_replaced([11118946](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqG1v_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_2620_replaced([11118968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqHcxvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_4695_replaced([11192990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo18_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b) At the UE selection for cs2List of DL slot(i) (FDM enable case for example):

b.1) UE selection for cs2List in TD

copyAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) = rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,i);

copyCs2List = cs2List;

cs2List reset to empty;

FOR (nonGbr newTx UE(k) in copyCs2List ):

b = UE(k).beam; //best beam, and second best beam if it's available.

remainRb(b) = argMin(s){copyAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) / (rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) * numberOfDlSymbolsSlot(i))};

IF (remainRb(b) > 0 ):

add UE(k) to Cs2List;

FOR each segment(s):

comsumedToken(s) = numOfPrbPerRbg * (rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) * numberOfDlSymbolsSlot(i));

copyAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) - = comsumedToken(s);

END

END

END

where,

- rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) = normalizedBeamGain(b,s) / (powerReductionFactor_lin(s) * rrmMaxNumPrbDl). Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2629_replaced([11119080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqID2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4349_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

b.2) FDM WRR

copyAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) = rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,i);

While (resource distribution not finished):

select a nonGbr newTx UE(k) from toBeDistributeUeList;

b = UE(k).beam; //best beam, and second best beam if it's available.

remainEirpRb(b) = argMin(s){copyAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) / (rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) * numberOfDlSymbolsSlot(i))};

remainEirpRbg(b) = remainEirpRb(b) / numPrbPerRbg(UE(k));

distributeRbg = min(remainEirpRbg(b), availableRbgBwp(UE(k)), resPerRound);

UE(k).numberOfDistributedResources += distributeRbg;

FOR each segment(s):

comsumedToken(s) = numOfPrbPerRbg*distributeRbg * (rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s) * numberOfDlSymbolsSlot(i));

copyAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s) - = comsumedToken(s);

END

END

Note, in case of SRS DFT beam, there has 3 beams (1 best beam for one beam only transmisison and 1 beam pair for two beams transmission) selected from beam selection(5G_UP_ALG_6995_replaced([11156011](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksy9U_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the use of best beam or the beam pair in this slot is still not determined in this stage, so for simplify, it's always use pair beam for the EIRP control in this stage. After scheduling, the step c) will use the actual used beam to calculate the comsumed token and control next slot's EIPR.

c) After success scheduling UE/Tx (e.g., FdResp, CsiRsSendReq, ...) of DL slot(i):

FOR each UE(k)/Tx(k):

//example of PDSCH scheduling

b = UE(k).beam; //best beam, and second best beam if it's available.

FOR each segment(s):

eirpTokenPerRb = rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb(b,s);

IF UE(k) is MU pairing in slot(i):

eirpTokenPerRb = eirpTokenPerRb * txPowerFactor;

END

comsumedToken(s) = numOfPrbPdschUe(k) * (eirpTokenPerRb * numberOfDlSymbolsSlot(i));

rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,i) - = comsumedToken(s);

END

The real txPower shall be accuumlate to accumulatedTxPower(b,s) for each transmission.

END

where,

- txPowerFactor, refer to 5G_L2_4767_replaced([11167010](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2538V_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4695_replaced([11192990](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvo18_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

d) At the post scheduling of DL slot(i):

rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,i+1) = rrmAvailableEirpTokensInCurrentSlot(s,i) + rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) * numberOfDlSymbolsSlot(i+1)

where,

- rrmEirpControlAvailableTokensPerSymbol(s) = rrmMinEirpTokensPerPeriod(s) / number of DL symbols in the samplingPeriod, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2629_replaced([11119080](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqID2fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

- rrmMinEirpTokensPerPeriod(s) is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2618_replaced([11118951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqHcwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note:

- In case of [Before CB013098-C] DL MUMIMO enhancement enabled (actDlMuMimoEnh=True) and tapering enabled (dlMuMimoTaperingH>0 and/or dlMuMimoTaperingV>0) [CB013098-C] DL tapering is configured (see 5G_L2_4981_replaced([11165432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ycwPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB013098-C], the beam b need extend to include tapering SRS DFT beam together with non-tapering SRS DFT beam as follows:

- in step a), c), d): the beam need extend to tapering DFT beam if it's used.

- in step b): for UE using DFT beam, it's assume it is still SU UE in this step and non-tapering DFT beam used for simplify, due to whether use tapering DFT beam or not is still unknow in this stage.

[CB013098-C] - in step a): the tapering srs dft beam's normalizedBeamGain(b,s) will always be received in message of PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq.eirpControl4SrsDftBeam which follows PsCell_CellSetupReq message,even if actDlMuMimoEnh=false in PsCell_CellSetupReq message. 5G_L2_PS shall still process normalizedBeamGain same as the case of actDlMuMimoEnh=true, but the usage of tapering beam shall untill the DL tapering is enabled (see 5G_L2_4981_replaced([11165432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ycwPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB013098-C]

---

#### 2.4.6.2.3 EIRP counters (ID: 11157756)
##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-1 EIRP counters Determination of Transmitted Power for Power Contribution and EIRP counters (ID: 11157761)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12709336`)

EIRP counters Six tables *AccumulatedXXXXNormalizedPowerTables are created for each channel type considered, with 64 elements corresponding to the number of beams; up to 64 beams can be defined (beam id 0 to 63).*

One table Prev_**Sampling_Period_Beam_Power_Table (beam1 … beam64) is created.**

In case of FDD, only one beam is considered (see 5G_UP_ALG_2184_replaced([11112739](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpZEBfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Two tables for EIRP counters are created:

**Prev_Normalized_EIRP_Seg (Segments)**

Max_EIRP_Values (Segments)

At each transmission to L1, the transmitted power is considered; for subfeatures A / B common channels only are considered, for subfeature D UE specific channels .

Local tables *AccumulatedXXXXNormalizedPowerTables *are updated.**

for SSB beams

SS/PBCH Transmitted Power and CSI-RS tracking S/PBCH Transmitted Power

PDCCH, PDSCH Transmitted Power

for refined beams

CSI-RS Beam management, CSI-RS for channel measurement

Virtual SSB Beams are considered in case of EIRP enabled for TDD supercell. They are treated similar to SSB beams for these table updates. [CB009543-C1] For FDD supercell beam ID of the counters map to corresponding super subcell index [End CB009543-C1].

At each sampling period expiry, the calculation of the value of increment for each beam is proceeded using the local tables *AccumulatedXXXXNormalizedPowerTable*s previously updated.**

The accumulated power stored is then averaged by the number of DL symbols during the sampling period:

Averaged accumulated power (SS beam i) = (Sampling_Duration_Power_Value(beamID) /Nbr of DL symbols) * Duty cycle

Then it is multiplied by the maximum transmitted power per component carrier (see 5G_L2_7383_replaced([11157626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

Time averaged power contribution = Averaged accumulated power * maxTxPowerPerCC_mW

The result in 10-3 W : time averaged power contribution is then freezed in the table **Prev_**Sampling_Period_Power_Beam_Table, and values contained in initial tables AccumulatedXXXXNormalizedPowerTables are erased.****

CP2 reference: 5G_UP_ALG_2594_replaced([11118781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFnm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-2 EIRP counters Counter updates for Supercell (ID: 11157781)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12699926`)

EIRP counters If EIRP is enabled for TDD supercell, there is 1 to 1 mapping between supercell subcells, virtual beams and supercell segments for the pupose of EIRP counters and control aspects. Virtual beams and supercell segments are mapped to corresponding supercell subcells in the same order are configured in the cell setup.

[CB009543-C1] If EIRP is enabled for FDD supercell, there is 1 to 1 mapping between supercell subcells and supercell beams, segments for the pupose of EIRP counters and control aspects. Supercell segments are mapped to corresponding supercell subcells in the same order are configured in the cell setup. [End CB009543-C1]

Hence the mapping of EIRP counters are also done in the same manner.

Counter reports the data for each beam ID where the first beam ID numbering/mapping starts from the first [Before CB009543-C1] virtual beam [CB009543-C1] virtual beam of TDD supercell. For FDD supercell beam ID of the counters map to corresponding super subcell index [End CB009543-C1]

Counter reports the data for each segment ID where the first segment ID numbering/mapping starts from the first supercell segment.

Note : Segment indexing starts from 1. hence super subcell 0 linked to virtual beam 0 is mapped to segment 1 in EIRP counters

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-3 EIRP counters Counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM (ID: 11157792)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12709340`)

EIRP counters **Counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM< beam_ID>**

At slot x, the beam Id x is considered.

The Power_Beam value for the ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM counter incrementation is retrieved from table **Prev_**Sampling_Period_Power_Value_Table(beam Idx) .****

This counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM will be incremented for beam ID x , at slot x+1 this counter will be incremented for beam ID x+1 an so on.

In the same slot x, segment y is considered :

The Power_Beam value of beam x is multiplied by the invidual normalizedBeamGain (beam Idx) for cell segment y

 it is the normalized EIRP factor ~~(~~~~10-2~~ ~~W)~~ for cell segment y(used also for purpose of EIRP control) (see 5G_UP_ALG_2601_replaced([11118804](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

 [CB009543-C1] In case of FDD supercell, consider normalizedBeamGain from the primary subcell(first beam/first segment) to be multiplied for all beams/segments. Further apply EIRP normalization for segment y as per [12710411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_NwbYoWYUEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g) [End CB009543-C1]

 it is then added in table **Prev_Normalized_EIRP_Seg (seg y)**

The same process is done for all the cell segments taking into account the beam Id x .

In case of FDD [CB009543-C1] normal cell [End CB009543-C1], only one beam is considered.

Virtual SSB Beams are considered in case of TDD supercell. [CB009543-C1] Each configured supersubcell is considered as a beam in FDD supercell. [End CB009543-C1] Only first n counters are updated where n = NRCELL.numOfSuperSubcells

CP2 reference: 5G_UP_ALG_2594_replaced([11118781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFnm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-4 EIRP counters Counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_CELL (ID: 11157807)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `12709341`)

EIRP counters **Counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_CELL**

This counter sums for all the beams of the cell counters ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM< beam_ID>

At each ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM [NumberofBeams (i) ] incrementation the counter ACTUAL_TX_POWER_CELL is incremented.

Virtual SSB Beams are considered in case of TDD supercell [CB009543-C1] Each configured supersubcell is considered as a beam in FDD supercell [End CB009543-C1] and values from first n counters of ACTUAL_TX_POWER_BEAM [NumberofBeams (i) ] are used to increment ACTUAL_TX_POWER_CELL where n = NRCELL.numOfSuperSubcells

CP2 reference: 5G_UP_ALG_2594_replaced([11118781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqFnm_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-5 EIRP counters Counter EIRP_SEGMENT (ID: 11157823)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `12709342`)

EIRP counters Counter EIRP_SEGMENT < Segment i>

---

## At slot [MaxNumberofBeams (64) + 2 ]

## In this slot, counter EIRP_SEGMENT segments is incremented for all the segments.

## 60 segments are considered , from segment id 1 to segment id 60 .

## In case of TDD [CB009543-C1] and FDD [End CB009543-C1] supercell, only first n segments are considered where n = NRCELL.numOfSuperSubcells

## At this slot, the possible 64 beams have updated the table Prev_Normalized_EIRP_Seg (cell seg i), the values contained in the table can be considered.

## For Segment i, to determine the value of increment for counter EIRP_SEGMENT the content of Prev_Normalized_EIRP_Seg (i) shall be taken into account .

## It is multiplied by the technology duty cycle and maximum steerable gain in linear domain.

[CB009543-C1] In case of FDD supercell, apply EIRP normalization for segment i as per [12710411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_NwbYoWYUEfCwWbD4x7Iu-g) [End CB009543-C1]

With the value, the counter EIRP_SEGMENT < Segment i> is updated.

CP2 reference: 5G_UP_ALG_13214_replaced([11118814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-6 EIRP counters Counter MAX_EIRP_SEGMENT (ID: 11157839)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-6.0-4**  (ID: `13443767`)

EIRP counters Counter MAX_EIRP_SEGMENT

At slot [MaxNumberofBeams (64) + 3 ]

In this slot, counter MAX_EIRP_SEGMENT segments is incremented for all the segments.

60 segments are considered , from segment id 1 to segment id 60 .

In case of TDD and FDD supercell, only first n segments are considered where n = NRCELL.numOfSuperSubcells

To increment the counter :

The actual EIRP value for cell segment i is compared to the existing one previously stored in the local table MAX_EIRP_VALUES (segID). If the value obtained is greather than the existing value in the table it will replace the previous one in table, the counter MAX_EIRP_SEGMENT is incremented.

In the case of inferior, nothing is stored nor incremented.

CP2 reference: 5G_UP_ALG_13214_replaced([11118814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB014326-A] From 27R1, the counters MAX_EIRP_SEGMENT are removed. [End CB014326-A]

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-7 EIRP counters Counter EIRP_SAMPLES (ID: 11157855)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-7.0-3**  (ID: `12709344`)

EIRP counters Counter EIRP_SAMPLES

---

## At slot [NumberofBeams (64) + 4 ]

## In case of TDD [CB009543-C1] and FDD [End CB009543-C1] supercell, NumberofBeams = NRCELL.numOfSuperSubcells

Counter EIRP_SAMPLES is incremented by 1.

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-8 EIRP counters Counter EIRP_HR_SLIDING_SEGMENT (ID: 13443625)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `13443733`)

EIRP counters Counter EIRP_HR_SLIDING_SEGMENT

60 segments are considered, from segment_ID 1 to segment_ID 60.

At each sampling period (i.e. 10 * eirpControlTimeAveragingWindowStepSize), the counter EIRP_HR_SLIDING_SEGMENT is computed as follows:

EIRP_HR_SLIDING_SEGMENT = (Scaling Factor) * EIRP_TH_SEGMENT / MAX_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT

Where:

- Scaling Factor = 100 to ensure a two-digit precision for counters.
- EIRP_TH_SEGMENT is computed at cell setup (Cf. below for details)
- MAX_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT is existing counter (Cf. the M55324C005xx counters series)

 Note: If MAX_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT = 0, it shall be considered as 1 for the computation of EIRP_HR_SLIDING_SEGMENT

At cell setup, the counter EIRP_TH_SEGMENT is computed as follows:

EIRP_TH_SEGMENT = PTXM * FTDC * GMLB * FPR_

Where:

- PTXM = Maximum transmitted power per component carrier (Cf. [11157626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
- FTDC = Transmission duty cycle factor
- GMLB= Beam gain for the main lobe
- FPR_ = Power reduction factor of

 At cell reconfiguration triggered by the on-line change of the following parameters, the counter EIRP_TH_SEGMENT is recalculated as per formula above:

- eirpControlPowerReductionFactorList (i.e. FPR_ is potentially changed)
- maxBeamGain (i.e. GMLBis changed)

 CP2 reference: [13404896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ae2cAykEfGu_4itz1o3RA?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

---

##### 2.4.6.2.3.0-9 EIRP counters Counter NORM_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT (ID: 13443661)

**2.4.6.2.3.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `13443761`)

EIRP counters Counter NORM_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT

60 segments are considered, from segment_ID 1 to segment_ID 60.

At each sampling period (i.e. 10 * eirpControlTimeAveragingWindowStepSize), the counter NORM_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT is computed as follows:

NORM_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT = (Scaling Factor) * MAX_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT / EIRP_BASELINE_SEGMENT

Where:

- Scaling Factor = 100 to ensure a two-digit precision for counters.
- EIRP_BASELINE_SEGMENT is computed at cell setup (Cf. below for details)
- MAX_EIRP_SLIDING_SEGMENT is existing counter (Cf. the M55324C005xx counters series)

 At cell setup, the counter EIRP_BASELINE_SEGMENT is computed as follows:

EIRP_BASELINE_SEGMENT = PTXM * FTDC * GMLB * D

Where:

- PTXM = Maximum transmitted power per component carrier (Cf. [11157626](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25GgTfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9))
- FTDC = Transmission duty cycle factor
- GMLB = Beam gain for the main lobe
- D = Normalized beam gain for computed as follows:

 For each segment , retrieve in normalizedBeamGain[] table, the beam with the highest gain: this related gain is the D

At cell reconfiguration triggered by the on-line change of the following parameters, the counter EIRP_BASELINE_SEGMENT is recalculated as per formula above:

- normalizedBeamGain (i.e. D is potentially changed)
- maxBeamGain (i.e. GMLB is changed)

 CP2 reference: [11118804](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)

---

dlMimoMode = ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4 cell, the normalizedBeamGain is not configured any more, and it is calculated with a new algorithm.

As the alogrithm support online calculation, the algorithm is split into the steps that can be done in each slot and should not block the schedule in any slot. That is, calculating a single PMI beam's normalizedBeamGain in each slot post handler. The algorithm steps is as follow:

1) Get a PMI beam weights

After this step, we get a vector with numOfCellSegments (see 5G_L2_IF_317_replaced([10972433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UuxRfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) elements. Each element is the response for the PMI beam in each segment, and it is a float complex variable.

Use the norm of

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).in step 3) and TRX number numOfTrxPerPolarization (see 5G_L2_IF_315_replaced([10972389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UuKV_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

After step 1) to 4), we get the result of a PMI beam's normalizedBeamGain in each segment, and it is numOfCellSegments (see 5G_L2_IF_317_replaced([10972433](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UuxRfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) elements.

5) loop the steps 1) to 4) to calculate all the PMI’s normalizedBeamGain

All the PMI’s normalizedBeamGain will be got after N slots (N is the total number of PMI beams, exclude CSI-RS beams. The total number depend on NIDD parameter maxCsirsNumber).

CP2 references: 5G_UP_ALG_2607_replaced([11118832](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_2608_replaced([11118844](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOq_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_2609_replaced([11118856](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOrPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_2610_replaced([11118860](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.6.2.4.0-2 NormalizedBeamGain of CL 8x4 cell EIRP control Trigger of algorithm calculation (ID: 11157960)

**2.4.6.2.4.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11157971`)

NormalizedBeamGain of CL 8x4 cell EIRP control If a cell’s PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq with dftBeamResponseInEachSegment present is received, L2-PS start to calculate the algorithm.

**Notes: During algorithm calculation, if another PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq comes**[Before CB008133-B], need**[CB008133-B] with the same discriminator, as received in the previous PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSeqReq message, then 5G-L2-PS needs**[End CB008133-B] to restart algorithm calculation, and the calculated PMI’s normalizedBeamGain need to reset and re-calculate.********

---

##### 2.4.6.2.4.0-3 NormalizedBeamGain of CL 8x4 cell EIRP control Usage of PMI beam’s normalizedBeamGain (ID: 11157977)

**2.4.6.2.4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11157989`)

NormalizedBeamGain of CL 8x4 cell EIRP control The normalizedBeamGain is used for EIRP control in different scenarios.

1. Calculating the minRrmNormalizedEirpBudget in each segment, use the smallest value of all the beams.

2. UE's rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerRb used in DL schedule, including PDCCH or PDSCH.

For dlMimoMode=ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4 cell, normalizedBeamGain can be got in different scenarios, including internal antenna and external antenna.

1) Internal antena

Before all the PMI beam’s normalizedBeamGain is ready, use the SSB beam’s configured normalizedBeamGain.

After all the PMI beam’s normalizedBeamGain is ready, use the PMI beam's normalizedBeamGain.

[PR645454]

Before receiving PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq from CPRT, UE may attach successfully and use PMI beam’s noralizedBeamGain for EIRP control. In this case, UE’s selected SSB beam gain should be used.

[End PR645454]

2) External antenna

CPRT will not send PsCell_CellPmiBeamDataSetReq, and L2-PS need not to calculate any PMI beam’s normalizedBeamGain. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2607_replaced([11118832](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for usage of a PMI beam's normalizedBeamGain.

---

**2.4.6.2.5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11158005`)

NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22030_replaced([11118888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqG1sPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

##### 2.4.6.2.5.0-2 NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam Indication of EIRP Correlation Coefficient Calculation (ID: 11158009)

**2.4.6.2.5.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11158020`)

NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam [CB009527-E]

{ In eCPRI 7-2a (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) [End CB009527-E]

Indicate L1 for EIRP correlation coefficient calculation every sampling period through UlData_SrsReceiveReq->srsBwv->SrsBwvReportRequest->bfSubbandId when operation = “calculate” in the message(5G_L2_9827_replaced([11155365](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_244d1_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))/5G_L1_IF_235_replaced([11514315](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR2oW_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

bfSubbandId should be sent in a sweeping way.

Incomplete subband will not be sent for EIRP correlation coefficient calculation.

[CB009527-E]} [End CB009527-E]

[CB009527-E]

{ In eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Per EIRP sampling period, eirpControlTimeAveragingWindowStepSize (refer 5G_L2_14222_replaced([11158050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25I8kPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) , L2PS shall indicate L1 for EIRP correlation coefficients calculation through DlData_PdschSendReq ->PdschRtBfConfig -> eirpEnable when rtBfUeIndex with MSB bits 0~3 value =1, detail refer 5G_L1_IF_15395_replaced([11512737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpO_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G_L2_PS doesn't need indicate the bfSubbandId , radio will select by itself.

Note: PDSCH uses RT beam has other conditions , when L2Ps is ready to request EIRP correlation coefficients calculation, but PDSCH can't scheduled with RT beam, the indication can't be sent out, then the process shall refer 5G_L2_14225_replaced([11158041](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25I8jvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

}

[End CB009527-E]

Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_22212_replaced([11156683](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks2ntvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

##### 2.4.6.2.5.0-3 NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam Trigger of Algorithm Calculation (ID: 11158025)

**2.4.6.2.5.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11158035`)

NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam [CB009527-E]

The real time beam's coefficients is received by:

In eCPRI 7-2a (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UlData_SrsReceiveRespBwvPs, refer 5G_L1_IF_14858_replaced([11514505](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32ePvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), DlData_PdschSendRespPs, refer 5G_L1_IF_15405_replaced([11513016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRtecPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB009527-E]

5G-L2-PS will check if new coefficient received by the UE who has real time beamId. If received, normalizedBeamGain will be calculated.

Consider of performance, only one UE will be processed per slot. If there has several UEs with new coefficient in this slot, 5G-L2-PS will choose one UE to calculate normalizedBeamGain. Others will be processed in following slots.

---

##### 2.4.6.2.5.0-4 NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam Usage of Real Time Beam's NormalizedBeamGain (ID: 11158041)

**2.4.6.2.5.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11158045`)

NormalizedBeamGain of Real Time Beam The normalizedBeamGain is used for EIRP measurement and control in different scenarios.

1. Calculating the actual normalized EIRP and actual EIRP(5G_UP_ALG_2600_replaced([11118801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqGOofvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

2. normalizedBeamGain not impact calculation of minRrmNormalizedEirpBudget

3. normalizedBeamGain impact Ue's rrmNumberOfEirpTokenPerPrb

Before normalizedBeamGain is ready for UE, UE may use real time beam for scheduling. In this case, assume UE is scheduled via SSB beam for EIRP measurement and control.

---

#### 2.4.6.2.6 BeamId for Real Time Beam (ID: 11158050)
##### 2.4.6.2.6.0-1 BeamId for Real Time Beam Overview (ID: 11158055)

**2.4.6.2.6.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11158066`)

BeamId for Real Time Beam In case of scheduling by real time beams, these beams are converted to one beam per UE for EIRP measurement and control.

So 5G-L2-PS shall assign one beamId for UE configured with WB SRS. And when the UE is configured to SB SRS and beamId is no longer used, the beamId should be released so that it can be used by other UEs.

According to the procedure of EIRP measurement, beam used in sampling period n will be processed in sampling period n+1. So if UE is configured to SB SRS at sampling period n, beamId for real time beam shall not be release until the end of sampling period n+1.

for real time beam UE, which using beamId corresponding to real time beam to control EIRP resource in WRR precedure before UE MU pairing decision, after MU pairing decision, UE using DFT beam if UE is in pairing status, else using real time beam.

[CB009527-E]

Note:

The WB SRS has remaned as SB BF SRS, and SB SRS has remaned as WB BF SRS, for habitual understanding, the names's rewording is not done yet.

[End CB009527-E]

---

##### 2.4.6.2.6.0-2 BeamId for Real Time Beam Number of BeamIds Reserved for Real Time Beam (ID: 11158069)

**2.4.6.2.6.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11158081`)

BeamId for Real Time Beam Since 5G-L2-PS should maintain beamIds for real time beams in 2 sampling periods, enough beamIds should be reserved for different UEs configured with WB SRS in 2 sampling periods.

Max number of real time beamIds = 2 * max number of UE configure with WB SRS per sampling period.

Max number of UE configure with WB SRS per sampling period = MAX(maxNumUeSrs) * (CEILING(MAX(eirpControlTimeAveragingWindowStepSize)/MIN(rrmWbSrsReleaseProhibitTimer) +1 )

maxNumUeSrs is indicated by Cplane through PsCell_CellSetupReq->bfSetup (5G_L2_IF_115_replaced([10968891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). According to NRCELL/maxNumUeSrs,

eirpControlTimeAveragingWindowStepSize is indicated by Cplane through PsCell_CellSetupReq->eirpControlConfig(5G_L2_IF_118_replaced([10969144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UbPQvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))/PsCell_CellReconfigurationReq->eirpControlReconf(5G_L2_IF_4057_replaced([10971382](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UoDk_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). According to NRCELL/eirpControlTimeAveragingWindowStepSize, max value is 1000ms.

rrmWbSrsReleaseProhibitTimer is calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_22981_replaced([11158664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktEDGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Min value is 100 slots

[CB009527-E]

Below is examples:

The maxNumUeSrs=16, then at least 2 * 16 * (CEILING(1000 * 2/100) +1 ) =672 BeamIDs shall be reserved for subband BF EIRP calculation.

[End CB009527-E]

### 2.4.6.3 UL Power Control (ID: 11158100)
#### 2.4.6.3.0-1 UL Power Control Power boost for PUSCH (ID: 11158103)

**2.4.6.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11158108`)

UL Power Control When 5G-L2-PS receives PsCell_CellSetupReq (5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PsCell_CellReconfigurationReq (5G_L2_IF_1988_replaced([10971056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Um1c_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), it shall store value of actPmiSinrUlMuMimo in cell related database.

5G-L2-PS shall compute pBoost for PUSCH transmission (5G_L2_900_replaced([11179058](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27DoHfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) based on stored values of actPmiSinrUlMuMimo and actUlMuMimo (5G_L2_IF_2296_replaced([10968800](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UZaH_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_IF_2299_replaced([10971564](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UpRsPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) according to 5G_UP_ALG_19880_replaced([11119457](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgGvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
