[CB006449-AB]

 For FR1 intra-band UL CA UE, if UE power state is false (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_28261_replaced([11123109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or the UE is not a single Tx UE and aperiodic SRS is configured on PCell and the result of a long-term rank evaluation is rank1 (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_3226_replaced([11139957](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krq79_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End CB006449-AB]

##### 2.4.7.2.3.0-3 Buffer based SCell activation (FR1 CA) SCell selection for FR1 CA (ID: 11159110)

**2.4.7.2.3.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `12882320`)

Buffer based SCell activation (FR1 CA) Scell selection for FR1 CA is performed in DL scheduler, no matter activation is triggered by DL or UL.

Scell selection perform two steps:

Step1: Determine the number of Scells to be activated. Algorithm refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2722_replaced([11121245](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqXUYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Step2: Select Scells according to high load determination rules. Algorithm refer to 5G_UP_ALG_8840_replaced([11121235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWtXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_2724_replaced([11121256](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqXUZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

DL scheduler use 3 level high load determination rules:

 Rule 1: Check if the number of CA UE on PCell and its L2 subpool is under limitation as 5G_L2_15817_replaced([11159207](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25PqNfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). If yes, the current UE can't activate any Scell. If no, go to Rule 2.

 Rule 2: Loop all added Scells for the UE: if the Scell is in high load. (The high load status is measured in Scell and send to Pcell by l2_ps_peerCtrl_ScellMeasurementReq), the Scell can not to be a candidate Scell to be activated, otherwise add it to candidate List. After the loop, go to Rule3.

 Rule 3: Choose the lowest ADR cell in all candidate Scell List to be active.

Based on 5G_UP_ALG_2724_replaced([11121256](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqXUZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_8840_replaced([11121235](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWtXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), there are some typical activation scenarios as below. In case the Scell load is high or the number of CA UE in Pcell is high, the selected SCell may be unaligned with trigger in some cases, i.e. scenario 2, scenario 4, scenario 5.

Some special procedures or constraints for these scenarios are described in "Comment" column.

Note:

All the 6 scenarios are based on the assumption that the number of CA UE on Pcell is not exceed rdMaxActiveCaUe.

[CB013709-CB]In bellow table, if an SCell is excluded for activation due to overload, increase the PM counter in [12533505: Total number of times the DL countermeasure type 8 is active](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_DJGIoRxJEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).[End CB013709-CB]

            **** **** **** **** [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP5_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP5_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP5_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP5_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24IP5_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

| | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Scenario | Trigger | Scell selected result | Comment |
| 1 | UL only | Joint DL/UL cell [CB013709-CB] if the cell is not overloaded with sCellDlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE and sCellDlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE, and sCellUlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE, and sCellUlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE(see 11146897: SCell load update and forwarding)[End CB013709-CB] | In this scenario only UL scheduling needed in joint DL/UL cell. So no Scell DL scheduling, it may lead to kind of waste of DPA / pucch. |
| 2 | No Scell selected | In this scenario the joint DL/UL cell is a high load cell(based on the measurements from joint DL/UL cell), it can’t be activated. So no Scell selected. | |
| 3 | DL only | DL only cell [CB013709-CB] if the cell is not overloaded with sCellDlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE and sCellDlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE(see 11146897: SCell load update and forwarding)[End CB013709-CB] | It is a normal case, but only one thing to be highlighted is that Scell DL won't notify Scell UL to activate because Scell UL don't need scheduling. |
| 4 | Joint DL/UL cell [CB013709-CB] if the cell is not overloaded with sCellDlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE and sCellDlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE(see 11146897: SCell load update and forwarding)[End CB013709-CB] | It is a normal case, Pcell UL will send buffer split = 0 to Scell UL. | |
| 5 | DL and UL | DL only cell [CB013709-CB] if the cell is not overloaded with sCellDlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE and sCellDlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE(see 11146897: SCell load update and forwarding)[End CB013709-CB] | In this scenario because the joint DL/UL cell is a high load cell and can't be determined as a candidate cell, choose a DL only cell based on ADR. As a result Scell DL will not notify Scell UL and Pcell DL will not notify Pcell UL by FR1_Activation_ACK. |
| 6 | Joint DL/UL cell [CB013709-CB] if the cell is not overloaded with sCellDlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE and sCellDlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE, and sCellUlRtForbidActTrigger = FALSE, and sCellUlCoreOverloadTrigger = FALSE(see 11146897: SCell load update and forwarding)[End CB013709-CB] | Normal procedure as expected. | |

##### 2.4.7.2.3.0-4 Buffer based SCell activation (FR1 CA) Fast path activation (ID: 11159132)

**2.4.7.2.3.0-4.0-2**  (ID: `11159142`)

Buffer based SCell activation (FR1 CA) Fast path activation

When SCell swap is performed using PsUser_UserModifyReq.remoteSCellToAddList, the added SCell is configured with PsUser_UserModifyReq.remoteSCellToAddList.fastPathActivation = true.

In such case 5G-L2-PS shall perform the SCell activation immediately following the Blind SCell activation procedure when following conditions are also met:

- swapped SCell had been active before the swap (the one described in PsUser_UserModifyReq.remoteScellToRelease of the same message where new SCell is added)
- new SCell is not high load (scellLoadStateForActivation flag set "high load" for SCell per definition from 5G_UP_ALG_2683_replaced([11120559](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqR03PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_8848_replaced([11123534](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqkIs_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).
- [CB008236-B] UE is NOT in TP enabled::SAG On state(see 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) OR NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf ='None' OR UE's SCell activation method is Blind SCells Activation [End CB008236-B]

 For SFS requirement please see 5G_UP_ALG_2703_replaced([11120833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqURHvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.2.3.0-5 Buffer based SCell activation (FR1 CA) SCell activation check prevention (ID: 11159147)

**2.4.7.2.3.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `12531061`)

Buffer based SCell activation (FR1 CA) In order to limit CA related CPU load increase per slot, when actCaOverloadCtrlEnh(5G_L2_IF_73_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdActCaOverloadCtrlEnh(5G_L2_21410_replaced([11184837](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tvbfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) are both TRUE and rdCaLoadControlFeatController(5G_L2_21408_replaced([11184827](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tva_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) activates the FR1 CA check reduction functionality, slot specific SCell activation check shall be prevented if any one of the following conditions fulfilled:

- The CA UE is in the list from distribution table corresponding to current TTI, but not selected due to UE number restriction defined by rdMaxUeNumPerCheckingIndex, refer to 5G_L2_20014_replaced([11184817](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tvafvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only applicable for DL buffer check, UE with active Scell(s) not limited by this condition.

- [CB013709-CB]And extended CA countermeasures are disabled as per [12551499: Countermeasures for CA](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_o9NFcCRJEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)[End CB013709-CB] [Before CB013709-CB]The[CB013709-CB]the [End CB013709-CB]CPU core which CA UE’s PCell running on is in high load state as described in 5G_L2_19965_replaced([11213408](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-rj3vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), only applicable for DL buffer check.

[CB013709-CB] If extended CA countermeasures are enabled as per [12551499: Countermeasures for CA](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_o9NFcCRJEfCNjfqfyUlvmw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), if on the core, any DL/UL scheduler is overload as [11120584: CA Relationship management for FR1 due to scheduler processing overload](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqSb4vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), or the core is overload as [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), slot specific SCell activation check shall be prevented, [Before PR873300]only applicable for DL buffer check. Refer [PR873300] and the preventing shall be implemented on different schedulers referring [End PR873300]to [11120866: SCell activation / deactivation evaluation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).[End CB013709-CB]

---

#### 2.4.7.2.4 Interworking with Power Saving BWP (ID: 11159161)
##### 2.4.7.2.4.0-1 Interworking with Power Saving BWP Impact for Scell's activations (ID: 11159166)

**2.4.7.2.4.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159171`)

Interworking with Power Saving BWP When UE is currently scheduled inside Power Saving BWP (BWP with type = powerSaving) then L2-PS shall not activate any SCells regardless of activation method. Activation of any SCell for UE is possible once switch from Power Saving BWP to Large BWP has been done.

---

#### 2.4.7.2.5 Interworking with DPA algorithm (ID: 11159176)

#### 2.4.7.2.5-1 Interworking with DPA algorithm Active CA UE Pooling for FR1 CA with DPA (ID: 11159207)

**2.4.7.2.5-1.0-4**  (ID: `12321709`)

Interworking with DPA algorithm When a UE without SCell activated, it is not an active CA UE. If the UE need to activate at least one SCell to become an active CA UE, following steps have to be checked. Only when all the conditions are true, the activation can be executed.

(1) If number of active CA UE number in the UE's PCell < cellMaxAcitveCaUe;

(2) If number of active CA UE number in the UE's L2 subPool < subPoolMaxActiveCaUe.

Where:

- cellMaxAcitveCaUe = 40 as default;

- subPoolMaxActiveCaUe = 40 as default;

For FR1 FDD Cell:

[Before PR810985]

if 1-core L2 subpool deployment (numOfCoresPerL2Sp == 1)

maxNumOfCAUserL2SubPool = min(40, maxNumOfCAUserL2SubPool in 5G_L2_IF_1555_replaced([10966229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

else

5G-L2-PS shall use value of maxNumOfCAUserL2SubPool received in the interface defined in 5G_L2_IF_1555_replaced([10966229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (its value is respectively specified in 5G_UP_8411_replaced([11374026](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ueFzFPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

where

- numOfCoresPerL2Sp is a number of cores that are available for each L2 subpool, see 5G_L2_4307_replaced([11140781](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23ldUPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

 [End PR810985]

if actTwoCoresL2DeploymentFddFr1 in 5G_L2_IF_4795_replaced([10966119](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlw_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and actScheUePooling (scheUePoolingAllowed in 5G_L2_IF_14_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

subPoolMaxActiveCaUe = maxNumOfCAUserL2SubPool in 5G_L2_IF_1555_replaced([10966229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

cellMaxAcitveCaUe = min(rdMaxActiveCaUe as 5G_L2_6836_replaced([11184745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tIXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), subPoolMaxActiveCaUe );

else:

cellMaxAcitveCaUe = **min(40, rdMaxActiveCaUe as 5G_L2_6836_replaced([11184745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tIXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));**

subPoolMaxActiveCaUe = **min(40, rdMaxActiveCaUe as 5G_L2_6836_replaced([11184745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tIXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));**

end

For FR1 TDD Cell:

if actScheUePooling (scheUePoolingAllowed in 5G_L2_IF_14_replaced([10966124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UMlxPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

subPoolMaxActiveCaUe = maxNumOfCAUserL2SubPool in 5G_L2_IF_1555_replaced([10966229](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UNM1Pu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

cellMaxAcitveCaUe = min(rdMaxActiveCaUe as 5G_L2_6836_replaced([11184745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tIXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), subPoolMaxActiveCaUe, 40);

else:

cellMaxAcitveCaUe = rdMaxActiveCaUe as 5G_L2_6836_replaced([11184745](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tIXPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

subPoolMaxActiveCaUe = 40 as default;

end

---

##### 2.4.7.2.5.0-1 Interworking with DPA algorithm Impact for Scell's scheduler (ID: 11159180)

**2.4.7.2.5.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159186`)

Interworking with DPA algorithm After Scell is actived, Pcell strat DPA for this new active scell for next DPA period, there may be Scell scheduler delay untill Scell got DPA result.

---

##### 2.4.7.2.5.0-2 Interworking with DPA algorithm Impact for UL Scell's scheduler (ID: 11159192)

**2.4.7.2.5.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11159200`)

Interworking with DPA algorithm if the activing Cell is a UL Scell, Pcell should send the actived UE's max DAI of the slot with the last allocated DPA resource to the SCell DL by msg PsPeerCtrl_PcellDpaMaxDaiInd (refer to 5G_L2_IF_2210_replaced([10980081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VfmS_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

In Scell, If the slot of PUCCH resources allocated by DPA corresponds to Scell has Pusch resources, the max DAI allocated on this slot should be synchronized from DL to UL before Scell schedules Pusch on this slot.

[CB009169-AB] Notes: it's not applied to FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA refer to 5G_L2_7108_replaced([11160809](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25W-_fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). [End CB009169-AB]

---

#### 2.4.7.2.6 Interworking with DPA overload control (ID: 11159227)

#### 2.4.7.2.7 Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA (ID: 11159256)
##### 2.4.7.2.7.0-1 Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA Impact for Scell activation (ID: 11159261)

**2.4.7.2.7.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159267`)

Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA When SCell activation procedure is successfully completed (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_291_replaced([11195612](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Bfv2PvvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and SCell is present in srsBfSyncStatusForScells, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall proceed with 5G_L2_16753_replaced([11154964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oofvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see “SRS BF synchronization” section) for PCell and with 5G_L2_16755_replaced([11154989](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242opfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SCell.

#### 2.4.7.2.8 SCell DL Scheduling prevention (ID: 13323692)
##### 2.4.7.2.8.0-1 SCell DL Scheduling prevention **Impact for Scell Scheduler** (ID: 13323693)

**2.4.7.2.8.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13323694`)

SCell DL Scheduling prevention if actFddDlSchedPrevent is True and PCell is FR1 TDD and SCell is FDD and UE's caConfigDu parameter is “DlAndUl”
 L2PS does not send LoCtrl_StartFlowControlReq Msg to L2LO under conditions mentioned in [11121583](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZJmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), [11121880](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqa-y_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)
 end

For NUM_TIME_DL_SCH_PREV_CA_SCELL counter update refer [13323608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_t1MIQNHFEfCVOOJMfwsFiw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Note: When LoCtrl_StartFlowControlReq Message is not sent to L2LO due to above mentioned reason, then LoCtrl_StopFlowControlReq message should also not be sent to L2LO e.g during SCell Deactivation or Suspend procedures.

#### 2.4.7.2.9 UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG (ID: 13414170)
##### 2.4.7.2.9.0-1 UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Overview (ID: 13414174)

**2.4.7.2.9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13414214`)

UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Timing alignment procedure is performed for UEs for which SCell is in different TAG than PCell (tagId in [10974781: CellConfigParam structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_jjfKsPu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to obtain Timing Advance (see: [13345951: Timing Alignment via CFRA](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_L_qpQOSSEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ)). Procedure is initiated on PCell side when there is need for Uplink traffic on SCell. Only when this procedure is succesfully finished Uplink transmission can be triggered.
 Procedure consists of steps:

- Step 1: PCell L2-PS requests SCell L2-PS to perform Timing Alignment procedure.
- Step 2: SCell L2-PS requests CP-RT to assign CFRA preamble for PDCCH order
- Step 3: SCell L2-PS orders UE to perform CFRA with DCI format 1_0
- Step 4: Upon reception of preamble SCell L2-PS requests RAR transmission with MSG3 grant from PCell L2-PS.
- Step 5: When first uplink transsmission (MSG3) from UE in SCell is received (with CRC OK or NOK) SCell L2-PS shall inform PCell L2-PS about successfull procedure completion and release preamble in CP-RT.

 For reference see flowchart: [13415683: Timing Alignment procedure for SCell in different TAG](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_GHt_khPTEfG3gf_qmG8Vww)

Additional details:

1. Timing Alignment procedure is requested with PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingReq with modifType set to requestUlTimingAlignmentForSTag (see: [10979437: PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingReq](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_D6EQcPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
2. Upon reception of Timing Alignment request L2-PS shall start timer for Timing Alignment procedure. Timer neeeds to be longer than max time for CFRA procedure handling (considering retries) computed as per [13414220: Timing Alignment for SCell with Different TAG procedure timeout calculation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_HCt11RLvEfG3gf_qmG8Vww).
3. Time of above timer shall be propagated to CP-RT as per [13414243: Filling Reserve Preamble Request](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ELMSQBLzEfG3gf_qmG8Vww). Rationale: CP-RT needs to implement mechanism to release pramble on it's own to ensure robustness. Because time of processing CFRA can vary significatnly based on RACH configuration.
4. At Step 3 result of receiving DCI format 1_0 by UE is solely preamble transmission thus there is no associated PDSCH, PUSCH or PUCCH transmission.
5. Step 4 shall be repeated for each transmission of preamble.
6. SCell L2-PS shall inform PCell about failed procedure with PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingResp with NOK status.
7. Procedure from SCell perspective is considered failed in following cases:
8. CP-RT could not reserve preamble for CFRA procedure.
9. timer for Timing Alignment procedure expired.
10. If PCell L2-PS receives PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingResp with NOK status for this procedure it shall retry after backoff time (see: [13411425: rdUlTimingAlignmentForSTagBackoffTime](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO90FBFcEfG3gf_qmG8Vww))

---

##### 2.4.7.2.9.0-2 UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Timing Alignment for SCell with Different TAG procedure timeout calculation (ID: 13414220)

**2.4.7.2.9.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `13414221`)

UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG This requirement describes time needed by L2-PS to finish timing alignment procedure.

First, L2-PS shall determine largest possible distance (in slots) between PRACH occasions that could be used by UE to perform Random Access procedure based on steps:

1. Based on frame structure (for TDD only, see [10968427: tddFrameStructure structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_49Ez4Pu3Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and prachConfigurationIndex , L2-PS shall determine all PRACH slots (see: [11111903: Parameters used in PRACH mapping functions](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_gVg_kPvIEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
2. Next for each configured SSB beam ID:
3. Determine list of prach occasions for SSB beam ID (and slots they belong to) within rrmPrachAssociationPeriod ([11111925: PRACH Association Period](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_gfwgsPvIEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
4. exclude all occasions based on ssbOccasionMaskIndex parameter. (example: if there are 4 occasions for SSB beam and ssbOccasionMaskIndex is 10 occasions with ids 1 and 3 can be used)
5. For each occasion compute following variables:

  1. durationRarWindow - defined as duration in slots from occasion slot until Random Access Response Window ends (see: [11174520: Random Access Response window identification](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_GO7CcPvOEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
  2. endRarWindowSlot - defined as slot number within rrmPrachAssociationPeriod corresponding to slot in which Rar Window expires in its period. Can be calculated as follows: endRarWindowSlot = (occasion slot + durationRarWindow) mod rrmPrachAssociationPeriod
  3. nextOccasionSlot - defined as slot number of nearest occasion from filtered list (see step 2.b) after endRarWindowSlot. If there is no more occasions in rrmPrachAssociationPeriod search shall start from beginning of period. In this case L2-PS shall set periodOverflown = 1 otherwise periodOverflown = 0
  4. preambleRetransmissionDistance - distance between occasions in slots defined as preambleRetransmissionDistance = durationRarWindow + nextOccasionSlot - endRarWindowSlot + periodOverflown * rrmPrachAssociationPeriod

6. Distance between occasions from above steps (preambleRetransmissionDistance) shall be added to list (preambleRetransmissionDistancesList)
7. Largest value from preambleRetransmissionDistancesList shall be used as baseDistance (in slots).

 Then L2-PS shall calculate actual value of timout (in ms) using formula:

pdcchOrderProcedureTimeout = baseDistance * preambleTransMax / (2μ) + rdPdcchOrderProcedureProcessingOverhead

where:

- prachConfigurationIndex, preambleTransMax, raResponseWindow, ssbOccasionMaskIndex are paremters from RACH config ([10968124: rachConfig structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_279QsPu3Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
- rdPdcchOrderProcedureProcessingOverhead is additional time L2-PS may need to ensure not abandoning procedure too early (due to internal processing overhead, see: [13411426: rdUlTimingAlignmentForSTagProcessingOverheadTime](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_LoUwJxFcEfG3gf_qmG8Vww))
- μ is numerology used in SCell configuration (see: [11346879: Duplex Mode and Numerology](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_vqVLcPveEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.7.2.9.0-3 UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Storing timing alignment timout value in UE context (ID: 13429310)

**2.4.7.2.9.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `13429311`)

UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Because of following reasons:

1. RACH configuration can be online modified (see raConfiguration parameter in [10971056: PsCell_CellReconfigurationReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_KPrkLPu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
2. RACH configuration is not updated for already connected UEs
3. UL Timing Alignment Procedure can be delayed

 L2-PS shall calculate timer value (see: [13414220: Timing Alignment for SCell with Different TAG procedure timeout calculation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_HCt11RLvEfG3gf_qmG8Vww)) once at time of reception of PsUser_UserSetupReq with ueAddCause SCellAddition (see: [10974651: PsUser_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_inbyIPu4Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and store it in context. As long as UE is connected to this SCell, stored value shall be used as pdcchOrderProcedureTimeout duration.

---

##### 2.4.7.2.9.0-4 UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Filling Reserve Preamble Request (ID: 13414243)

**2.4.7.2.9.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `13414244`)

UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG L2-PS shall fill following IEs of PsUser_ReserveCfraPreambleReq:

- ssbBeamId - best beam for UE as from Beam report populated from PCell (see: [11160013: Reception of CSI report and Beam Report](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_0REyQfvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ), [10979797: SCell Physical Uplink Control Channel Receive](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_GvhaoPu5Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))
- reservationTime - value calulated as per [13414220: Timing Alignment for SCell with Different TAG procedure timeout calculation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_HCt11RLvEfG3gf_qmG8Vww), maximum time needed by L2-PS to finish CFRA procedure (including retries and overhead)

 Other parameters shall be filled according to specifics of UE preamble is requested for.

---

##### 2.4.7.2.9.0-5 UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG Aborting Timing Alignment Procedure (ID: 13491669)

**2.4.7.2.9.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `13491670`)

UL Timing Alignment for SCells in Different TAG In case of Beam Failure Recovery on PCell L2-PS on SCell shall abort timing alignment procedure as described in [13345951: Timing Alignment via CFRA](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_L_qpQOSSEfCmxLW1M7HMrQ). This is performed as follows:

1. PCell L2-PS detects Beam Failure Recovery by reception of MSG 3 with known RNTI as described in [11152927](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_PoJtkPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).
2. PCell L2-PS shall request SCell L2-PS to abort Timing Alignment procedure by sending PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingReq with modifType equal to abortUlTimingAlignmentForSTag.
3. SCell L2-PS shall release preamble and abort any other processing related with Timing Alignment Procedure (including sending PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingResp with modifType equal to requestUlTimingAlignmentForSTag).
4. SCell L2-PS reponds with PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeSchedulingResp with modifType equal to abortUlTimingAlignmentForSTag and OK status.
5. Upon reception of response PCell L2-PS shall consider procedure aborted and continue in similar fashion as after failure: shall restart procedure after backoff time (see: [13411425: rdUlTimingAlignmentForSTagBackoffTime](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_CO90FBFcEfG3gf_qmG8Vww))

 For reference see flowchart: !!! ADD FLOWCHART LINK HERE !!!

---

#### 2.4.7.3.1 SCell candidate selection for deactivation due to UE Overheated (ID: 11159302)
##### 2.4.7.3.1.0-1 SCell candidate selection for deactivation due to UE Overheated SCell candidate selection for deactivation (ID: 11159307)

**2.4.7.3.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11159317`)

SCell candidate selection for deactivation due to UE Overheated L2-PS shall select the SCell(s) for deactivation as many as required to meet the value of[Before CB006137-BB] MaxNumofActiveSCells [CB006137-BB] MaxNumofActiveSCellsDL and MaxNumofActiveSCellsUL [End CB006137-BB] in the following order:

1. SCell(s) in the overheating state and there is more SCells in the overheating state than required for deactivation (for fulfill the[Before CB006137-BB] MaxNumofActiveSCells [CB006137-BB] MaxNumofActiveSCellsDL and MaxNumofActiveSCellsUL [End CB006137-BB] requirement), they all shall be deactivated;

 [CB006137-BB]

1. If MaxNumofActiveSCellsUL < NumofActSCellsUL, the SCell with uplink activated shall be deactivated.

 [End CB006137-BB]

1. SCell of “bad” Radio Link Quality[CB006137-BB] in downlink [End CB006137-BB].

2. [CB006137-BB] DL only [End CB006137-BB]SCells in the order from lowest to highest Available DL Resources, [CB006137-BB] the SCell with uplink activated is listed in the last. [End CB006137-BB].

3. SCells in the order from highest sCellIndex to lowest sCellIndex.

Note: This selection algorithm is used only for SCell deactivation when there is room for active SCell(s).

---

#### 2.4.7.3.2 ext-SCell deactivation due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable (ID: 11159322)
##### 2.4.7.3.2.0-1 ext-SCell deactivation due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable Bulk ext-SCell deactivation due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable (ID: 11159326)

**2.4.7.3.2.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159332`)

ext-SCell deactivation due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable When primary 5G-L2-PS change Xp-U link status to unavailable by himself (as described in 5G_UP_ALG_12815_replaced([11122016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM4_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or receives indication from ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS in PsPeerCtrl_ScellMeasurementRep with IE xpLinkStatus set to unavailable (see 5G_L2_IF_2118_replaced([10979995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Ve_Pfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) due to detection of Xp-U link unavailability (according to 5G_UP_ALG_12816_replaced([11122039](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcM5vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), primary 5G L2 PS should initiate ext-SCell deactivation for every UE, which have this ext-SCell active, using scell deactivation procedure (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_311_replaced([11195870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfxrYfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and IE modifType in PsPeerCtrl_ScellUeScheduleReq set to deactivateExtScellXpLinkUnaval (see 5G_L2_IF_656_replaced([10979441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VbU1vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

---

##### 2.4.7.3.2.0-2 ext-SCell deactivation due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable ext-SCell deactivation procedure robustness (ID: 11159337)

**2.4.7.3.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11159343`)

ext-SCell deactivation due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable When Bulk SCell deactivation procedure, due to Xp-U link status change to unavailable, is triggered (see. 5G_L2_8469_replaced([11159326](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25QRRvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) it may happen that due to Xp-U link unavailability some messages can or will be lost. To mitigate this, following enhancements to deactivation procedure are introduced:

- limit of retries for ext-SCell deactivation procedure (see. 5G_L1L2_FLOW_311_replaced([11195870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfxrYfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is introduced and controlled by R&D parameter rdMaxNumDeactReqRetransForExtScell (see 5G_L2_8540_replaced([11184795](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tvZfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))
- after number of retries is exhausted primary 5G L2 PS assumes that procedure is finished successfully and ext-SCell is deactivated.

---

#### 2.4.7.3.3 ext-SCell deactivation with sCellActivationMethod=blind (ID: 11159349)
##### 2.4.7.3.3.0-1 ext-SCell deactivation with sCellActivationMethod=blind ext-SCell deactivation when sCellActivationMethod=blind on primary 5G-L2-PS (ID: 11159354)

**2.4.7.3.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11159364`)

ext-SCell deactivation with sCellActivationMethod=blind [Before CB008140-GK]

When primary 5G-L2-PS receives UeSchedulingNotify with modifType=deactivateReq via PsPeerCtrl_SCellStatusInd (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_331_replaced([11196055](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfySe_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS for a UE that has sCellActivationMethod=blind, primary 5G-L2-PS should ignore this notification and should not initiate ext-SCell deactivation for that UE.

Note: This should only happen if on ext-gNB this UE has sCellActivationMethod=bufferBased

[CB008140-GK]

When primary 5G-L2-PS receives UeSchedulingNotify with modifType=deactivateReq via PsPeerCtrl_SCellStatusInd (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_331_replaced([11196055](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfySe_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) from ext-SCell 5G-L2-PS for a UE that has sCellActivationMethod=blind, primary 5G-L2-PS should deactivate SCell and SCell shall not be re-activated again.

[End CB008140-GK]

---

#### 2.4.7.3.4 SCell deactivation due to SAG state transition (ID: 11159369)
##### 2.4.7.3.4.0-1 SCell deactivation due to SAG state transition SCell deactivation due to UE entering SAG ON state (ID: 11159374)

**2.4.7.3.4.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11159391`)

SCell deactivation due to SAG state transition If NRBTS/NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = ‘Deact_Scells_VoNr_SAg’ at PCell, Deactivate all of the UE's SCells when UE enters TP enabled::SAG ON state, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_19252_replaced([11205370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwo7h_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Else if the UE is configured**[CB006139-CG] or reconfigured**[End CB006139-CG] with FDD + TDD FR1 [Before CB013553-C] R16 [End CB013553-C] UL Tx switching, and TDD SCell with UL Tx switching is activated, deactivate the TDD SCell with UL Tx switching, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_19699_replaced([11122124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcz_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).****

Notes:

After CB008236-B-UPD003, blind mode SCell deactivation/activation shall not be impacted by UE entering TP enabled::SAG ON state.

active UE load for FR2 11159411: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159411: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159411: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159411: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 The goal of active UE load metric: * Provides a mechanism to limit the number of active SCells for each UE in the cell group; * Aims to maximize the active carrier number per beam and avoid PRB resource without allocation on some specific carriers; For the active UE load metric definition and how it shall be maintained in L2-PS, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_26307_replaced([11122140](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). 3 active UE load metrics introduced: * activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierDL * activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierUL * totalActiveUeLoad The activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierUL shall replace legacy UL counter - instantNumOfActiveCellUEUL as the criteria of selecting the lowest or highest active UE load SCell in UE’s best beam for SCell activation or deactivation in uplink direction. The activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierDL shall replace legacy DL counter - instantNumOfActiveCellUEDL as the criteria of selecting the lowest or highest active UE load SCell in UE’s best beam for SCell activation or deactivation in downlink direction. The totalActiveUeLoad shall be used as the criteria for the measurement of the whole cell group’s total active UE load, when it exceeds the threshold(definition refer to 5G_UP_ALG_26309_replaced([11122151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), those UEs with more active SCell number than maximum allowed number shall trigger SCell deactivation. A matrix is maintained in L2_PS DL to record the active UE load per beam per carrier, for simplicity following table is an example with some limitation: * maximum beam number = 6, beam id ranges from 0 to 4; * maximum carrier number = 8, the carrier id ranges from 0 to 7; * totally 16 CA UE connected, the UE id ranges from 1 to 16; * all UE’s PCell located in carrier id 0; * all UEs have 4 DL active carriers except for UE-9 and UE-14, these two UEs have 5 DL active carriers; * only DL UE load taken into account; [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a table with data related to active UE load per carrier and beam. It also includes a JSON-like structure and a smaller table detailing active UE load deactivation. The main table has rows for "Beam [0]" through "Beam [4]" and columns for "Carrier [0]" through "Carrier [7]", plus a "Total Active UE Load" column. Each cell within the carrier columns contains a list of numbers, presumably representing UE IDs or load values. The "Active UE Load per CC" row at the bottom shows a single number for each carrier. The JSON-like structure shows two objects, each with "ueId", "isPSCell", and "operationalMode" fields. The smaller table has columns "Active UE Load Deactivation", "Legacy Metric (active #UEs/CC)", "New Metric (active #UEs/CC/Beam)", and "Best Beam". It lists two entries: "UE-9" and "UE-14". There are also two lines of text above the JSON-like structure: "activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierDL[2][1] = 2" "activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierUL[2][1] = 1" Here is the table in markdown format:

| Beam | Carrier [0] | Carrier [1] | Carrier [2] | Carrier [3] | Carrier [4] | Carrier [5] | Carrier [6] | Carrier [7] | Total Active UE Load |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Beam [0] | [13, 2, 7] | [7, 13] | [7] | [2] | [7] | [7] | [2, 13] | [2] | |
| Beam [1] | [16, 9, 10] | [9] | [10, 16] | [9, 10] | [9] | [16] | [16] | [9, 10] | |
| Beam [2] | [6, 1, 5, 14] | [1, 14] | [13] | [1, 6] | [5, 6] | [6, 14] | [5, 14] | [1, 5] | 66 |
| Beam [3] | [11, 15, 8] | [15] | [11, 8] | [11] | [8] | [11, 15] | [8] | [15] | |
| Beam [4] | [3, 12, 4] | [4, 12] | [3] | [3] | [4, 12] | [3] | [12] | [4] | |
| Active UE Load per CC | 16 | 8 | 7 | 7 | 7 | 7 | 7 | 7 | |
| Here is the smaller table in markdown format: | | | | | | | | | |

| Active UE Load Deactivation | Legacy Metric (active #UEs/CC) | New Metric (active #UEs/CC/Beam) | Best Beam |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| UE-9 | CC[1] | CC[3] or CC[7] | Beam[1] |
| UE-14 | CC[1] | CC[1] or CC[5] or CC[7] | Beam[2] |
| File "FR2 activeUeLoad based Scell deactivation.xlsx", link in sharepoint: | | | |
| | | | |
| 1). During SCell activation procedure, activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierDL and activeUeLoadPerBeamPerCarrierUL in current UE’s best beam shall be taken into account, so the active UE shall be distributed across over all the carriers with load balanced. | | | |
| 2). When periodic active UE load check starts, since now totalActiveUeLoad(66) > threshold(64), maxAllowedCC = 4, so UE-9 and UE-14 shall select one Scell to trigger deactivation individually. | | | |
| 3). For UE-9, if with legacy criteria of SCell selection, carrier-1 shall be selected, this will cause carrier-1 without active UE in beam-1. But with new SCell selction metric, carrier-3 or carrier-7 shall be the candidates for deactivation, one of them shall be selected finally. The similar case for UE-14. | | | |
| | | | |
| Below events shall trigger the metrics updates in the matrix: | | | |
| * UE setup | | | |
| * UE release | | | |
| * SCell activated | | | |
| * SCell deactivated | | | |
| * SCell released | | | |
| * Cell delete | | | |
| * Beam change | | | |
| * Beam failure recovery | | | |

deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 11159426: SCell deactivation due to active UE load for FR2 For algorithm level descriptions of active UE load triggered SCell deactivation, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_26306_replaced([11122135](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqcz__vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When sCellActivationMethod is set to ‘bufferBased’ or ‘bufferAndRLQualityBased’, if active UE load based SCell deactivation trigger condition fulfilled in cell group, the active UE load check shall work together with buffer and RLQ check in L2-PS DL, which shall impact the final check result in DL, more information can refer to 5G_L2_14217_replaced([11159743](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25StifvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When sCellActivationMethod is set to ‘blind’, active UE load based SCell deactivation shall work as well, UE’s SCell number shall not exceed the max allowed SCell number, L2-PS DL then select candidate SCell(s) with highest active UE load metric in current UE’s best beam and do SCell deactivation. Similar as buffer and RLQ check, in blind mode active UE load triggered SCell deactivation shall work together with periodic checking as before, but in each period only 1 time check shall be executed, L2-PS DL shall trigger SCell deactivation accordingly. Following diagram is an example of how active UE load triggered SCell deactivation interworks with blind/bufferBased/bufferAndRadioLinkQualityBased SCell deactivation, impact to new Scell activation demonstrated as well.

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).File "FR2 activeUeLoad based Scell deactivation.xlsx", link in sharepoint: (1). sCellActivationMethod of UE-1 is configured as ‘blind’, when active UE load based SCell deactivation triggered in cell group, in the next nearest periodic checking opportunity in L2-PS DL after cell group periodic active UE load check, UE-1 shall select one highest active UE load SCell in best beam to deactivate. (2). sCellActivationMethod of UE-2 is configured as ‘bufferAndRLQualityBased’, and current buffer and RLQ check cross over the boundary of active UE load check in cell group, but since the last buffer and RLQ check is later than active UE load check, the final buffer and RLQ check result shall be impacted by active UE load condition, if buffer and RLQ check result = rlq deactivation, then no additional Scell deactivation required due to active UE load, those bad RLQ Scell deactivation shall fulfill the active UE load condition. (3). sCellActivationMethod of UE-3 is configured as ‘bufferAndRLQualityBased’, after active UE load check in cell group, the first buffer and RLQ check result shows one additional SCell is required, but due to this buffer and RLQ check within the scope of auLoadReductionTimer, no new SCell activation allowed this time. After the time of rdProhibitScellCheck, new round of buffer and RLQ check still require one new SCell activation, then this time SCell activation shall be allowed if total active UE load not exceeding the active UE load threshold. (4). sCellActivationMethod of UE-4 is configured as ‘bufferAndRLQualityBased’, after active UE load check in cell group, previous SCell activation delay period has not been expired. After activation period expiry, if new round of buffer and RLQ check requires one new SCell activation, auLoadReductionTimer has expired this time. but SCell activation shall be not allowed due to auLoadBasedSCellDeactCheck not cleared ever. After this time of buffer and RLQ check, auLoadBasedSCellDeactCheck reset to 0. Notes: 1. All CA UEs with sCellActivationMethod equal to blind or bufferBased or bufferAndRLQBased are added evenly in UE distribution table. 2. NRBTS.sCellActivationMethod supports on-line modification, and the modified value shall take effect on new users rather than existing users. The sCellActivationMethod is stored per UE context. 3. When UCI multiplexing is enabled for different TDD FR2 CC, the SCell activation delay period shall get longer, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_1794_replaced([11110605](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpGJHPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

#### 2.4.7.3.6 Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA (ID: 11159431)

#### 2.4.7.3.6-1 Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA **ext-SCell deactivation due to synchronization status change to OutOfSync** (ID: 11159447)

**2.4.7.3.6-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159452`)

Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA For ext-SCell deactivation due to synchronization status change to OutOfSync, see 5G_L2_16188_replaced([11163147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25kaYPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

#### 2.4.7.3.6-2 Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA SCell deactivation due to overload for FR1 (ID: 12531634)

**2.4.7.3.6-2.0-1**  (ID: `12531642`)

Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA For DL CA, when SCell deactivation is caused by [11122234: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) trigger in [12678142: SCell deactivation checking when SCell is overload](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_1wtv4EzoEfC0Ye3M8ARUWQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), SCell shall report it to PCell by deactReqType = overloadDeactiveReq(see [10979873: PsPeerCtrl_ScellStatusInd message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYJfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). For UL CA , when SCell deactivation is caused by [11122241: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for UL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) trigger, PCell shall record the SCell status. when PCell decides to deactivate the SCell, if the UE's status on the SCell is deactReqType = overloadDeactiveReq or UL overload for the last zero buffer split for UL CA, the PCell should increase PM Counter in [12533986: Total number of times the DL countermeasure type 9 is active](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_XTEigR5VEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

##### 2.4.7.3.6.0-1 Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA Impact for Scell deactivation (ID: 11159437)

**2.4.7.3.6.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159443`)

Interworking with SRS based DL BF for intra-band TDD CA When SCell deactivation procedure is triggered on PCell’s 5G-L2-PS instance (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_311_replaced([11195870](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfxrYfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and SCell is present in srsBfSyncStatusForScells, then the 5G-L2-PS instance shall proceed with 5G_L2_16753_replaced([11154964](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242oofvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) (see “SCell deactivation” section) for PCell and with 5G_L2_16755_replaced([11154989](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_242opfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SCell.

### 2.4.7.4 Radio Link Quality Monitoring (ID: 11159458)
#### 2.4.7.4.1 Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA (ID: 11159463)
##### 2.4.7.4.1.0-1 Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA Scell report DL RL quality change to Pcell (ID: 11159467)

**2.4.7.4.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11159472`)

Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA SCell 5G-L2-PS shall report the change of RL quality between "bad" and "good" to P(S)Cell 5G-L2-PS, not only when the SCell permanent deactivation required. The RL quality is the main input parameter for the selection which SCell shall be deactivated due to overheating assistance information reported by UE.

---

##### 2.4.7.4.1.0-2 Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA Scell UL RLQ monitoring and evaluation (ID: 11159478)

**2.4.7.4.1.0-2.0-3**  (ID: `12472896`)

Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA 12472896: Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA 12472896: Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA 12472896: Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA 12472896: Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA When SCell activated, SCell UL will start to monitor and evaluate SCell UL radio link quality periodically for SCell activation method: “blind”, “bufferBased” or “bufferAndRLQualityBased”. After SCell receives activation request, the CA UE was added to one UE group in UE distribution table of SCell UL, UE group number is identified by rdPeriodScellCheckFR1.

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).Following parameters define the UL RLQ evaluation opportunities:  rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 – refer to 5G_L2_1388_replaced([11184635](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  rdNumberOfScellChecksFR1 – refer to 5G_L2_1390_replaced([11184651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  rdProhibitScellCheck – refer to 5G_L2_1392_replaced([11184664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shTvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) For each slot, the UE(s) in the UE group corresponding to this slot will be evaluated for UL RLQ status if it’s valid for evaluation. UL RLQ evaluation conditions: **[Before CNI-137616-C]**  UL RLQ enabled, refer to 5G_L2_9371_replaced([11184784](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tvY_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) **[End CNI-137616-C]**  SCell in activated state  Current evaluation slot not in prohibit slots defined by rdProhibitScellCheck  Valid UL MCS (not initial or default MCS)  This SCell not in overheating status  This SCell not in bad RLQ status
Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).Link: Following variables are used to evaluate the RLQ status:  rrmNumMcsCheckForRLQinUL - this is the RLQ check number in each whole evaluation period, if RLQ evaluation condition check pass, it's increased by 1  rrmSamplesScellBadRLQinUL - this is the bad RLQ check number in each whole evaluation period, if MCS is lower than the threshold, it's increased by 1  rrmScellRLQStatusUL - when each whole evaluation period complete(the sample number reached), the RLQ status will be evaluated When SCell activated, rrmNumMcsCheckForRLQinUL and rrmSamplesScellBadRLQinUL are initialize as 0, rrmScellRLQStatusUL = “good” When each RLQ evaluation complete(*(rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 [5G_L2_1388_replaced([11184635](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shR_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] * rdNumberOfScellChecksFR1 [5G_L2_1390_replaced([11184651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))] + rdProhibitScellCheckFR1 [5G_L2_1392_replaced([11184664](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shTvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))]) * rrmNumMcsCheckForRLQinUL / (2^µ) >= NRBTS/NRCELL.sCellChannelEstimationPeriod), rrmNumMcsCheckForRLQinUL and rrmSamplesScellBadRLQinUL are re-initialize as 0, rrmScellRLQStatusUL will be set according to evaluation result.* For the evaluation procedure, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11868_replaced([11121619](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZwovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_11871_replaced([11121633](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZwpfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). For each bad RLQ sample, the instant and average or filtered DL pathloss will be recorded according to local or forwarded PHR, the filtered DL pathloss will be uesed for SCell UL RLQ resume, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_13950_replaced([11121669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZwrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When the RLQ evaluation is bad, SCell UL will notify PCell UL via psPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd, refer to 5G_L2_IF_2944_replaced([10980976](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vm7A_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Note: 1. For some scenarios(UL LA expiry, overheating, etc), SCell RLQ evaluation may be interrupted, the evaluation would continue when SCell recovery from these scenarios. 2. The scaledMcs is used for bad RLQ sample judgement, which is calculated according to the assinged PRB and before MCS downgrade if it's activated.

---

##### 2.4.7.4.1.0-3 Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA Scell Ul scheduling suspend (ID: 11159508)

**2.4.7.4.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11159512`)

Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA If PCell Ul receives the bad Ul RLQ status via PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd, PCell will trigger buffer split stop refer to 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and adjust the split tx power refer to 5G_L2_8639_replaced([11161904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFnPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

For SCell Ul, the bad RLQ status will be stored, and resume procedure will start to run, increase Ul RLQ counter "SCELL_UL_SUSPEND_RLQ" by 1.

If PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes=0 received in SCell Ul, new transmission will stop and re-transmission could continue, SCell Ul inactivity timer will start.

---

##### 2.4.7.4.1.0-4 Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA Scell Ul scheduling resume (ID: 11159518)

**2.4.7.4.1.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11159524`)

Radio Link Quality Monitoring for FR1 CA Different from SCell Dl RLQ resume procedure, which could use Ul MCS comparing with the RLQ resume threshold, since the CQI measurement is still available even SCell Dl scheduling suspend.

SCell Ul RLQ resume have to compare the instant Dl pathloss with a threshold instread of Ul MCS, because after Ul scheduling supend the Ul MCS will be reset to default value in case Ul LA expriy and it will have no chance to update, here the Dl pathloss is not a pre-defined parameter, it's calculated by the instant Dl pathloss of each bad RLQ sample during the evaluation period, refer to the formula in 5G_UP_ALG_13950_replaced([11121669](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZwrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

In case n times consecutive check pass, Ul RLQ status resume from bad to good, resume procedure stop:

filtered Dl pathloss - instant Dl pathloss > δ dB

- n: specified by rdNumOfChecksforRecovScellULFR1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_12689_replaced([11124148](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqoaJPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

- δ: specified by rdPathlossDeltaforRecovScellULFR1 (see 5G_UP_ALG_12691_replaced([11124155](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqoaJvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Note:

 When calculate and record the Dl pathloss in RLQ evaluation period, PHR could be virtual or real, and local or forwarded, and this instant Dl pathloss used to calculate filtered Dl pathloss, it will the Dl pathloss threshold in RLQ resume procedure.

 When start RLQ resume procedure, only PCell forwarded virtual PHR could be used for Dl pathloss calculation, and this instant Dl pathloss will be used to compare with stored filtered Dl pathloss.

SCell Ul sends good Ul RLQ status to PCell Ul via PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd, and increase Ul RLQ counter "SCELL_UL_RECOV_RLQ" by 1.

When PCell Ul receives good Ul RLQ status, PCell Ul may tirgger buffer split refer to 5G_L2_7625_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and power split procedure refer to 5G_L2_7106_replaced([11161721](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3evvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If SCell Ul receives PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes>0, SCell Ul will stop Ul inactivity timer.

---

#### 2.4.7.4.2 Buffer based and Radio Link Quality Monitoring (ID: 11159529)
##### 2.4.7.4.2.0-1 Buffer based and Radio Link Quality Monitoring Update the pathloss information (ID: 11159533)

**2.4.7.4.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11159545`)

Buffer based and Radio Link Quality Monitoring [CNI-71344]Requirement moved from CP2[End CNI-71344]

5G-L2-PS shall update the DL pathloss as in 5G_UP_ALG_2746_replaced([11121446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYikPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when the valid power headroom report for PSCell is received from 5G-L2-LO in LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd message.

5G-L2-PS shall update the UL pathloss as in 5G_UP_ALG_2748_replaced([11121531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYik_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when the valid power headroom report for PSCell is received from 5G-L2-LO in LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd message, and when the rx power of PUSCH for PSCell is received from 5G-L1-UL in UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs message.

For CA UEs, Multiple Entry PHR is used. 5G-L2-PS shall only consider the PHR of PSCell with V=0 (see 5G_L2_9489_replaced([11215735](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-6NVfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) as valid one.

5G-L2-PS UL shall ignore the reported values for the unknown LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd.phrSCellIndex in case that Multiple Entry PHR is used.

5G-L2-PS UL shall always indicate the latest DL pathloss value to 5G-L2-PS DL when it is updated.

---

### 2.4.7.5 Common handling for SCell activation / Deactivation (ID: 11159550)
#### 2.4.7.5.1 Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation (ID: 11159555)
##### 2.4.7.5.1.0-1 Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation Coordination of SCell activation/deactivation (ID: 11159562)

**2.4.7.5.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11159571`)

Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation Please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2778_replaced([11120862](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the overview.

RL Quality based SCell activation/deactivation parameters: mcsDeactSCellDl, mcsDeactSCellUl, pathlossActSCellDl, pathlossActSCellUl can be changed on-line. A change will take affect only for the new UEs for which the UE context setup was established after the change. Already connected UEs will be handled according to the method and parameters that were valid at the time of UE context setup.

Additional trigger for SCell deactivation is reception of PsCell_CellStopSchedulingReq followed by PsCell_CellDeleteReq. This procedure is originated by OAM Cell deletion procedure and triggered by 5G-CP-RT (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_89_replaced([11178190](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BeXWLfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Upon reception of PsCell_CellStopSchedulingReq, 5G-L2-PS shall stop scheduling PDSCH/PUSCH as well as CSI-RS in the given cell (same implementation as for PSCell is applied for SCells). If cell to be deleted is the SCell that was just activated and rdProhibitScellCheck timer is started just before cell deletion, 5G-L2-PS shall stop scheduling on that SCell and at the time of rdProhibitScellCheck expiry new validation cyclus will start and at the last validation SCell (corresponding to the deleted cell) will be deactivated. For all the UE's configured with the Cell to be deleted as SCell, 5G-L2-PS shall trigger SCell deactivation. In order to avoid triggering of huge number of SCell deactivation MAC CEs simultaneously, SCell deactivation timing shall follow regular deactivation evaluation scheme and deleted cell shall be tagged for the deactivation that shall be handled with same priority as radio link quality based deactivation. E.g. for each UE configured with affected cell as SCell, regular evaluation will be done and at the time of decision deactivation of deleted SCell shall be triggered. In case multiple cells are deleted, deactivation shall be done with single MAC CE for all deleted cells. If simultaneous triggers for SCell(s) deactivation due to radio link quality and cell(s) deletion is received all the affected SCells shall be deactivated with single MAC CE. SCell(s) deactivated due to cell deletion shall be marked as unavailable and activation of this SCells is not possible.

Note: This is workarround solution applicable only until SCell(s) release procedure is implemented (no within 5G18A release).

Additional trigger for SCell deactivation is reception of PsUser_UserStopReq followed by PsUser_UserModifyReq. This procedure is originated by some User Modification cases to modify/release SCell triggered by 5G-CP-RT (see 5G_L1L2_FLOW_192_replaced([11188767](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BfNDofvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Upon reception of PsUser_UserStopReq, 5G-L2-PS shall stop scheduling PDSCH/PUSCH as well as CSI-RS for UE on the target SCell. If rdProhibitScellCheck timer of the SCell is started, and at the time of rdProhibitScellCheck expiry new validation cyclus will start and at the last validation SCell will be deactivated. SCell deactivation timing shall follow regular deactivation evaluation scheme and shall be handled with same priority as radio link quality based deactivation. If simultaneous triggers for SCell(s) deactivation due to radio link quality and cell(s) deletion is received all the affected SCells shall be deactivated with single MAC CE. SCell(s) deactivated shall be released and the configuration of SCell(s) shall be removed from UE context.

Note: Originally, we planned to release SCell but due to simplification and avoidance of performance degradation we decided to keep the SCell configured and permanently deactivate the cell. Once UE reconnect new SCell selection will be done and in this case deleted Cell will not be considered.

[CB012734-B]

When active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled in FR2, 5G L2-PS DL shall do the active Ue load check together with buffer and radio link quality check, the SCell activation and deactivation result shall be impacted by the active Ue load condition.

[End CB012734-B]

---

##### 2.4.7.5.1.0-2 Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation Scell activation checking procedure (ID: 11159577)

**2.4.7.5.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11159581`)

Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation Basically the activation checking procedure is same for FR2 and FR1, including checking period and prohibit period. And all RRC UEs are distributed in different slot of a distribution table to avoid too high cpu load when checking.

But the different radParameters are configured to different frequency range. All relative radParameters with default value are listed in below table.

              **** **** **** **** **** ****

| | | | | | |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| FR2 DL/UL | radParam: default value | FR1 DL | radParam: default value | FR1 UL | radParam: default value |
| rdPeriodScellCheck: 10 | rdPeriodScellCheckFR1: 10 | reuse rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 | | | |
| rdNumOfScellChecks: 3 | rdNumOfScellChecksFR1: 1 | rdNumberOfScellChecksFR1UL: 3 | | | |
| rdProhibitScellCheck: 80 | rdProhibitScellCheckFR1: 0 | No prohibit period | | | |

FR2 CA refer to 5G_L2_23203_replaced([11158998](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25OcEPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

FR1 UL CA refer to 5G_L2_7769_replaced([11159027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25OcFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.5.1.0-3 Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation SCell deactivation checking when SCell is overload (ID: 12678142)

**2.4.7.5.1.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12678143`)

Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation For FR1 DL, a UE on SCell shall take the SCell as not overload when the SCell is activated. When checking a UE for SCell deactivation if the UE's inactivity timer is not running:

If the SCell turns to overload as [11122234: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), L2-PS shall send LoCtrl_StopFlowControlReq to L2LO, stop DL scheduling and clear all the harq, start inactivity timer.

After L2-PS send LoCtrl_StopFlowControlReq to L2LO for the UE, then if SCell turns to not overload as [11122234: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), L2-PS shall send LoCtrl_StartFlowControlReq to L2LO, re-start DL scheduling when data comes from L2LO and restart the inactivity timer as [11122234: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCF_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

Note:

1. The flow control stop/start process may overlap with other flow control stop procedure(when bad RLQ as in [11121583: Evaluation of Scell Channel Quality (Scell)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZJmfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) or overheating in [11121319: Scell Deactivation based on Scell Inactivity Timer](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqX7c_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)), do not send repeat LoCtrl_StopFlowControlReq/LoCtrl_StartFlowControlReq to L2LO. I.e. if a LoCtrl_StopFlowControlReq is sent due to bad RLQ or overheating or overload, do not sent another LoCtrl_StopFlowControlReq, if LoCtrl_StartFlowControlReq is needed due to bad RLQ recover or overheating recover or overload recover, make sure all RLQ/overheating/overload are in good status then send it.

2. The inactivity timer start/re-start process mentioned above may interwork with bad RLQ and overheating. When overload happens, do not start the inactivity timer if SCell is in bad RLQ or overheating status, when overload recovers, do not re-start the inactivity timer if the SCell is in bad RLQ or overheating status.

3. The overload status handle for deactReqType = overloadDeactiveReq(see [10979873: PsPeerCtrl_ScellStatusInd message content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYJfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) shall be done if only when inactivity timer started by overload expires and the subsequent deactivation is triggered.

---

Activation/Deactivation 11159630: Common procedure for Buffer and Buffer/Quality based SCell Activation/Deactivation 5G-L2-PS (both DL and UL) shall maintain a table for the UE activation checking opportunity distribution. The length of the table is rdPeriodScellCheck (5G_UP_ALG_2778_replaced([11120862](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for FR2, refer to 5G_L2_20224_replaced([11159636](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25SGefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FR1. In implementation, the table size is the max value of rdPeriodScellCheck, but only use the size according to current rdPeriodScellCheck value. Note, the 5G-L2-PS shall NOT support runtime modification for the value of rdPeriodScellCheck. In each position of distribution table, there is a list of UE that will be checked at this position, and a value that count the number of UE exist in this position. Each UE can be only in the UE list of 1 position in the distribution table, and the position indicate the checking resource allocated to this UE. For FR2 CA when a UE context setup with SCell activation method as 'buffer based', 5G-L2-PS UL shall find the position in the distribution table which have the least UE count. If more than 1 position have same count, then select the one with smaller index. 5G-L2-PS shall put the UE into the list of the selected position. When 5G-L2-PS UL perform the 1st check, it will inform 5G-L2-PS DL about the checking TTI number, 5G-L2-PS DL shall calculate the correct position according to this TTI number from UL (+2 in the position according to 5G_UP_ALG_2778_replaced([11120862](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and record the UE into its own distribution table. For FR2 CA when a UE context setup with SCell activation method as 'bufferAndRLQualityBased’, 5G-L2-PS shall add the UE in the distribution table as same as activation method is ''buffer based'. For FR1 UL CA, DL and UL maintain a UE distribution table seperately, but the UE should be at the same position in the two distribution tables. UE is added to DL distribution table firstly with an checkResourceIndex which is index of the table, then send the checkResourceIndex to UL by DlToUlIntraUpdate with CmdType FR1_START_CHECK_CMD. UL add UE in UL distribution table with the checkResourceIndex after receiving FR1_START_CHECK_CMD. 2 slots advanced to DL is implemented when every TTI by using checkResourceIndex - 2, this operation make sure that DL and UL have same position for a specific UE, but UL is 2 slots advanced than DL, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2778_replaced([11120862](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).Every TTI, 5G-L2-PS shall take the list of UE from distribution table at the index equal to current TTI number mod rdPeriodScellCheck for FR2 or rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 for FR1. For FR2, each UE in the list shall trigger the operation of checking opportunity to the activation manager state machine (5G_L2_3546_replaced([11159803](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25TUk_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) of this UE. For FR1 refer to 5G_L2_20224_replaced([11159636](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25SGefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). When a UE context setup with SCell activation method as "blind", it will not be added in the distribution table. When this scell already activated, check will not be proceed anymore. Below is an example to illustrate how the distribution table works. In this example the rdPeriodScellCheck = 10, so the first 10 ueGroupInfo is used as the position of CA UE. Every ueGroupInfo can store maximum 300 UE since 300 = 3000/10. Every TTI scheduler use Xsfn mod rdPeriodScellCheck to get the index of ueGroupInfo to check Activation/Deactivation.
Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).

File: FR1_DLUL_checking_opportunity_distribution.vsdx [Before CNI-134375-M] [CNI-134375-M] [End CNI-134375-M]</p>

Activation/Deactivation For FDD and TDD FR1, the UE distribution table length depends on rdPeriodScellCheckFR1, and L2-PS shall NOT support runtime modification for the value of rdPeriodScellCheckFR1. The UE distribution table of FDD can refer to 5G_L2_3539. When rdCaLoadControlFeatController(5G_L2_21408) activates the functionality of bi-directional slot CA check exclusion for TDD FR1, in order to decrease the CA load further, the bi-directional scheduling slot shall not be allowed to do buffer check for Scell addition/activation/deactivation, then the length of UE distribution table for TDD FR1 shall be restricted to the following value: * rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 – maxNumOfMixedSchedSlot * (rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 / 10) The definition of maxNumOfMixedSchedSlot is the maximum possible number of bi-directional scheduling slot within a 10-slot period of each slot pattern, for simplicity it can be identified as the UL slot number within 10-slot period except for FR1 TDD frame structure tdLteConfig0. For tdLteConfig0 frame structure the scheduling slot offset of DL and UL is flexible, DL and UL scheduler are distributed in different slot, the exception is one bi-directional slot, refer to 5G_L2_23169. The bi-directional scheduling slot means the slot has valid K1 and K2 value, but not requiring this slot really scheduled both in DL and UL, by taken into account the K1/K2 impacts by SSB/TRS slot multiplexing with PDSCH, PRACH multiplexing, special slot PDSCH scheduling, RIM and other functionalities, for simplicity we will use the slot with valid K2 as the criterion of possible bi-directional scheduling. When start checking on one specific slot, if this is bi-directional slot, just skip this slot. Otherwise, this shall be an eligible slot for checking, choose one UE group index from distribution table in the way of round-robin: * The first eligiable slot for checking in each rdPeriodScellCheckFR1 period shall start from UE group index 0. * The following eligible slots for checking shall choose the UE group index with increment one by one until the last UE group. The figure below shows how the UE group index mapping to the slot taken the bi-directional slot into account, the frame structure of this example is 5GC001208, other frame structures will use the similar way:

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).File: "TDD FR1 UE distribution table.xlsx", link in sharepoint: When actCaOverloadCtrlEnh(5G_L2_IF_73_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and rdActCaOverloadCtrlEnh(5G_L2_21410) are both TRUE and rdCaLoadControlFeatController(5G_L2_21408) activates the FR1 CA check reduction functionality, to save CPU cost on CA UE checking, if actCaOverloadCtrlEnh is TRUE the UE number in this UE group of distribution shall be further restricted for both FDD and TDD FR1 in downlink direction only, the algorithm of selecting the UEs for checking in the list or corresponding UE group shall follow the way of round-robin and the notes as below: * Starting from the first UE in the list with the order when UE added into this list, up to rdMaxUeNumPerCheckingIndex (defined in 5G_L2_20014) of UEs shall be selected for each slot opportunity. * Remaining UEs in the list shall wait for the opportunity in next checking period. * When all UEs in the list have been checked, continue to select UE and check from the first UE in the list. notes: 1). The UEs for Scell addition and Scell activation check shall be selected together with UE number limitation according to the order when UE added to UE distribution table. **Once buffer monitoring for UE SCell addition is started by [Before CB010741-A] PsUser_DlBufferMonitoringInd [CB010741-A] PsUser_BufferMonitoringInd [End CB010741-A], no matter the UE is CA UE or nonCA, even its buffer monitoring for SCell additon may be stopped temporarily by overheating or SCell deactivation or BWP switch as 5G_UP_ALG_29593_replaced([11120432](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))[CB010741-A]/**[12639255](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_isFx8EC_EfCal_QUJn4xrg?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)[End CB010741-A], the access to the UE in the slot opportunity for SCell addition check should be counted as one check. 2). The UE number in the list updates dynamically with UE release and UE setup. 3). The interval between two checks for specific UE shall get longer if the UEs in the list of one UE group more than rdMaxUeNumPerCheckingIndex. 4). For those UEs in the list with active Scell(s), their Scell activation check shall not be restricted by the UE number defined by rdMaxUeNumPerCheckingIndex.
