| Pcell + Scell | | | | | | |
| Pcell | | 1,1 | | | 4 bits | {0,1,2,3} |
| Scell | 0,0 | | 2,2 | 3,3 | | |
| According to 5G_UP_ALG_9814_replaced(11116101), L2-PS shall not affect K1 calculation after modifying numPdschPrbInSsbSlots or numPdschPrbInTrsSlots and K1 will be precalculated even if PDSCH scheduling is not allowed in SSB and TRS slots. If numPdschPrbInSsbSlots or numPdschPrbInTrsSlots will be set to 0 (disabled), then K1 will be calculated but will be not used in SSB and TRS slots (actual, current K1 values per slot will be filled considering PDSCH multiplexing settings). The precalcualted value will be stored per slot and not changed any further. In case when numPdschPrbInSsbSlots or numPdschPrbInTrsSlots is changed from zero value to non-zero value this stored value will be used to fill current K1 values per slot. In case when numPdschPrbInSsbSlots or numPdschPrbInTrsSlots is changed from non-zero value to zero value, actual K1 value for this slot will be set to zero. In case when numPdschPrbInSsbSlots or numPdschPrbInTrsSlots is changed from a non-zero value to another non-zero value, K1 for this slot will not be changed. | | | | | | |
| [CB009422-E] | | | | | | |
| Note: | | | | | | |
| 1. When NRCELL.actPowerSavingBWP = true, in order to handle the DCI based BWP switch in slot 2/3/12/13, the K1 value shall be updated to 12 in these slots. | | | | | | |
| K1 set shall be updated as {4, 6, 8, 10, 12}, K1=4 only used for DCI based BWP switch. Refer to 11157417: tdLte Config0 frame structure timing. | | | | | | |
| The HARQ bundle window and c_DAI/t_DAI shall be updated accordingly. | | | | | | |
| [End CB009422-E] | | | | | | |
| Link: | | | | | | |

---

### 2.4.7.12 CA UE Scheduling (ID: 11160731)
#### 2.4.7.12.0-1 CA UE Scheduling Overview (ID: 11160734)

**2.4.7.12.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11160739`)

CA UE Scheduling For FR2 CA:

the SW architecture is based on cell group, all CC is allocated in same Cell group, which is single L2-PS instance. Thus Pcell/Scells co-ordination is done in same CPU core, buffer split/power split and CA UE scheduling is done by same L2-PS instance.

For FR1 CA:

the SW architecture is based inter L2-PS(cell group), thus Pcell and Scell(s) are located in different L2-PS instance. Thus Pcell/Scells co-ordination should be based on message inter L2-PS communication.

for DL CA:

DL scheduling co-ordination is done by DPA framework(Cdai/Tdai pre allocation), as 5G_L2_589;

DL Buffer split is done by L2HiDu.

for UL CA:

UL buffer split is done by Pcell UL (refer to 5G_L2_7624);

UL power split is done by Pcell UL (refer to 5G_L2_6636);

Pcell/Scells scheduling co-ordination is done as 5G_L2_6638.

---

#### 2.4.7.12.1 Buffer Status Split (FR2 CA) (ID: 11160746)

**2.4.7.12.3.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11160797`)

FR1 UL CA phase control[Test purpose] [Before CNI-108568]

if rd6137SubCEnable = 0:

CB006137 subfeature C function should not execute; execute the legacy code;

if rd6137SubCEnable = 1:

CB006137 subfeature C function should execute;

end

CB006137 subfeature C function including:

1. NACK Flood (5G_L2_7565, 5G_L2_7625, 5G_L2_9241, 5G_L2_8868)

2. UL Power Split (5G_L2_9563, 5G_L2_7106, 5G_L2_8741, 5G_L2_8627, 5G_L2_8628, 5G_L2_8629)

3. UL Link Adaptation (5G_L2_9553)

4. PUSCH TPC (5G_UP_ALG_2642_replaced([11119253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqJR9PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_2638_replaced([11119168](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqIq6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

5. adaptive retransmission (5G_UP_ALG_12913_replaced([11202887](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwd8aPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

6. Estimate Throughput for UL CA Data Split (5G_UP_ALG_9492_replaced([11204535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

Rad definition refer to 5G_L2_8739.

[CNI-108568]

Remove rd6137SubCEnable. CB006137 subfeature C function always enable.

[End CNI-108568]

---

#### 2.4.7.12.4 FR1 UL CA Scheduling (ID: 11160803)
##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-1 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Co-operation between Pcell and Scell (ID: 11160809)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13451315`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling In FR1 UL CA with inter-L2PS architecture,

for UL overlapping slot, co-operation between Pcell and Scell is needed to determine if Scell PUSCH need multiplex UCI or if Pcell need request PUCCH receiving for Harq or P-CSI purpose as 5G_UP_ALG_3609_replaced([11159986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

for non overlapping UL slot, there is no need to sync.

including FR1 TDD + FDD UL TX switch option1 UE, there is no PUSCH scheduling on SCELL for UL overlapping slot. UCI over FDD SCell PUSCH is not possible. So there is no need to sync.

For FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA, for UL overlapping slot:

· For UE without UL TX switch and LNCEL/maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx = 0, due to timing limitation (as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_9538_replaced([11204208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwjb-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_10871_replaced([11119486](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), there is no PUSCH scheduling on SCELL for UL overlapping slot. UCI over FDD SCell PUSCH is not possible. So there is no need to sync.

·For UE without UL TX switch and LNCEL/maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx>0, due to UCI always on TDD Pcell PUSCH, So there is no need to sync.

· For UE with UL TX switch option1(switchedUL), TDD Pcell is always reserved/preferred to be scheduled and there is no PUSCH scheduling on SCELL (as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_15046_replaced([11197899](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-K_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). UCI over FDD SCell PUSCH is not possible. So there is no need to sync.

· [CB014871-A] For UE with simulPucchPuschSamePrioR17 enabled, UCI over FDD SCell PUSCH is not possible as UCI is either transmitted on PUCCH Pcell or multiplexed on PUSCH Pcell. So there is no need to sync [End CB014871-A].

Notes: LNCEL/maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx is introduced to control TDD+FDD UL CA parallelized scheduling. refer to 5G_UP_ALG_25188_replaced([11208767](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwwQQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-2 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Pcell Communicate DL and UL scheduling result to Scell For UL CA UE (ID: 11160830)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11160853`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling PCell inform UE’s DL/UL scheduling to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlSchedulingInd as 5G_L2_IF_2130_replaced([10980097](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VfmTvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) on overlapping slot.

Pcell should calculate AN bits over Scell PUSCH based on C-dai per CC's DL grant result and 1st Dai in Pcell or Scell UL grant(refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4466_replaced([11178897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku2y0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

For F+F UL CA, DL Ack bit calculation on PCell advance N slots to calculate DL ack bit for bundle window – based on deployment of the PCell.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| Board Type on which PCell is located | |
| ABIL | Other boards |
| N = 1 | N = 0 |

[CB006449-AA]

For T+T UL CA, DL Ack bit calculation on PCell advance N slots to calculate DL ack bit for bundle window – based on fronthaul connection.

| | |
| --- | --- |
| PCell Fronthaul Connection Type | |
| CPRI | eCPRI |
| N = 2 | N = 1 |

[End CB006449-AA]

SCell use UE’s PCell DL/UL scheduling result as 5G_L2_7604, to determin whether UCI over Scell PUSCH and AN bits in PUSCH req handling as 5G_L2_7618.

Notes: it's not applied to FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA refer to 5G_L2_7108.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-3 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Scell Communicate UL scheduling result to Pcell For UL CA UE (ID: 11160860)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11160870`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling SCell inform UE’s UL scheduling to PCell via PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlSchedulingInd as 5G_L2_7554/5G_L2_IF_2149_replaced([10980319](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vhbefu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

PCell use UE’s SCell UL scheduling result to determin PUCCH and PUCCH handling as 5G_L2_7683.

[CB009169-AB] Notes: it's not applied to FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA refer to 5G_L2_7108. [End CB009169-AB]

UL CA Scheduling 11160897: FR1 UL CA Scheduling 11160897: FR1 UL CA Scheduling As 5G_UP_ALG_3609_replaced([11159986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when UL CA UE's PUSCH is scheduled on PCell, all the possible HARQ_D and CSI bits are multiplexed on PCell PUSCH, no PUCCH would be sent from UE and no UlData_PucchReceiveReq to L1 needed. When there is no PUSCH on PCell but PUSCH on SCell on the overlapping slot, whether PCell send UlData_PucchReceiveReq to L1 depends on the arriving time of PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlSchedulingInd to PCell, i.g. tr in following illustration:

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).Note: the illustration 5G-L2-7684.xlsx is on link: If tr is earlier than ts, like tr1, than no UlData_PucchReceiveReq to L1, and no consequent PUCCH process on this slot. If tr is later than ts, like tr2 without tr1, PCell do not know whether there is PUSCH on SCell on the overlapping slot, so it will blindly try UlData_PucchReceiveReq to L1 with harqProcessIndex = 100 as 5G_L1_IF_15465_replaced([11513986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MIPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The consequent PUCCH process on this slot is as bellow: If there is NO PUSCH on SCell on the overlapping slot, UE would send possible HARQ_D and CSI bits on PUCCH, PCell will receive UlData_PucchReceiveRespHarqD and UlData_PucchReceiveRespPs for the PUCCH. If there is PUSCH on SCell on the overlapping slot, UE would send possible HARQ_D and CSI bits on SCell PUSCH as 5G_UP_ALG_3609_replaced([11159986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), There is no PUCCH from UE on this slot, and UlData_PucchReceiveRespHarqD and UlData_PucchReceiveRespPs for the UlData_PucchReceiveReq to L1 with harqProcessIndex = 100 should be dropped by Pcell. [CB009169-AB] For the UE configured with FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA, PCell handlle UlData_PucchReceiveReq no need to consider Scell PUSCH, PCell not need to set harqProcessIndex = 100 in UlData_PucchReceiveReq to L1 refer to 5G_L2_7108. [End CB009169-AB]

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-5 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Excluding UE in transient phase from CS1 list on UL SCell (ID: 11160904)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-5.0-4**  (ID: `12750646`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling For FR1 with UL CA configured according to 5G_UP_ALG_2698_replaced([11120363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqP_rPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), on an overlapping UL slot, SCell UL shall exclude this UE from CS1 list if any of the following conditions is fulfilled:

- any UL CA UE’s periodic CSI is in transient phase as per 5G_UP_ALG_4826_replaced([11195069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv5UqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) on the overlapping slot, indicated byPsPeerCtrl_PcellCsiStatusInd (**status = TransientStart) as per 5G_L2_IF_2339_replaced([10980559](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VjQqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));**
- [Before CNI-137616-C] any UL CA UE’s periodic CSI is in not transient phase on the overlapping slot, indicated by PsPeerCtrl_PcellCsiStatusInd (**status = TransientStop **or **NoTransient) AND rdPerCsiOnPusch(5G_L2_1231) = FALSE; [End CNI-137616-C]******
- UL CA UE is in reconfiguration transient phase due to transition of Transform Precoder state, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9767_replaced([11195124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv57tPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
- For the UE configured with FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA and corresponding UL grant slot only has one k2 value and is not in allow-list (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_25188_replaced([11208767](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwwQQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

 For the UE configured with FR1 TDD+FDD UL CA and corresponding UL grant slot has two K2 value, SCell UL FDM scheduler shall exclude this UE from eligible scheduling list instead of exculding from CS1 list.

Rationale: two K2 values can not be determined in CS1 list phase. FDM scheduler shall choose which K2 to be used. So preventing SCell UL CA UE which is not in allow-list in the target overlapping UL slot from scheduling should process in FDM scheduler.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-6 FR1 UL CA Scheduling SCell UL Scheduling (ID: 11160929)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-6.0-3**  (ID: `11160945`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling UL PDCCH Scheduling:

If UL CA UE is granted on an overlapping UL slot in SCell, SCell shall set the 1st DAI in DCI 0_1 as per 5G_UP_ALG_4466_replaced([11178897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku2y0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The maxDai in PsPeerCtrl_PcellDpaMaxDaiInd (refer to 5G_L2_IF_2210_replaced([10980081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VfmS_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), which is the max DAI of the DPA result on this overlapping UL slot, is used as maximum T-DAI as described in 5G_UP_ALG_4466_replaced([11178897](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku2y0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

PUSCH Scheduling:

For UL CA UE, SCell DL shall update UlData_PuschReceiveReq on overlapping UL slot based on UL scheduling result indicated by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlSchedulingInd (5G_L2_IF_2131_replaced([10980101](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VfmT_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

1. Find UE’s scheduling information in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlSchedulingInd, if scheduling information is not found, it means no HARQ Ack/Nack bits need to be received over SCell PUSCH, SCell shall set OACK to 0.

2. Handle HARQ Ack/Nack bits over PUSCH transmission:

IF (isPuschScheduled in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlSchedulingInd equals TRUE)

UCI shall over PCell’s PUSCH. SCell shall clear set of HARQ bits relevant IEs in PuschReceiveReq, including:

>>numOfUciCsiPart1Bits

>>numOfUciCsiPart1Symbols

>>maxNumOfUciCsiPart2Symbols

>>maxNumOfUciCsiPart2BitsPlusCrcUpTo11Bits

>>maxNumOfUciCsiPart2BitsPlusCrcMoreThan11Bits

>>numOfUciAckBits

>>numOfUciAckSymbols

>>numOfUciAckSymbols1bit

ELSE

Set OACK to numOfHarqDBitsForPusch from PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlSchedulingInd and select one set of HARQ bits relevant IEs based on OACK, select algorithm as per 5G_L2_4704.

ENDIF

3. Handle pCSI report over PUSCH transmission:

For TDD SCell slot overlapping with PUCCH slot, if current grant UL slot overlap with any CSI report’s periodicity/slotOffset indicated by PsPeerCtrl_PcellCsiStatusInd (5G_L2_IF_2339_replaced([10980559](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VjQqvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), SCell UL scheduler shall fill pCSI report IEs in UlData_PuschReceiveReq based on the csiSize value as pCSI report bits and forward message to SCell DL.

For FR1 F + T UL CA, if two TDD SCell UL slots overlap with one FDD PCell PUCCH slot and SCell already grant some UL CA UEs with UCI over SCell PUSCH for the even overlapping UL slot, SCell UL shall save the scheduled UEs’ information, and clear numOfUciAckBits/numOfUciCsiPart1Bits in fdData for the UL grant, if any, for the next odd overlapping UL slot, to ensure HARQ Ack/Nack bits and pCSI report bits are only multiplexed in the PUSCH on Scell in the earliest slot overlapping with the PUCCH, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9538_replaced([11204208](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwjb-PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_UP_ALG_3609_replaced([11159986](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktNNBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Notes:

1. For UL CA UE, if UL Scell is just activated and hasn't received PsPeerCtrl_PcellDpaMaxDaiInd yet, UL scheduler on Scell calculate the set of HARQ bits relevant IEs based on the maximum HARQ bits equal to 4, to ensure correct set of HARQ bits relevant IEs can be found based on numOfHarqDBitsForPusch from PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlSchedulingInd, if any.

 [Before CB012149-CA] 2. For FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA , For overlapping UL slot, PUSCH is schedulered in TDD Pcell only, FDD as Scell is not allowed to scheduling, So there is no UCI (AN or pCSI) over Scell PUSCH; For non overlapping slot, PUSCH is schedulered in Scell only. Refer to 5G_L2_7108

[CB012149-CA]

1. For FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA R15 UE and LNCEL/maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx=0, for overlapping UL slot, PUSCH is schedulered in TDD Pcell only, FDD as Scell is not allowed to scheduling, So there is no UCI (AN or pCSI) over Scell PUSCH; For non overlapping slot, PUSCH is schedulered in Scell only. Refer to 5G_L2_7108.

2. For FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA R15 UE and LNCEL/maxNumOfUlCaUeParallelTx>0, to mitigate the throughput loss of the UE, the PUSCH scheduling of overlapping slot depends on UlCaUeAllowList:

If the UE in UlCaUeAllowList, it is forced to be schedule PUSCH multipluxing with UCI (AN or pCSI) on TDD Pcell slot. In parallel FDD Scell overlapping slot can schedule PUSCH without any restriction.

If the UE not in UlCaUeAllowList, same as behavior of CB009169, for overlapping UL slot, PUSCH is schedulered in TDD Pcell only, FDD as Scell is not allowed to scheduling.

For non overlapping slot, PUSCH is scheduled in Scell only.

Note:

1.FR1 TDD + FDD UL CA R15 UE refers to the UE support 3GPP Release 15 UL CA feature CB009169, it does not support tx switch.

2.If the UE can be selected in UlCaUeAllowList, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_25208_replaced([11208833](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwwQSvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB012149-CA]

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-7 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Excluding UE from UL Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set on Scell due to FDD pCSI bundling special case (ID: 11160951)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11160957`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling For FDD + FR1 TDD UL CA UE, when pCSI bundling functionality is enabled on FDD PCell(actPerCsiReportBundlingFdd=true) and UL Scell has been activated:

If the PCell PUCCH slot on which two bundled pCSI reports(beam and channel acquisition for any TDD SCell) configured and multiplexed is overlapped with SCell's UL slot(s), that means the bundled pCSI reports for TDD SCell have to be sent via PCell PUSCH or SCell PUSCH when there's UL traffic. However, there's L1 HW limitation for pCSI bundling, some L1 HW type(e.g. Loner) does not support pCSI reports bundling over PUSCH for TDD FR1 as mentioned by 5G_UP_ALG_1057_replaced([11103824](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kn1k0PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in this case the TDD SCell UL Pre-Scheduler shall exclude this UE from pre-scheduler candidate set in such overlapping slot regardless whether PCell PUSCH will be scheduled or not.

Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11456_replaced([11196713](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwE61fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-8 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Excluding UE from Pre-Scheduler Candidate Set on UL Scell for ulDlDataSlotRatio=4/6 TDD frame format (ID: 11160963)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11160968`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling For FR1 FDD + TDD UL CA UE with ulDlDataSlotRatio equal to 4/6, see 5G_UP_4446_replaced([11346967](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ubIlvPvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for frame structure definition, UL Pre-Scheduler shall exclude the UE from Candidate Set list according to 5G_UP_ALG_28041_replaced([11195200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv6iw_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

NRBTS/NRCELL/tddFrameStructure/ulDlDataSlotRatio

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-9 FR1 UL CA Scheduling UL Tx Switch (ID: 11160974)

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-9.0-1 FR1 UL CA Scheduling FDD PUSCH symbol check for UL TX switch UE (ID: 11160979)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-9.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11160983`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling For FR1 UL TX switch option1 UE, there is UL TX switch period reserved(only 2 FDD symbols supported) in FDD, refer to 5G_UP_11393_replaced([11356857](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_IvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), so FDD PUSCH scheduling should skip the symbols which reserved for UL TX switch purpose, new PUSCH SLIV(start symbol and number of symbol )will be supported for UL TX switch UE in FDD.

As FDD PUSCH symbols are shortened in certain slot , the available PUSCH symbols are different in different slot, and the avaible PUSCH symbols maybe different in the same slot for non UL TX switch UE and UL TX switch UE.

[Before CB012149-BB]

For FR1 TDD + FDD UL TX switch option1 UE, It's decided that FDD SCell shortens the PUSCH symbols before/after the UL overlapping slot with TDD PCell, no matter whether TDD PCell has PUSCH sheduled with 1layer/2layer, or even no PUSCH in TDD. So there is no need for PCell notifying SCell to shorten the symbol dynamically, the scenario that defines how FDD SCell shortens symbol, refer to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[CB012149-BB]

For FR1 TDD + FDD or FDD +TDD UL TX switch option1 UE, It's decided that FDD shortens the PUSCH symbols before/after the UL overlapping slot with TDD, no matter whether TDD has PUSCH sheduled with 1layer/2layer, or even no PUSCH in TDD. So there is no need for PCell notifying SCell to shorten the symbol dynamically, the scenario that defines how FDD shortens symbol, refer to 5G_UP_11397_replaced([11356891](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uca_JfvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

[End CB012149-BB]

The implementation in current FDD UL scheduler slot N(PDCCH on air slot) can be as below logic:

1) if (the first TDD slot from two TDD slots that overlaps with next FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2+1) is UL slot) and (there is no P-SRS in TDD special slot that overlaps with FDD PUSCH slot(N+K2))

FDD PUSCH in current slot N+K2 should be shortened with last 2 symbols for both NRCELL.puschMappingType==typeA and NRCELL.puschMappingType==typeB.

2) if (the second TDD slot from two TDD slots that overlaps with previous FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2-1) is UL slot) and (there is no A-SRS scheduled by other UEs in FDD PUSCH slot(N+K2))

FDD PUSCH in current slot N+k2 should be shortened with first 2 symbols for both NRCELL.puschMappingType==typeA and NRCELL.puschMappingType==typeB.

3) if (the second TDD slot from two TDD slots that overlaps with previous FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2-1) is UL slot) and (there is A-SRS scheduled by other UEs in FDD PUSCH slot(N+K2))

if (NRBTS/NRCELL.puschMappingType == typeA)

FDD PUSCH in current slot N+k2 should be shortened with first 2 symbols and the last symbol.

if (NRBTS/NRCELL.puschMappingType == typeB)

FDD PUSCH in current slot N+k2 should be shortened with first 2 symbols and the last two symbols.

Note: 1. For P-SRS in TDD special slot overlaps with FDD PUSCH slot, the symbols are shortened according to 5G_L2_11462.

2. For NRCELL.puschMappingType is typeA, A-SRS is located in the last symbol within the slot. For NRCELL.puschMappingType is typeB, A-SRS is located in the last but one symbol within the slot

For the retransmission, if the available PUSCH symbols in current slot are less than the corresponding HARQ initial transmission, then the retransmission is not allowed for UL TX switch UE, so the HARQ retransmission request priority class should be skipped in TD scheduler, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10563_replaced([11196411](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwCenfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Meanwhile if the PUSCH symbols length checking for the retransmission passes, the start PUSCH symbol of the retransmission is allowed to be different from the corresponding HARQ initial transmission.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-9.0-2 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Transient phase handling for UL TX switch UE (ID: 11160989)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-9.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `12494653`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling For FR1 FDD + TDD UL TX [Before CB013553-C] R16 [End CB013553-C] switch option1 UE in UL transient phase, with TDD UL SCell activated, FDD PCell UL scheduler shall exclude such UE from CS1 list if any of the following conditions is met (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4826_replaced([11195069](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv5UqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

• Current FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2) overlaps with p-SRS in TDD special slot and SLIV 69: (S:0, L:11) is not in PUSCH-ConfigCommon TDRA list. UE is excluded with Cs1BlockUeReason=cs1_noSlivForTxSwitchUeInTransientPhase(5G_L2_16735).

• Previous FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2-1) overlaps with p-SRS in TDD special slot and SLIV 53: (S:2, L:12) is not in PUSCH-ConfigCommon TDRA list. UE is excluded with Cs1BlockUeReason=cs1_noSlivForTxSwitchUeInTransientPhase(5G_L2_16735).

• FDD PCell send the first zero UL buffer split after non-zero UL buffer split at FDD PUSCH slot (N) and current FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2) is just after a TDD SCell UL slot and SLIV 53: (S:2, L:12) is not in PUSCH-ConfigCommon TDRA list.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.4.0-9.0-3 FR1 UL CA Scheduling Aperiodic SRS for UL Tx switching (ID: 12523664)

**2.4.7.12.4.0-9.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `12523667`)

FR1 UL CA Scheduling 5G-L2-PS shall not trigger A-SRS ([11201968: Aperiodic SRS/CSI report transmission request](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwa5F_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for FDD cell in UL overlapping slot (UL overlapping slot definition refers [11119486:Overview](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

#### 2.4.7.12.5 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) (ID: 11160998)
##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-1 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) General UL Buffer Split Control in PCell (ID: 11161003)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11161030`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For each FR1 UL CA UE, PCell should do buffer split as 5G_UP_ALG_9495_replaced([11122345](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and do housekeeping after every buffer split as 5G_UP_ALG_5118_replaced([11203660](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYovvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Data volume (5G_UP_ALG_10508_replaced([11122441](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3QPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) that should be counted during buffer split on Pcell is updated with rrmAmbrRatioSplit (5G_L2_372_replaced([11151301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24hRefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) when UL UE AMBR is configured (5G_L2_22121_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Per buffer split trigger defined by 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) except trigger-7, there is condition check (5G_UP_ALG_9496_replaced([11122831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to avoid ping-pong split/not-split .

High/Low threshold is defined to control start/stop buffer split in 5G_UP_ALG_9496_replaced([11122831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) :

High(or TOP) level Threshold: used to control if buffer split can be Started when total buffer > High level Threshold;

Low (or Bottom) level Threshold: used to control if buffer split should be Stopped when total buffer < Low level Threshold,

A fine-tuning paramete(rdUlCaActBsrSplitHyst) is defined to control ping-pong split, ie:

Low level Threshold = 0.5* High level Threshold, with default rdUlCaActBsrSplitHyst= 0.5.

Buffer split evaluation Formula 1 and Formula 2 are updated with rrmAmbrRatioSplit (5G_L2_372_replaced([11151301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24hRefvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))which is defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10514_replaced([11203665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when UL UE AMBR is configured (5G_L2_22121_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

wasBufferSplitLastTime: state variable, which is introduced to maintain buffer split condition:

By default it is FALSE;

when it is FALSE,

if buffer split is started as HIGH level threshold reached, it is set as TRUE;

when it is TRUE,

if buffer split is Stopped when Low level Threshold reached, it is set back to FALSE; else, buffer split is keeping split.

Buffer split splitRatio(i, SCell) is calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_9591_replaced([11122888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the UE’s UL eTh of PCell is done by Pcell for every UL scheduling in a case UL UE AMBR is configured (5G_L2_22121_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) eThav of PCell (the cumulated estimated average throughput of PCell) shall be calculated as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_9492_replaced([11204535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRIfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UE’s UL eTh of SCell is reported by the latest PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd 5G_L2_IF_2366_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from SCell.

Buffer split evaluation Formula 1 and 2 updated with NIDD parameter sCellActivationLevelUL and R&D parameter rdUlCaBsrSplitMinDataThreshold, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9496_replaced([11122831](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Where splitRatio(i, SCell) is calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_9591_replaced([11122888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), and the UE’s UL eTh in PCell is done by every scheduling, UE’s UL eTh in SCell is received by the latest PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd 5G_L2_IF_2366_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) from SCell.

For buffer split handling per different trigger , refer to 5G_L2_9232_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Every buffer split trigger except trigger-7 as 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), detail as 5G_UP_ALG_14522_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), Pcell need to update wasBufferSplitLastTime if it changed.

Every buffer split, Pcell/Scell need do housekeeping as 5G_L2_7630_replaced([11161327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

If no buffer split to SCell after trigger, there is always a PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with zero buffer to SCell.

All the buffer split mentioned in 5G_L2_9232_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for data volume do not impact the harq retransmission of SCell when ifHarqNeedClear = false in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd, else Scell should stop Harq retransmission when ifHarqNeedClear = true.

PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell is also used for buffer control refer to 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

And to avoid corner case when housekeeping as 5G_L2_7632_replaced([11161348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after every buffer split trigger, do bufferSplitProcessSN++ and send it in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd. bufferSplitProcessSN for the UE should be reset when UE is UL deactivated or the UE's UL SCell is released.

5G-L2-PS shall not trigger transmission buffer split (or stop it if it has already been started) when UL UE AMBR is configured (5G_L2_22121_replaced([11151530](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGo_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and avgAmbrPerUlSlot_bits (5G_L2_18349_replaced([11151581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGq_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) exceeds ulAmbrPerSlot_bits (5G_L2_18288_replaced([11151564](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24jGqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

[CB012810-D] 5G-L2-PS shall not trigger transmission buffer split (or stop it if it has already been started) when fake data in transmission buffer is filled by DRB priority PUG (5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End CB012810-D]

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Buffer Split Triggers (ID: 11161035)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12534888`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) According to [11122608: Triggers of Transmission Buffer Split](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), for all the triggered buffer split, for all the non-zero buffer split to SCell, L2PS shall check PCell and UL SCell's overload status in [11122821: Evaluation criteria for scheduler processing overload in any of the UL carrier](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) is triggered or not, and split 0 buffer to the overload CC according to bellow table.

           [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)

| | | |
| --- | --- | --- |
| PCell load according to 11122821 | UL SCell according to 11122821 | CC with zero UL buffer |
| overload | overload | SCell |
| Not overload | Overload | SCell |
| Overload | Not overload | PCell |

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-2 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) SCell activation triggerred (ID: 11161041)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `11161064`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For SCell activation triggerred buffer split, as Trigger-2 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), before PHR report based on a reference PUSCH transmission for SCell is received, transmission buffer split shall not be started.

the process should be as:

1. Check if VPHR for Scell received in PHR processing module:

If (VPHR for scell received)

VphrReportedForScell = true;

else

VphrReportedForScell = false;

end

2. PCell UL scheduler receive information that UE’s UL SCell is activated and ready to be scheduled[CB006139-AA] and the UE is not in step-wise SCell addition procedure(between PsUser_UserModifyReq and PsUser_RrcReconfCompletedReq for step-wise SCell addition)[End CB006139-AA];

3. As the wasBufferSplitLastTime is initilized false when SCell activation, so need to check conditions:

If buffered UL CA eligible data volume > top level and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0 and (VphrReportedForScell == true) ;

do case1 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

send power split, buffer split to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

initialPowerSplitForScellActivition = true;

end

Note:

1. if wasBufferSplitLastTime == false and initialPowerSplitForScellActivition == true after step3, then wait for BSR triggered bufferSplit and powerSplit success, refer to 5G_L2_9237_replaced([11161070](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0K_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-3 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) BSR triggerred (ID: 11161070)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `11161087`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For BSR triggerred buffer split, as Trigger-1 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be as:

1. BSR is received in PCell UL scheduler via LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd 5G_L2_IF_875_replaced([10984687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd 5G_L2_IF_2159_replaced([10980370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2ViChPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

if scell is suspended due to low split Tx power, buffer split should not be triggered;

2. As the wasBufferSplitLastTime may be true or false, so need to check conditions:

If ((wasBufferSplitLastTime and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume >= bottom level) or (!wasBufferSplitLastTime and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level)) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0 and (VphrReportedForScell == true);

If(initialPowerSplitForScellActivition== true)

do case1 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

initialPowerSplitForScellActivition= false;

send power split, buffer split to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else if(reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop == true)

do case2 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop = false;

send power split, buffer split to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else if(reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume == true)

initialize the split tx power for PCell and SCell as the formula for case5 specified by 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume = false;

send power split, buffer split to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

else

buffer split with splitRatio to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

end

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

end

Note:

1. initialPowerSplitForScellActivition refer to 5G_L2_9234_replaced([11161041](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop refer to 5G_L2_9210_replaced([11161760](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25cegvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-4 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Unbalanced buffer triggrred (Trigger-3 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (ID: 11161093)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11161110`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For buffer split triggrred by Trigger-3 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be as:

1. Every time after UE is scheduled in PCell UL, or PCell UL receive PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd from SCell 5G_L2_IF_2366_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), UE check whether the trigger as 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) is valid. if scell is suspended due to low split Tx power, buffer split should not be triggered;

2. If the trigger is valid, as the wasBufferSplitLastTime may be true or false, so need to check conditions:

If (wasBufferSplitLastTime == false)

stop buffer split and return;

else

If (buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume >= bottom level) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0;

Buffer split to SCell with splitRatio by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

end

end

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-5 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Scell resume triggerred (Trigger-4 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) (ID: 11161115)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-5.0-2**  (ID: `11161126`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For SCell resume triggerred buffer split, as Trigger-4 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be as:

1. when Scell resume success as 5G_L2_9227_replaced([11161975](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dsqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PCell Ul will check whether the trigger is valid;

2. Since SCell Ul scheduling is suspended previously, the wasBufferSplitLastTime is false, reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop is true, so need to check conditions:

If buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0;

do case2 initialSplitTxPower calculation for Pcell and Scell as 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

send power split, buffer split to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop = false;

wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

split zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ));

wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

end

Note:

1. reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop refer to 5G_L2_9210_replaced([11161760](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25cegvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. if wasBufferSplitLastTime == false and reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop ==true after step2, then wait for BSR triggered bufferSplit and powerSplit success, refer to 5G_L2_9237_replaced([11161070](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0K_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-6 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) SCell Ul RLQ resume triggered (ID: 11161132)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-6.0-2**  (ID: `11161143`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For buffer split triggered by Trigger-5(Ul RLQ resume) in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be described as:

1. When PCell Ul received SCell Ul RLQ resume via PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd(5G_L2_IF_2944_replaced([10980976](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vm7A_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case SCell in overheating status, or SCell no split tx power, etc).

2. Since SCell Ul scheduling is suspended before, the wasBufferSplitLastTime is false, need to check conditions as following:

if (!wasBufferSplitLastTime and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0:

 if for RLQ resume after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expired, initialize the split tx power as the formula for case2 in 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

 Send buffer split with splitRatio(10%) and power split with initialSplitTxPower via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd as specified by 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to SCell;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

 if for RLQ resume before rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expired, no need to initialize split tx power, keep the existing split tx power for PCell and SCell as that before RLQ suspend, stop the rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower:

 Send buffer split with splitRatio(10%) via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd as specified by 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to SCell;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

 Don't need to send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

 Wait for next PCell BSR to trigger buffer split (and power split in case rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expired);

end

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-7 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) SCell overheating resume triggered (ID: 11161149)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-7.0-2**  (ID: `11161158`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For buffer split triggered by Trigger-6(overheating resume) in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be described as:

1. When PCell Ul received overheating resume via PsPeerCtrl_ScellStatusInd(5G_L2_IF_682_replaced([10979855](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYIfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))), PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case SCell Ul bad RLQ status, or SCell no split tx power, etc).

2. Since SCell Ul scheduling is suspended before, the wasBufferSplitLastTime is false, need to check conditions as following:

if (!wasBufferSplitLastTime and buffered [Before CB009059-BB] nonGbr [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data volume > top level) and splitRatio(i, SCell) !=0:

 initialize the split tx power as the formula for case5 in 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

 send buffer split with splitRatio(10%) and power split with initialSplitTxPower via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd as specified by 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to SCell;

 reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume = false;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = true;

else

 Don't need to send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd;

 wasBufferSplitLastTime = false;

 Wait for next PCell BSR to trigger buffer split and power split

end

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-8 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) UL carrier in NACK flood state(Trigger-7 Nack Flood) (ID: 11161165)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-8.0-2**  (ID: `11161175`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For buffer split triggerred by trigger-7 in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)):

(1) When PCell enters Nack Flood state as 5G_UP_ALG_4892_replaced([11197752](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwH-JvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or exit Nack Flood state as 5G_L2_8747_replaced([11163820](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25or0PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), or PCell receives SCell's NACK Flood event by PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd, PCell should save all the NACK Flood event, then check if UE NACK Flood state as 5G_UP_ALG_14522_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

(2) Every time after UE is scheduled in PCell UL, or PCell UL receive PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd from SCell 5G_L2_IF_2366_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), Pcell need to check if UE NACK Flood state as 5G_UP_ALG_14522_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Detailed handling:

1. If ONLY One UL carrier in NACK flood state:

 IN 1 or 2 scenario, if buffer split can be triggered by NFD condition in 5G_UP_ALG_14522_replaced([11122787](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PCell split UE's UL [Before CB009059-BB] non-GBR [CB009059-BB] UL CA eligible [End CB009059-BB] data buffer as 5G_UP_ALG_14527_replaced([11123046](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) directly. According to the split buffer size for scell, update wasBufferSplitLastTime .

1. IF ALL UL carrieres both in NACK Flood state, keep current buffer split;

2. When ALL UL carrieres both exit NACK Flood state, re-trigger buffer split will be along with next general triggers (i.e. trigger-2 or trigger-3 which are defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-9 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Pcell exiting the TP enabled::SAG On state resume triggered (ID: 11161179)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-9.0-1**  (ID: `11161185`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) When UE exits the TP enabled::SAG On state(refer to 5G_UP_ALG_18906_replaced([11204759](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwlRLvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and all below conditions are satisfied:

1. UL SCell is still actived.

2. if (NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = 'None') or (Scell activation method='BLIND' and NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = 'Deact_Scells_VoNR_SAg')

Then PCell shall trigger normal buffer split in order to enable PUSCH scheduling on SCell. Please refer to the corresponding suspend behavior in 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Case9.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-10 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell exit transient phase triggered (ID: 11161191)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-10.0-1**  (ID: `11161196`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For buffer split triggered by Trigger-8(UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell and TDD UL SCell, when FDD PCell finished the transient phase) in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the process should be described as:

1. When FDD PCell exits the transient phase(5G_UP_ALG_4816_replaced([11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), FDD PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case SCell in overheating status, etc).

2. If yes, FDD PCell shall trigger normal buffer split in order to enable PUSCH scheduling on SCell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-11 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) PCell complete the step-wise SCell addition reconfiguration triggered (ID: 11161202)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-2.0-11.0-1**  (ID: `11161206`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) When PCell receives PsUser_UserModifyReq to do step-wise SCell addition to a CA UE, will stop buffer split to its DL-UL SCell after NxDPA period delay. After the corresponding PsUser_RrcReconfCompletedReq:

1. PCell Ul will check whether this trigger is valid(invalid in case the DL-UL SCell is not active or DL-UL SCell in overheating status, etc).

2. If yes, PCell shall trigger normal buffer split in order to enable PUSCH scheduling on SCell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-3 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) General UL Buffer Split Assist in SCell (ID: 11161211)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11161223`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For each FR1 UL CA UE, Scell need assist and report information to Pcell, to help Pcell run buffer split control in 5G_L2_7625_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

(1) SCell should forward BSR info to PCell and report housekeeping info to PCell after every scheduling.

BSR forwarded from SCell to PCell need inform its new transmission time to PCell, the time stamp includes hyper system frame number to differ time gap longer than 5 seconds(sfn, slot can only tell about 5 seconds time difference). And PCell should keep rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime as 5G_UP_ALG_10514_replaced([11203665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by the BSR’s first transmission on air (hfn, sfn, slot).

(2)SCell shall report PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd as 5G_L2_IF_2366_replaced([10980622](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vj3t_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) to PCell after every UL scheduling.

(3) For every PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell, SCell shall do housekeeping as 5G_L2_7630_replaced([11161327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), store bufferSplitProcessSN in local context. And to avoid corner case when housekeeping as 5G_L2_7632_replaced([11161348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), in every PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd, SCell shall inform the current bufferSplitProcessSN to PCell.

[CB006137-BB]

(4) SCell UL will report uplink RLQ status change(bad or good) to PCell UL via psPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd as defined in 5G_L2_IF_2944_replaced([10980976](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2Vm7A_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), when SCell UL RLQ evaluation result is bad or when SCell UL RLQ is good after recovery from bad by DL pathloss check procedure.

(5) SCell DL will report CQI-based overheating status to PCell DL via PsPeerCtrl_ScellStatusInd as defined in 5G_L2_IF_685_replaced([10979873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYJfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then PCell DL will forward this overheating status to PCell UL via DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate.

[End CB006137-BB]

---

Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 12882326: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) In some special cases, Pcell directly interrupt UL buffer split and send PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd **with zero buffer to SCell for **procedure control(i.e Scell release, overheating,etc), and then NO buffer split condition checking in 5G_L2_7625_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).****

Special triggers as following:

Case 1: when PCell UL scheduler receive information that UE’s UL SCell is deactivated, PCell need to trigger buffer split without any condition check, merge all the non Gbr Data and send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false.

Case 2: release case, refer to 5G_L2_6912_replaced([11160050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25VJxfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 3: when scell suspend triggered by the split TX power is too low on SCell where there are only Ul overlapping slots in 5G_UP_ALG_10921_replaced([11119951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) condition 1, send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false, refer to 5G_L2_8628_replaced([11161959](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dspvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 4: Overheating(CQI=0), PCell Ul get the overheating status of joint DL/UL scell via *DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate from PCell Dl, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = **true, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2871_replaced([11123293](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).***

Case 5: when activated UL SCell UL scheduling need to be suspended due to measurement gap setup conflict with SCell beam as 5G_UP_ALG_2878_replaced([11123344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiTivvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), PCell need to trigger buffer split without any condition check, merge all the UL CA eligible Data and send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false. And stop further buffer split trigger until the measurement gap release.

Case 6: when non UL CA eligible LCG setup and UE not have lch-ToSCellRestriction capability, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, send zero buffer to SCell by PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd 5G_L2_IF_2140_replaced([10980170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VgNXfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) with ifHarqNeedClear = false refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10193_replaced([11123394](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqi6lfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 7: Ul bad RLQ status, when PCell Ul receive SCell Ul bad RLQ status, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11884_replaced([11121639](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqZwp_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

is equal to

and

Case 9: when UE enters the TP enabled::SAG On state in Pcell if (NRCELL.sCellDeactInPoorRf = 'None' and UE's Scell activation method!='BLIND' ), please refer to 5G_UP_ALG_19252_replaced([11205370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwo7h_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case10: For UL Tx switching UE with FDD PCell and TDD UL SCell, when FDD PCell decide to conduct UL scheduling using only CSS (Type3-PDCCH), DCI format 0_0 for the transient phase according to 5G_UP_ALG_4816_replaced([11194889](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv4GhfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if not during step-wise SCell addition procedure, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = true, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10516_replaced([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case11: when step-wise Scell addition to a CA UE with already configured UL SCell, and the UL SCell is active, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = true, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10377_replaced([11122349](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqfQNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Case 12: when Enhanced RRC Reconfiguration UL PRB Randomization is activated (i.e, isMacLayerMonitorNeeded is evaluated as ‘TRUE’ according to 5G_L2_22352_replaced([11145029](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_239QxPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), UL transmission is suspended on both PCell and SCell during the MAC layer monitoring procedure (5G_UP_ALG_29060_replaced([11153872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kspMVPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_UP_ALG_10516_replaced([11122476](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). To suspend UL transmission on SCell side, PCell Ul will trigger buffer split without any condition check, and send zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false.

[CB013709-CB]

Case 13: according to [11122476: Information exchange for Transmission Buffer Split](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3RPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), when UL buffer split is triggered, if UL SCell is overloaded as [11122821: Evaluation criteria for scheduler processing overload in any of the UL carrier](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9), PCell shall split 0 UL buffer to the UL SCell by sending zero buffer to SCell via PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with ifHarqNeedClear = false, increase the PM counter in [12533213: Total number of times the UL countermeasure type 6 is active](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_alnzkxxAEfCQJ5daVHVkgg?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

[End CB013709-CB]

When PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell for **procedure control, PCell shall do housekeeping as 5G_L2_7630_replaced([11161327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apU_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) after every control trigger. And to avoid corner case when housekeeping as 5G_L2_7632_replaced([11161348](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25apV_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after control trigger, do bufferSplitProcessSN++ and send it in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd. *bufferSplitProcessSN for the UE should be reset when UE is UL deactivated or the UE's UL SCell is released.***

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-5 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Do Housekeeping Based on Buffer Split (ID: 11161327)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-5.0-3**  (ID: `11161342`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) As description in 5G_L2_7625_replaced([11161003](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25YNH_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after every buffer split trigger(data trigger in 5G_UP_ALG_10281_replaced([11122608](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqf3TvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or control trigger), there is PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell, both PCell and SCell shall do housekeeping based on the buffer split result.

After every buffer split for data or control is done(data volume to SCell or zero data to SCell), PCell and SCell need to do housekeeping based on bsr report time, which is defined as rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.

rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime includes Xhfn (hfn/sfn/slot) and Tsc.

rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Tsc is corresponding local Tsc based on rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Xhfn.

rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime is maintained in Pcell and Scell separately but with same value.

To sync rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime between Pcell and Scell, 4 scenarios should be taken into consideration:

1.Pcell receive BSR report from L2LO:

Pcell save the rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime of BSR report first transmission on air time in bufferStatus locally.

2.Scell receive BSR report from L2LO:

Scell just forward it with on air time of BSR report to Pcell by ScellUlInfoUpdateInd.

3.Pcell do buffer split (no matter normal split or zero split):

Pcell send PcellUlBufferSplitInd with on air time of latest BSR report (hfnReport/ sfnReport/ slotReport).

4.Scell receive PcellUlBufferSplitInd:

Scell save on air time of latest BSR report (hfnReport/ sfnReport/ slotReport) as rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime locally.

When calculate the time sequence for rrmScheduledUlData_bytes, use rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTimeas following steps:

1. diff = abs (rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Tsc - Tsc for scheduling) ;

2. if diff < 4 seconds

use rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.xsfn to order the time sequence;

[PR726722] If rrmBufferSplitBaseTime.xsfn on Pcell and on air time of BSR report forwarded from Scell are the same, BSR shall also be handled if all of the following conditions are fulfilled (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_5131_replaced([11203806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_wfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

• BSR forwarded from Scell is zero BSR.

• UE has Proactive Grant Type = Skippable-Dynamic or Skippable-Dynamic-Enhanced (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_4839_replaced([11195286](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv7J1fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). [End PR726722]

else if Tsc for scheduling - rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime.Tsc > 0

the scheduling is later than the rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime;

else

the scheduling is older than the rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime;

end

UL CA) 11161386: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 11161386: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) 11161386: UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) There are some corner cases as bellow, solutions should be done to prevent side effect. 1. To avoid housekeeping report trigger obsolete buffer split as following, bufferSplitProcessSN is introduced. For every buffer split trigger or control trigger for the UE, do bufferSplitProcessSN++ and send it in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd, store the bufferSplitProcessSN in local UE’s context. And on receiving PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd, SCell should store the bufferSplitProcessSN from message in local UE’s context after validating the bufferSplitProcessSN is 1 greater than the last one. Also, every time SCell report PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd to PCell, the message should fill its local bufferSplitProcessSN. When PCell receive PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd from SCell, check if the bufferSplitProcessSN in message is older than PCell local bufferSplitProcessSN. If it is older, the buffer info within this PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd message is dropped by PCell, only present eTh for the UE should be used to updated SCell eTh in PCell.

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).

[CNI-134375-M] Link: [End CNI-134375-M] 2. To avoid 1 PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with 2 buffer split event for 1 UE as following, once the second buffer split is triggered by BSR within one slot in PCell, the first buffer split result should be obsoleted by the second one, also the bufferSplitProcessSN should fall back to keep as the same as the first buffer split within the slot.

Could not load image (check sign-in and GCS access).[CNI-134375-M] Link: [End CNI-134375-M] 3. When UE’s buffer over transmission as 5G_UP_ALG_9787_replaced([11203724](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwg_sPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) happened in one CC, to keep all the data volume tracked in PCell and minimalize its effect on SCell, process the data over transmission as following with k as the index of LCG, i is the time point, the initial transmission time of receivedDataUlLcg_bytes is later than rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime: If buffer over transmission happens on PCell, which means in PCell rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i] – receivedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i] < 0, so in PCell: Keep rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k] = 0; overReceivedBytes [k, i] = receivedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i] - rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i]; overReceivedBytes[k] += overTransmissionByte[k, i]; If buffer over transmission happens on SCell, which means in SCell rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i] – receivedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i] < 0, so in SCell: Keep rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k] = 0; overReceivedBytes [k, i]= receivedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i] - rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k, i]; this volume should be reported to PCell by PsPeerCtrl_ ScellUlInfoUpdateInd and then reset to 0; Upon receiving PsPeerCtrl_ ScellUlInfoUpdateInd, if time i is later than rrmLastUlBsrUpdateTime: in PCell, PCell should do: rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k] -= overReceivedBytes [k, i] ; if rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k] < 0 overReceivedBytes[k] += overReceivedBytes [k, i] - rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k]; keep rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k] = 0; end If a buffer split triggerred not by a BSR, the overall rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k] for both PCell and SCell should be rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k]_PCell + rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes[k]_SCell - overReceivedBytes[k], and if the result < 0 it should be =0. Upon any updated BSR and after every triggered buffer split, the overReceivedBytes[k] should be reset to 0.

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-7 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Special Buffer Split Cases with UL TX switch UE (ID: 11161392)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-7.0-1**  (ID: `11161396`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For FR1 FDD + TDD UL TX switch option1 UE:

1, When TDD UL SCell received a first non-zero UL buffer split after zero UL buffer split, TDD UL SCell shall proceed scheduling at least 5 slot later.

2, When FDD PCell send the first zero UL buffer split after non-zero UL buffer split at FDD PUSCH slot (N) and current FDD PUSCH slot (N+K2) is just after a TDD SCell UL slot, FDD PCell shall shorten the PUSCH. After that FDD PCell does not need to shorten PUSCH due to TDD SCell UL slot any more.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.5.0-8 UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) Evaluate UE power for intra-band (ID: 11161402)

**2.4.7.12.5.0-8.0-1**  (ID: `11161405`)

UL Buffer Split (FR1 UL CA) For UE configured with FR1 intra-band contiguous UL CA. Evaluate power state according to 5G_UP_ALG_28261_replaced([11123109](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFavvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Rationale:

UE power state false it means that UE has not enough power for SCell.

UE power state true it means that UE has enough power for SCell.

FR1 FDD-TDD UL CA UE is forced to set dynamic power split to be disabled, which means static power split mode, so above dynamic UL power split condition checking for enable/disable do not need to implementation any more, refer to definition of rdFr1UlCaDynamicPowerSplit (5G_L2_9282_replaced([11161414](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQYPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

If dynamic power split is disabled:

**[End CNI-137616-A]**

1. **No dynamic power split:**

 No initial power split (5G_L2_7106_replaced([11161721](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3evvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

If PCell is TDD cell, then need to calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB (5G_L2_8660_replaced([11161551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3cfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). For all other cases,no need to calculate nonPowerLimitedTxPowerPerPRB (5G_L2_8660_replaced([11161551](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3cfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))),

no need to calculate efficiencyPerPRB(5G_L2_8663_replaced([11161689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep(5G_L2_8698_replaced([11161699](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)));

No splitPower and powerAdjustStep in PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd;

No Pcell increase power and power control in 5G_L2_8627_replaced([11161861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) by PsPeerCtrl_ScellEfficiencyReportInd and PsPeerCtrl_PcellPowerControlInd;

No Scell increase power scenario in 5G_L2_8627_replaced([11161861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1. No **UE Over Power Status check in 5G_L2_8741_replaced([11161801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ceivvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));**

2. No **resume or suspend (5G_L2_8628_replaced([11161959](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dspvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_8629_replaced([11161992](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dsrPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) due to no split power.**

3. No **power split IWK with buffer split, i.e:**

Power split with buffer split defind in 5G_L2_9232_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

Power split stop/start due to buffer split stop/start defined in 5G_L2_8639_replaced([11161904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFnPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-2 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) MPR Applicability (ID: 11161517)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11161522`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) For FR1 intra-band UL CA, when there is no buffer split, then MPR is applied on the PCell, in other case MPR is not applied.

Rationale: L2-PS on one serving cell is not aware if scheduling is happening on the other serving cell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-3 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Enter power split mode (ID: 11161529)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11161533`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) FR1 UL CA UE with dynamic power split enabled (refer to 5G_L2_9564_replaced([11161442](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), enters power split mode if any of the following initialization cases for split TX power between PCell and SCell is fulfilled (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10870_replaced([11119474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqKgH_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))):

                      [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiThPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)

| | | |
| --- | --- | --- |
| | PCell | SCell |
| Case1 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after SCell activation. | Triggered initialization of split TX power. |
| Case2 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower milliseconds timer expired (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10919_replaced(11119940)). | Same as Case1. |
| Case3 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after SCell resume (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10923_replaced(11119968)). | Same as Case1. |
| Case4 | Receive psPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd with powerState == Resume (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10923_replaced(11119968)). | Send psPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd with powerState == Resume. |
| Case5 | Trigger initialization of split TX power after Ul SCell recovered from overheating (refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2874_replaced(11123313)). | Same as Case1. |

Note:

Initialization of split TX power means PCell sends PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with initialSplitTxPower and rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes > 0 to SCell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-2.0-4 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Exit power split mode (ID: 11161540)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11161706`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) the splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep calculation is triggered in below scenario

1. overpower state transform in the overpower check scenario, including non-overpower to overpower, overpower to non-overpower

2. PHR received in pcell or forward from scell in overpower state

In the overpower to non-overpower scenario, there is no need to request efficiencryRequest of scell, as the pcell/scell splitTxPowerAdjstmentStep equals to NIDD step ueSplitPowerAdjStep directly.

In other scenarios except overpower to non-overpower, pcell will sent efficiencyRequest with PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlPhrForwardind to request scell efficiencyPerPrb, and scell response with PsPeerCtrl_ScellEfficiencyReport. Once pcell receive the efficiencyPerPrb from scell, the cacluation of pcell efficiencyPerPRB and pcell/scell splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep will be triggered.

Notes:

1. the servingCell j0 with higher efficiencyPerPRB(5G_L2_8663_replaced([11161689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) will treat splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep(i, j0, t) equals to NIDD parameter ueSplitPowerAdjStep, and the servingCell j1 with lower efficiencyPerPRB (5G_L2_8663_replaced([11161689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) value will calculate a new step splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep(i, j1, t) as defined in 5G_UP_ALG_10877_replaced([11119861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2. splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep(i, j0, t), splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep(i, j1, t) is only caculated on Pcell, and Pcell will send the result with psPeerCtrl_PcellUlPowerCtrlInd(refer to 5G_L2_IF_2926_replaced([10980930](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VmT-vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) to Scell.

3. When comparing efficiencyPerPRB value of Pcell and Scell, Scell's efficiencyPerPRB should be multiplied by weightRatioOfUePwrScellVsPcell, as notes description in 5G_L2_8663_replaced([11161689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3dPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

4. the rdMinSplitTxPowerAdjStep is always smaller than ueSplitPowerAdjStep, which make sure the efficiencyPerPRB take effect in the lower efficiencyPerPRB cell's splitTxPowerAdjustmentStep calculation in over power state.

Refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1918_replaced([11201901](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgUeCPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-6 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) The maximum PRBs based on the split TX power (ID: 11161711)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11161716`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) For a UE configured with FR1 UL CA, based on the split TX power, the maximum PRBs for Ul transmission with the required TX power is calculated as 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower is changed in below scenario:

1. splitTxPower change

2. PHR report

[CB006137-BC]

1. TPC change when closed loop power control is enabled.

 [End CB006137-BC]

For the implementation simplicity purpose, maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower is calculated at the time to be used. e.g. used for calculating requireMorePower in Pcell and Sell, refer to 5G_L2_8741_replaced([11161801](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ceivvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Notes: maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower is calculated independently in Pcell and Scell.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-7 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) initialSplitTxPower for Pcell and Scell (ID: 11161721)

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-1 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Overview scenarios for intial power split (ID: 11161727)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11161737`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) According to 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), for a UE configured with FR1 Ul CA [CB006137-C]and dynamic power split enabled (refer to 5G_L2_9564_replaced([11161442](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB006137-C], split TX power shall be initialized for Pcell and Scell in below cases:

· Case1: First time UE transmission buffer split is started after Scell activation;

· Case2: UE transmission buffer split is started after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower milliseconds since UE transmission buffer split is stopped specified in 5G_UP_ALG_10919_replaced([11119940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

· Case3: First time UE transmission buffer split is started after Ul scheduling is resumed on Scell in Ul overlapping slots specified in 5G_UP_ALG_10923_replaced([11119968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

· Case4: Ul scheduling is resumed for a UE configured with FDD + FR1 TDD UL CA on Pcell in Ul overlapping slots specified in 5G_UP_ALG_10923_replaced([11119968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

· Case5: Ul Scell is recovered from overheating status specified in 5G_UP_ALG_2874_replaced([11123313](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqiThPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

Message flow refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1829_replaced([11202015](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgVsE_vREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).
