##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-3 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case2 buffer split restart after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout (ID: 11161760)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11161763`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case2 scenario:

After rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, set reInitialPowerSplitForBufferStop = true. For the time BSR is received from PCell UL scheduler via LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd 5G_L2_IF_875_replaced([10984687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxzvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd 5G_L2_IF_2159_replaced([10980370](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2ViChPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB006137-BB] or when PCell Ul receives the Ul RLQ resume status from SCell Ul via PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlControlInd refer to 5G_L2_IF_685_replaced([10979873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VeYJfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))[End CB006137-BB], L2-PS should check as 5G_L2_9237_replaced([11161070](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0K_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Notes:

1. when buffer split stopped, whether Pcell start rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timer, depend on if Scell UL retransmission is possible, it is defined by 5G_UP_ALG_10919_replaced([11119940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2. As scell suspend in CB006137 will start rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower, Scell resume will also go to this case2 initialSplitTxPower scenario.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-4 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case3 buffer split restarted after Ul power resumed on Scell Ul overlapping slots (ID: 11161769)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11161774`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case3 scenario:

case 3 is not used in this F+T UL CA, only appllied in the case that Scell has both UL overlapping and non Overlapping slot, when Scell is suspened in UL overlapping slot, non overlapping slot is still schedulable, which means buffer split should not be stopped. For F+T UL CA, when Scell is suspened, buffer split will be stopped since Scell has only UL overlapping slots. According to the description that "Split TX power shall be initialized based on case2 on Pcell and Scell, if UE transmission buffer split is started after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower milliseconds since UE transmission buffer split is stopped, regardless of case3 or case4.", case2 initialSplitTxPower caculation will be chosen in this F+T UL CA scell resume scenario.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-5 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case4 Ul Power resumed on Pcell UL overlapping slots for a UE configured with FDD + FR1 TDD UL CA (ID: 11161780)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-5.0-1**  (ID: `11161785`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case4 scenario:

Scell UL check as below:

After pcell resume check pass with rdNumForMinSplitTxPowerCheck in 5G_UP_ALG_10923_replaced([11119968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),

the case4 initialSplitTxPower should be triggered directly.

Note:

pcell resume check refer to 5G_L2_9230_replaced([11162010](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25eTsPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-6 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case5 overheating resume (ID: 11161790)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-7.0-6.0-1**  (ID: `11161795`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) case5 scenario:

After PCell Ul received the overheating resume status from PCell Dl via DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate, which is reported from SCell Dl via PsPeerCtrl_ScellStatusInd, check if send buffer split conditions can fulfill:

 no: PCell Ul don't send PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd to SCell Ul with rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes=0, but wait for next PCell BSR to trigger buffer split and power split, and set reInitSplitTxPowerForOHResume=true.

 yes: PCell Ul start powerSplit and bufferSplit(splitRatio for SCell is 0.1, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_9591_replaced([11122888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqhFYfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), and send PsPeerCtrl_PcellUlBufferSplitInd with rrmBufferedDataUlTotalBytes>0, and initialSplitTxPower could be calculated according to the formula for case5 in 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-8 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) UE Over Power Status Check (ID: 11161801)

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-8.0-1 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) requireMorePower status in Pcell (ID: 11161806)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-8.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11161818`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) ue requireMorePower in Pcell

below are the conditions should be checked for the pcell requireMorePower in ul scheduling slot:

[Before CB006137-C]

1. Pcell powerState !=suspend (there is no ul scheduling in overlap slot if pcell suspend)

2. Scell powerState !=suspend or (scell powerstate ==suspend and powerSplitTimerHandle != invalid) (require more power if scell suspend before the rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout)

3. PrbTobeSchedule > maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx in ul overlap slot

4. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower < minPrb for new tx in ul overlap slot

5. Prb >maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx ul non-overlap slot in pcell

[CB006137-C]

1. UE is in power split mode refer to 5G_L2_9563_replaced([11161436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower < minPrb for new tx in ul overlap slot

3. PrbTobeSchedule > maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx in ul overlap slot and PCell's splitTxPower is less than PCell's maximum UL transmission power considering MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

4. Prb >maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx ul non-overlap slot in pcell and PCell's splitTxPower is less than PCell's maximum UL transmission power considering MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Where:

- MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

 [End CB006137-C]

and the logic should be handled as

[Before CB006137-C]

if((1 and 2 and (3 or 4)) or 5 )

[CB006137-C]

if(1 and (2 or 3 or 4))

[End CB006137-C]

requireMorePower = true

Note:

1. PrbTobeSchedule refer to case2 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. minPrb refer to case1 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

3. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower calculation refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

4. Prb in ul non-overlap slot is not limited by maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower, as there is no power split in non-overlap slot.

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-8.0-2 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) requireMorePower status for Scell (ID: 11161826)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-8.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11161837`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) requireMorePower in Scell

below are the conditions should be checked for the scell requireMorePower:

[Before CB006137-C]

1. scell powerState !=suspend (there is no ul scheduling in overlap slot if scell suspend)

2. pcell powerState !=suspend

3. PrbTobeSchedule > maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx in ul overlap slot

4. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower < minPrb for new tx in ul overlap slot

[CB006137-C]

1. UE is in power split mode refer to 5G_L2_9563_replaced([11161436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. PrbScheduled > maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx in ul overlap slot and SCell's splitTxPower is less than SCell's maximum UL transmission power considering MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Where:

- MPR and DeltaMPR256QAM refer to 5G_UP_ALG_11120_replaced([11130873](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krA0p_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ));

 [End CB006137-C]

and the logic should be handled as

[Before CB006137-C]

If ((1 and 2) and (3 or 4)

[CB006137-C]

If (1 and 2)

[End CB006137-C]

requireMorePower = true

Note:

1. PrbScheduled refer to case1 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. minPrb refer to case1 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

3. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower calculation refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10883_replaced([11119896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuOPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

4. Scell sync Scell requireMorePower status to Pcell by PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd->ScellIncreasingPower

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-8.0-3 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Pcell Determine UE Over Power based on pcell&scell requireMorePower status (ID: 11161844)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-8.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11161855`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) For a UE configured with FR1 Ul CA, L2PS on Pcell evaluates whether the UE is in over power state periodically when [Before CB006137-C]UE TX power is split on Pcell and Scell in Ul overlapping slots[CB006137-C]UE is in power split mode (refer to 5G_L2_9563_replaced([11161436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))[End CB006137-C]. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10903_replaced([11119931](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuP_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Pcell run over power checking with below steps:

1. requireMorePower status is updated per Pcell(5G_L2_9196_replaced([11161806](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25cei_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) and Scell (5G_L2_9198_replaced([11161826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25cejvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), requireMorePower for Scell is from PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd->ScellIncreasingPower. if ScellIncreasingPower exist in PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd, then requireMorePower for Scell is true for this slot.

2. once set to true in the Pcell ul scheduling within the rdPeriodForOverPowerEva period, the final requireMorePower for Pcell should be true in this rdPeriodForOverPowerEva period, which is denoted as Pcell requireMorePower |= true.

3. this is the same for scell as pcell in step2.

4. when the rdPeriodForOverPowerEva check point reached, do the over power check based on the requireMorePower value from step2

if overpower state == non-overpower

if ((Pcell requireMorePower == true) and (Scell requireMorePower == true))

overpower state == overpower

else

if ((Pcell requireMorePower == false) or (Scell requireMorePower ==false))

checkCounter++

else

checkCounter = 0

if (checkCounter >= rdNumForNonOverPowerCheck)

overpower state == non-overpower

1. after the over power check, the final requireMorePower for Pcell and Scell should be reset to false to start a new journey of the next rdPeriodForOverPowerEva

 Note:

1. An evaluation period (rdPeriodForOverPowerEva) for the UE is defined by rdPeriodForOverPowerEva, refers to 5G_UP_ALG_11993_replaced([11120016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqM8U_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

2. Checking whether UE need more power than the split TX power in Ul overlapping slots refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

3. Defines the number of evaluation periods to check whether an FR1 Ul CA UE is in non over power state or not is defined by rdNumForNonOverPowerCheck, refers to 5G_UP_ALG_10944_replaced([11120023](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqM8VfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

4. the start sfn/slot of over power check point of ue is depended on where the ue added to the ue distribution table, and the check point repeat each rdPeriodForOverPowerEva interval

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-9 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Adjust split TX power for UL Overlapping Slot Scheduling (ID: 11161861)

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-9.0-1 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Power increase from Pcell scenario (ID: 11161865)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-9.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11161879`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) For a UE configured with FR1 UL CA, if one Ul scheduling on any cell j in an Ul overlapping slot requires more power than the given split power, then the split TX power is adjusted, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10881_replaced([11119868](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuNfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

below are the conditions should be checked before the split TX power adjustment:

[Before CB006137-C]

1. Pcell powerState !=suspend (there is no ul scheduling in overlap slot if pcell suspend)

2. Scell powerState !=suspend or (scell powerstate ==suspend and powerSplitTimerHandle != invalid) (no need to adjust power if scell suspend before the rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout)

3. PrbTobeSchedule > maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx in ul overlap slot

4. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower < minPrb for new tx in ul overlap slot

5. pcellSplitTxPower + pcellAdjStep <= min(Pcmax - rdUePowerReserved - rdMinSplitTxPower, servingcellPcmax)

6. rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is invalid

[CB006137-C]

1. UE is in power split mode, refer to 5G_L2_9563_replaced([11161436](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25bQZPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. PrbTobeSchedule > maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower for new tx in ul overlap slot

3. maxPrbBasedOnSplitPower < minPrb for new tx in ul overlap slot

4. pcellSplitTxPower + pcellAdjStep <= min(Pcmax - rdUePowerReserved - rdMinSplitTxPower, servingcellPcmax)

5. rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is invalid

[End CB006137-C]

and the logic should be handled as

[Before CB006137-C]

if(1 and 2 and (3 or 4) and 5 and 6)

[CB006137-C]

if(1 and (2 or 3) and 4 and 5)

[End CB006137-C]

pcellSplitTxPower += pcellAdjStep

Note:

1. PrbTobeSchedule refer to case2 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

2. minPrb refer to case1 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

3. Pcmax refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10877_replaced([11119861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

4. servingcellPcmax refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10873_replaced([11119621](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

5. pcellAdjStep refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10877_replaced([11119861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

6. powerSplitTimerHandle is valid when rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is running

After receive PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlHousekeepingReportInd->ScellIncreasingPower, do the following:

if(ScellIncreasingPower > 0)

pcellSplitTxPower -= ScellIncreasingPower

Scell requireMorePower |= true

else

Scell requireMorePower |= true

Note:

Scell requireMorePower refer to 5G_L2_9199_replaced([11161844](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dFkvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

Refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1836_replaced([11202366](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgXhSfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

---

[End CB006137-C]

and the logic should be handled as

[Before CB006137-C]

if(1 and 2 and (3 or 4) and 5)

[CB006137-C]

if(1 and 2 and 3)

[End CB006137-C]

scellSplitTxPower += scellAdjStep

Note:

[Before CB006137-C]

1. PrbTobeSchedule refer to case2 in 5G_UP_ALG_10890_replaced([11119904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

 [CB006137-C]

 [End CB006137-C]

2. Pcmax refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10877_replaced([11119861](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

After receive psPeerCtrl_PcellUlPowerCtrlInd->pcellIncreasingPower, do the following:

if(pcell powerstate !=suspend)

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-10 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) FULL TX power to Pcell while UE transmission buffer split stopped (ID: 11161904)

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-1 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) General concept for Pcell with full power(max power) (ID: 11161910)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11161916`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) For a UE configured with FR1 UL CA, while UE transmission buffer split is stopped, UE TX power is adjusted on Pcell in Ul overlapping, refer to 5G_UP_ALG_10919_replaced([11119940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLuQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

1.Timer rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is reserved for Scell UL re-transimission with existed split power, Pcell kept existed split power during timer is running.

1. After the timer rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower expiration or if no timer is needed:

 pcellSplitTxPower be set to min(Pcmax,servingcellPcmax);

pcell shoule be resumed in UL overlapping slot if Pcell status is suspend.

Note:

1. For different bufferSplit = 0 cases, rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is needed or not and how Pcell power is adjusted, refer to 5G_L2_9224_replaced([11161921](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dsoPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L2_9222_replaced([11161934](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dsovvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_9220_replaced([11161946](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25dspPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for details.

 Refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1841_replaced([11202516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgYvYPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-2 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Adjust Pcell power when bufferSplit = 0 triggered by BSR (ID: 11161921)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11161928`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) bufferSplit = 0 triggered by BSR scenario

below scenario can happen:

1. bufferSplit =0 triggered by BSR, Start rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower if the timer does not exist. When the rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is running, existed Pcell splitTxPower should be used and power adjustment should be stopped

2. bufferSplit != 0 triggered by BSR before rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, stop the timer, existed Pcell/Scell splitTxPower should be used and power adjustment should be started again

3. after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, set Pcell splitTxPower = servingcellPcmax

4. bufferSplit != 0 triggered by BSR after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, the case2 initialSplitTxPower shoulde be triggered

Refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1841_replaced([11202516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgYvYPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-3 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Adjust Pcell power when bufferSplit = 0 triggered by housekeeping or SCell UL RLQ suspend (ID: 11161934)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11161941`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) bufferSplit = 0 triggered by housekeeping scenario [CB006137-BB]or SCell UL RLQ suspend[End CB006137-BB]

below scenario can happen:

1. bufferSplit =0 triggered by housekeeping [CB006137-BB] or SCell UL RLQ suspend [End CB006137-BB], Start rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower if the timer does not exist. When the rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower is running, existed Pcell splitTxPower should be used and power adjustment should be stopped

2. bufferSplit != 0 triggered by housekeeping [CB006137-BB] or SCell UL RLQ resume [End CB006137-BB] before rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, Stop rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower, existed Pcell/Scell splitTxPower should be used and power adjustment should be started again

3. after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, set Pcell splitTxPower = servingcellPcmax

4. bufferSplit != 0 triggered by housekeeping [CB006137-BB] or SCell UL RLQ resume [End CB006137-BB] after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, the case2 initialSplitTxPower shoulde be triggered

Refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1841_replaced([11202516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgYvYPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-4 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Adjust Pcell power for Speical bufferSplit =0 cases (ID: 11161946)

**2.4.7.12.6.0-10.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `11161951`)

UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) In 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), Speical Buffer Split Cases with Zero Buffer for procedure control, several cases are defined.

Once conditions/procedures are triggered for such cases, Pcell should:

1.Stop UL Buffer split as normal bufferSplit = 0 scenario(a.k.a based on BSR and housekeeping).

2.Start timer rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower except for case2 and case4 for which ifHarqNeedClear = true in 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Existed pcell splitTxPower be used before rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout, set Pcell splitTxPower = servingcellPcmax after rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower timeout.

3.For case2 and case4 with ifHarqNeedClear = true in 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), there are no need to start rdTimerForReinitSplitTxPower for the purpose of possible scell retransmission, and set Pcell splitTxPower = servingcellPcmax immediately.

4.Pcell should restart buffer split (5G_L2_9232_replaced([11161035](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Y0JfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))/power split(5G_L2_7106_replaced([11161721](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25b3evvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) after procedure(in 5G_L2_7784_replaced([11161228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25aCSfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is completed.

Refer to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_1841_replaced([11202516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgYvYPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for message follow.

---

##### 2.4.7.12.6.0-11 UL Power Split (FR1 UL CA) Resume or Suspend Scell in UL Overlapping slot (ID: 11161959)
